The tour guide Viet was amazing -knowledgeable, friendly, helpful…We arrived each attraction at the perfect time, avoiding pouring rain on the adventures. From the comfortable bus ride with the driver Vu, exotic local meals, Mekong river cruise, riding small boat down the Mekong river, the floating market, rice noodle making…We enjoyed it all. Thank you, Viet and Vu, for such a wonderful trip to see your beautiful country. .

What can I say.... First, you should know l am not a group kind of guy. With that said, I am so glad we joined this tour with Viet (our guide/host). The tour itself is beautifully planned and executed (places, timing, food, experiences - everything). Viet was clearly the added bonus I did not expect. He is a warm, smart, knowledgeable, and LOCAL born and raised. I can highly recommend this tour to everyone thinking of visiting these areas. I’m sure other tour guides are good too, but I hope you get lucky and Viet is your guide. Plus, our driver, Vu, was an excellent (highly skilled) driver that handled the drive and obstacles perfectly. Enjoy Vietnam!
Great experience ! Fantastic tour guide Justin who was so knowledgeable and helpful. So many wonderful activities . Highly recommend this tour .

We joined a Mekong tour with our amazing guide, Kai, and it was such a wonderful experience from start to finish. Kai was friendly, knowledgeable, and spoke excellent English, which made the whole trip even more enjoyable. He shared lots of interesting stories and made sure everyone felt comfortable and taken care of. Overall, it was a well-organized and memorable trip — highly recommended!

We had a great 2-day Mekong tour with our guide, Kai. He was absolutely amazing — very kind, knowledgeable, and spoke excellent English. He truly made our trip memorable. There were a few shopping stops along the way, but Kai made everything easy with no pressure to buy anything. Just a small note: leaving a tip is considered a nice gesture of appreciation and a great motivation for both the guide and the driver.

Really great tour! Our guides, Tuong and Thuan were really friendly and informative. All the activities were great, especially the floating markets boatride. Maybe it would have been nice to leave for the floating markets a little bit earlier (earlier than 7:30am), so as to get a more authentic experience. And in my opinion the 4 Star hotel is maybe a little too much, we didnt need that kind of luxury.

Exceptional value for money. Ben our tour guide couldn’t have done more for us. He explained about everything in his perfect English. The trip was diverse in what we saw and I haven’t eaten so much in a long time with all the food and samples he offered us. Amazing 2 days. I recommend this trip to everyone.

Great trip with Alex and Benjy and the others. Alex was funny and speaks good English. Highlight was the early morning tour of the food markets and floating market. Got an insight into everyday life in Vietnam.
We had 2 days mekong tour. We really enjoyed the trip. Very nice mekong delta, friendly people. Ele was very great guide and knowledable guide. Thank you so much for great trip
It has been a very nice experience with our guide who took us from 10. I recommend it to everyone who comes to Vietnam. Thank you very much
We recommend it! Lots of variety and many surprises . We called it a surprise box and loved it :) great for family or couples but also solo!

We had a wonderful 2-day Mekong tour with Kai as our guide. The trip was well-balanced with boat rides, village visits, and great food. The second day was a real highlight with a fun bike tour through the countryside and a hands-on cooking class where we learned to make delicious local dishes. Kai was enthusiastic, attentive, and always made sure everyone felt comfortable. It was a perfect mix of culture, activities, and relaxation — highly recommended!

We had an amazing 2-day Mekong tour that was full of memorable experiences. From peaceful boat rides and visits to local villages to enjoying delicious regional food, everything was well-organized and beautifully paced. Our guide (Kai) was friendly, knowledgeable, and made the trip even more special with great stories and insights into local life. It was the perfect way to experience the culture and charm of the Mekong Delta — highly recommended!

The trip was wonderfull. Linda, our guide, picked us up in our hotel. We did lot of activities like learning how to cook local food, bike ride throught the country side, boat trip in the Mekong river, tried lot of great local food (sweets, fruits, drinks, etc.). Both day lunch is included. We also visited the floating market and learned about different craftsmanship. The hotel was 4 stars and the breakfast was great. Linda taught us a lot about vietnamese culture and was super attentive. We really recomend this two day trip.
The experience is very complete and varied, the guide (Vinh) was excellent with his explanations and has very good English! They gave us cold water at every stop!

What an unforgettable experience! Our two-day tour of the Mekong Delta accompanied by guide Joe was truly fantastic. From the very first moment, the perfect organization stood out: everything went smoothly, all visits were excellently timed and there was clear attention to every detail. Joe made sure we didn't miss anything about the beautiful scenery and local culture. What really made this tour unique were Joe's stories. He not only told about the history and traditions of the area, but brought everything to life with personal anecdotes, local legends and interesting facts. Because of his enthusiasm and knowledge, every place felt special. You can see from everything that Joe has a passion for Vietnam and for his work as a guide.

First time I take a 2 day stay with get your guide, unforgettable, simple and interesting visit, despite my very average English. Alex our guide... Fun and professional I recommend 😜 Perfect choice of hotel, nothing to say. Very good value for money

Excellent excursion 2d/1n. From the boat bus of the bicycle walking boat, temple, pagoda, markets, local. Passage forced by some "shops", but nobody forces to buy. All masterfully organized by Alex.. and if he asks you "how are you?", answer him "like this like this like this " ..:) ... NIRVANA!!!

Our guide was humorous and relevant. The care was without any problems. We enjoyed discovering the different manufacturing methods and the commercial approach was not too insistent. The hotel was great as well as meals

My guide Viet was amazing! The main reason this tour was the highlight of my trip was because of him. His knowledge, personality and thoughtfulness make him perfect for this profession. Our driver was impressive as well. This is a great way to get a feel for the Mekong Delta and especially Can Tho. The attractions along the way were interesting and engaging, and there was more than enough individual free time. These were 36 hours that were well spent. Thank you Viet!
Experience was very well organized by VIET our guide. He was very knowledgeable and made the experience all the better for us. I would highly recommend this tour and VIET.

Luc was a super tour guide, extremely knowledgeable but also very funny and a song writer in the making. Every activity was seamless and fun with no pressure to make additional purchases. He went out of his way to find a pharmacy for medication and we felt well looked after. Thanks for the invaluable insight into Vietnam and Vietnamese culture. Highly recommend
Our guide Hai was very helpful and knowledgeable. We were the only 3 on the tour and he was our personal guide. He personalised the trip to meet our needs.

We had a really nice time on this trip - we tried lots of different foods and saw lots of the Mekong Delta all in a short space of time so we covered a lot! Sunny was a very happy tour guide and works really hard to make sure everyone has a great time (while pushing you to try new things!)

Beautiful 2 days tour to see the Can Tho area, the floating market, and the Mekong Delta, while visiting several stops, the Viet guide was super nice and welcoming!! I highly recommend it to have a fantastic experience!

Had an awesome time on the 2-day Mekong tour! Day 1 we visited My Tho and Coconut Island—loved the boat ride, local music, and cruising around on a tuktuk. Day 2 was even better with the floating market, a fun cooking class, and a chill bike ride through the countryside. Our guide Kai was super friendly and made everything easy and fun. Totally recommend it if you want a real taste of the Mekong!

Just came back from an amazing 2-day Mekong tour with Kai – what a trip! Everything felt so authentic from start to finish. We got a real Mekong taste – from the local food to visiting the villages and floating market. The best part? Kai, our funny guide, made the whole experience even more special. Always cracking jokes, but also super knowledgeable and genuinely passionate.  We felt so well taken care of the whole time – nothing was rushed, and everything was smooth and easy. One of my favorite moments was sitting in a small rowing boat, gliding through the peaceful canals. So quiet, so beautiful. And of course, the floating market in the morning was such a unique experience – colorful, lively, and full of character.  If you're thinking about exploring the Mekong, do it – and ask for Kai if you can. He really made the trip unforgettable!

It was great, Nelson (Vàng) was particularly good, he was extremely kind and attentive when I injured myself (off my own doing). The tour covered a lot in a short time frame and it was really a unique experience.
Enjoyed our overnight tour. Was an easy way to experience the Mekong Delta. Nick our guide was helpful. Good variety of activities.
Great tour very complete and the guide (Vinh) was very kind and really by our side when we needed it. I recommend!!!

The tour was packed with experiences and lots of yummy food! We really enjoyed seeing all of the sights. Worth every penny! Our guide Việt was the BEST and made this trip really fun for our group! I would recommend asking for Việt to be your guide.

We had an amazing tour! Viet was our tour guide and he provided us with the best time. He took us to so many local spots and really took care of us. Anything we needed, he was ready to get it to us.  And the van driver, boat driver, everybody was great. We also ate so much great food. Can’t recommend this tour enough, especially with Viet!

My sister and I had a fantastic time on our tour to My Tho and Can Tho. Though the trip lasted just under two days, it was filled with fun activities that kept us engaged and entertained the entire time. The accommodation was excellent—truly a great choice.  While the lunch wasn’t quite to our taste, it didn’t take away from how brilliant the overall experience was. Our guide, Phil, was absolutely wonderful—friendly, approachable, and incredibly kind. He really made the trip even more special.  Wishing Phil all the best in his career—may he continue doing what he loves and bringing joy to many others, just as he did for us!
Great tour with amazing and funny guide Sunny, trip was interesting and well prepared, Sunny takes care of our group and was really helpfull and funny :-)

We had 2 days a really nice tour in Mekong Delta. We weren't sure at first if we should really do this but are glad to have done it :-) the impressions of the native and especially by our guide "Toni" were very nice. Thanks again for everything Toni. Because he helped us so much as it was our first days in Vietnam and also gave tips for the further journey.
Linda. One of the best tour guide ever she never left my side coz i was alone she let me experience the opportunities to have a better experience and photo she is caring.

We really enjoyed this tour. Our guide Phu was very knowledgeable, kind and ensured we were all looked after. He was very attentive and approachable and really added to our experience.  The activities on the itinerary were exactly as described and were engaging and enjoyable, and whilst the places we visited were obviously set up for tourists, there wasn’t a heavy push to buy things as there has been on previous tours. I particularly enjoyed the Coconut Island activities. The floating market wasn’t as vast as I had expected but still enjoyable and I found the fish and meat market particularly interesting.  We were most impressed by the hotel we were put up in. The tour advertises a 3 star hotel and had read some previous reviews about the accommodation not being that great so our expectations weren’t very high. But the Wink Hôtel right near the city centre was amazing. Spotlessly clean, modern and very comfortable. The rooftop pool and breakfast were both great. I’m guessing the hotel tour groups get allocated to comes down to availability so it may not always be this hotel but if you happen to get the Wink hotel- you won’t be disappointed.  The transport was comfy and well air conditioned. We only had 6 in our group so we had plenty of space. One tip, pack light- there is not a lot of room in the back of the bus for luggage so if you are travelling with all of your luggage you may need to store it somewhere as it may not fit on the bus.  Overall a lovely way to spend a couple of days outside of HCMC.
Very good and more, we loved it. Guide Nicole ’and crue’ were perfect, thank You. Can Tho was lovely, the hotel there was great.
Fantastic tour very well organized and 2 days full of interesting places. Hotel was very good. But a big well done to our tour leader DIPPER.

We had a great time on our trip. There were some nice stops throughout the whole journey. Although a bit more on the tourisitic side, we enjoyed it it very much. We loved the many little Trips by boat. Especially the floatinf market is amazing. Something you should definetely see before it goes "extinct". We had a lovely hotel and our Tour guide Tien was very comforting and knowledgable! One of the best Jones we had here in Vietnam. Would recommend this Tour over the one Day Tour because you get a much better feeling for the country and people.
Wonderful 2 spent in very capable hands of Tommy and co ....seemless and not rushed . Gave a great perspective to Vietnam novices . Highly recommend.

This was one of the most beautiful tours we did. 2 days with very varied places and events. The various crafts also to participate in e.g. the rice noodle factory, the python farm with cobra rice wine, the beautiful boat trip through the narrow Mekong tributaries, the absolutely authentic large fish market, the floating markets on the MEkong and the morning meal from the boat on the boat. So many beautiful experiences and more. We all loved it! Big praise also to our travel companion Loan ( Lara) always very helpful, well explanatory and friendly! Thank you very much!!!
The tour was amazing! Vietnam is successo a beautiful country and you will love the Mekong river. Our tour guide Vinh explain everything and he rally was a great guide, many thanks!

Enjoyable and lovely trip with our fantastic tour guide Harry! The tour is very well structured and the overnight hotel was amazing. We visited many stops where Harry gave us fascinating insights about the region and the local people that we would not have gotten when visiting alone!

We enjoyed our 2 day tour largely due to our excellent guide, Hai. He provided clear explanations of what to expect and ensured that we got the most out of each experience. The tour itself had a great variety of activities with the highlight being the Floating Market. We learned much about the Mekong Delta and were able to have great interactions with the local people. The lunches were delicious and the hotel was very comfortable. I would highly recommend this tour.

A big thank you to Alex and James! They were fun guides to do the tour with. Alex even played guitar for us.  The tour itself is good and I would do it again - most of the stops were striking and really interesting. I loved the early morning markets in Can Tho and the pagoda and boat ride on the first day.  Some of the other stops were less interesting, mostly the silk/bamboo showroom where they just try to sell you stuff, and didn't appreciate the bicycle ride either as it felt like a bolt on to make the tour artificially longer. The bicycles were working poorly, and our guides left us behind with no directions to go back to the restaurant, which was a bit unprofessional. The bánh xèo cooking "class" also was underwhelming as we were given very little instructions.  The hotel room and restaurants we went to were overall great for the price, so we were happy with that.

The trip was fantastic. The transport was really comfortable and the different elements of the trip were fun and entertaining. There was so much to do and see but we never felt rushed. The lunches and breakfast were plentiful and tasty and the hotel was great. It is definitely worthwhile and Harry our tour guide was super friendly, knowledgeable and made everyone feel welcome and brought the group together despite language barriers.

We really enjoyed this fantastic trip hosted by HARRY who provided excellent information throughout, everything exceeded our expectations and we would highly recommend. Thankyou VAT and especially Harry.
To be done before their probable extinction within 4 years. It is now mainly for tourists that this activity exists
Very well organized trip: the pace was perfect, the guide very efficient and giving lots of information. It's a nice excursion, very rich. Hotel accommodation ++×

Duke was a great guide! Thanks to this excursion we saw things we certainly wouldn't have seen if we were alone! The excursion is very well organized, well paced, just right! The means of transport are diverse and really help to appreciate the different activities: walk on the canals, floating market, local market, discovery of different islands and their culinary specialties, free time etc... A very interesting and relaxing excursion! Recommended ++

We had an absolutely fabulous tour in Vietnam, Cai Rang floating market and Mekong Delta led by the amazing Lucky. Everything was exceptionally well organized, making for a smooth and enjoyable experience from start to finish. Lucky speaks excellent English and has a wealth of knowledge about Vietnam, which he shares enthusiastically with the group. He goes above and beyond to make every participant feel comfortable, valued, and truly part of the experience. His passion for his country and dedication to his guests make all the difference.  If you're considering a tour in Vietnam, I highly recommend this one—especially if you can go with Lucky! 100% recommended!
Justin was a great tour guide, showed us many different aspects of Vietnamese rural life in the Delta. Highly recommend this to experience authentic Vietnam!
Very personal trip to the Mekong Delta. Many details and impressions at local markets, boat trips,... Thank you and so on!!!

Great experience to see Mekong Delta. Floating market seems to be a little tourist made. However, even to understand how trade works: this is a life showcase.  Tour was very good organised by Alex our guide. He shares friendly words with local people and is a wonderful singer and guitarist

Alex is a good accompanist. He even helped us book our bus to Chau doc following. Fairly complete tour that facilitates transport and activities. The floating market was not at all what was expected. A few boats, but many more tourist boats than locals. However we made the local market at 4am , much more bustling. Tour in the sampans very nice

We had two great days and that was made possible by our guide Linda! What a nice guide we had these days. It was 2 full days and have seen and done a lot. Linda has told us a lot and explained about Vietnam. Thanks Linda!!!

An exceptional 2-day tour of the Mekong Delta No very well organized down time full of activities of the bike boat of the kitchen discoveries in nature Fish markets and floating two splendid sunrise experiences The Laura guide exceptional two kindness of knowledge and human qualities Beautiful hotel Bravo trip advisor we highly recommend Philippe Rachel

Fabulous!! The visit is very rich!! Tt is very well organized We chose to go to the hotel which is very comfortable with pool!! We took a bike ride in a lush garden!!! Feel free to take this experience Value for money great!!!

Sir Ele is an excellent tour guide, very friendly and very knowledgeable about the places. The tour is awesome, I would recommend it to my pinoy friends.  Experiencing the old life in modern time is somewhat a blizz.  Thank you so much, Sir Ele for the wonderful trip with you. We enjoyed our celebration of our wedding anniversary with you.
Really nice tour. Henry was a really good guide. Mekong is really beautiful. Tour is amazing i would book again. Hotel was really clean.
Highly recommended tour, packed with impressions - but also exhausting. The bus rides are a bit long, but that can't be avoided if you really want to get to the Mekong Delta.
Bao was fantastic! Very funny, super knowledgeable and taught us so much more than I expected to learn! We had a great time! Thank you so much Bao!

The tour was very well organized, and our guide Sunny was cheerful, lively, and full of good energy. We especially enjoyed the boat ride through the canals, the floating markets, and the delicious food. A perfect mix of relaxation and adventure – highly recommended!

A wonderful trip with the lovely Sunny who was a perfect guide: lively, Smiling, effective, kind. She did a lot to make this short stay in the Mekong Delta unforgettable. Thanks to her! I highly recommend this tour,
Great organization, everything perfect. You trade deep into the wild Mekong Delta. Getting there is a bit arduous because of the traffic. I can only recommend this tour!
Our guide Big Dave was really amazing. He was funny and friendly. Whole tour was smooth and there werent any accidents. We experienced a lot of local food and drinks.
My only problem was d guide, David. He made me enjoyed the tour to the max. I will not join any more tour in NAM if he's not d guide.

I just came back from the 2 days tour on the Mekong River and I 've to say it was wowwwwwww...... We loved it and our guide Lucky made the experience amazing.... Without him.. It wouldn't be the same...... The boy is great at his job... And helped us to understand a lot about Vietnam culture..... Ps:he sings very well......!!!!!.. A big thank you also to our driver kham.
Great 2 day tour. Lots of fun and good information. Big Dave added some salt and pepper with his personality. Highly recommendable.

We spent two beautiful days on the Mekong Delta, we visited typical villages and the floating market. We had a cooking class, a bike ride, and a visit to a candy factory; two days full of new experiences. Our fantastic Big Dave guide!! Super super recommended!!

Pick up from hotel in district 1 was punctual. Big Handsome David is friendly and fun. He makes the trip enjoyable with good local culture experience. Recommendation of food at night market is real good.

What a wonderful tour! Alex our tour guide was very friendly and knowledgeable. We had such a great time and got to see parts of the Mekong that we wouldn’t have if not on this tour! A great start to our Vietnam trip.

We chose this tour because it offered the most complete visit in Vietnamese tradition. The experience reflected our expectations. The guides accompanied us with irony and accuracy. The only difficulty as a vegetarian that despite having expressed my needs from the beginning at each meal I had to request something for myself, it is still a difficulty I am used to traveling but in this case it was more difficult and at the last meal I made do by eating only what I could. For the rest very nice experience!

two days of experiences: Cycling, cooking class, for the excellent Vietnamese cuisine, homemade rice noodles, an unforgettable early morning at the floating market, beautiful green gardens, plantations for many fruits, bananas, Dorian, Jack Fruit, Milk Apple, coconut, bees, I can't stop, it was really very, very green,  very close to the culture and tradition. Finally, a beautiful original old Vietnamese wooden house, I can only recommend it to everyone, in two days you learn and dive deep into the culture.  Leader Ele Super nice and very devoted. also to the bus driver, high praise, no hassle, steered with absolute calm through chaos.
Bao was the best tour guide ever!! Made the day really fun, was super informative and we got to see and experience a heap of new things

Had a great fun and educational tour that was well arranged. Our guide Jack knew a lot about the Mekong Delta, spoke good English and always had a smile on his face! During the tour he also thought carefully about how we could avoid the crowds in high season. Recommended!

We booked this tour via Getyourguide.com and the organisation was perfect. Jack our tour guide was knowledgeable, caring and funny. He always called us his “family” 😂. Even though we had some changes in plans, Pagoda at a different time and unforeseeable bike incident of a guest, nothings seems to be a problem, he took care of everything, organising extras, working as translator, organising doctors visit etc. Never lost his patience, politeness or sense of humour. Thanks Jack for two very enjoyable days.  Tip to the tour companies: It would be nice if the guests could take a leaflet home with many of the facts put together, as it is very interesting to hear the facts but no-one could memorise it for later, so probably an idea for the guests to make an amazing trip unforgettable.

This tour with Sunny was absolutely fantastic. Her knowledge and enthusiasm were contagious. She clearly prioritized making everyone happy, which she impressively achieved. The inclusion of free time allowed for personalized exploration. Highly recommend!

Sunny was a great tour guide, very nice, cheerful and always helpful. We received a lot of information during our tour and had a lot of fun activities to enjoy the vietnamese culture. Eventhough we had a lot of activities, we also had a good balance of freetime during the 2 day trip.
Brilliant tour. Our guide, Justin went above and beyond to provide detailed information and an authentic experience.

We really enjoyed our tour . It was really vibrant and educating at the same time visiting all the different spots on the Mekong delta and especially the floating market . Linda ( our tour guide) was awesome . She was funny , informative and super helpful . She made our experience fun and smooth. I highly recommend her .

We’ve had an absolutely amazing time on the tour with Phil! Such an experience, would definitely recommend going!  Phil is such a lovely person and has tought us a lot about Vietnam and the Mekong delta!

Lucky the guide and Hai Le the driver showed us the beauty of the Mekong delta. Lovely accommodation, not too rushed tour, just the right pace, only downside is that we were served too much food and half of it remained uneaten. Overall - lucky to have Lucky :)
Bao was absolutely amazing. Very knowledgable and super funny, he made our day trip one to remember! Would definitely recommend him!
Bao is so funny and knowledgeable! Very awesome tour guide loves a good laugh and can joke with anyone! Would highly recommend 🙏

We had a wonderful experience with this tour. The tour itself is very well structured to see all the relevant places at the right pace (no rush, but also no wasted time). The Mekong delta is definitely worthy to explore and this tour takes to the most interesting spots. In particular, our guide Lucky was very knowledgeable, full of interesting info and brilliant recommendations and enthusiastic about his job. Lucky and our driver Hai Le built a serene enjoyable atmosphere from the very beginning. I really recommend this tour!

Kai was an exceptional tour guide on our Mekong 2-day tour. He is very knowledgeable, accommodating and attentive. We preferred the second day since it was no shopping, only interesting activities and my favorite one was riding a bike around the local village. *Note: prepare some change to tip local service.

We had an amazing 2-day Mekong tour with Kai as our guide. He was incredibly knowledgeable, sharing fascinating insights into the local culture and history. Kai took great care of us throughout the trip, making sure we were comfortable and well-informed. Although there was a lot of driving, the experience was definitely worth it. Highly recommend Kai for anyone looking to explore the Mekong region!

I had an amazing time on the Mekong Delta tour with Ele as our guide! The itinerary was perfectly planned, and Ele made the experience unforgettable with his knowledge and enthusiasm. The absolute highlight of the trip was the sampan ride through the coconut tree-lined canals in My Tho! It was such a peaceful and unique way to take in the beauty of the Mekong River. Highly recommend this tour to anyone looking for an authentic and fun adventure!”
My husband and I had a great time, well organized trip, our guide Ele very helpful and kind, I recommend this trip.
I recommend this tour to be able to see many interesting places and have many experiences in just two days, Eli is a great guide, speaks English very well and is very helpful.
Thanks Alex for a great tour you were a wonderful host with plenty of interesting information. The hotel and food was top class thanks again David Williams do not miss it

We were very, very satisfied with the varied layout and content of the tour. Our guide Simon was amazing! Very knowledgeable about history and life in Vietnam today. He was responsive, engaged and very helpful with our questions. His pleasant and welcoming manner created a very good atmosphere in the group. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

I had a great time on the 2 day tour. Each activity/stop was amazing! We saw lots but it did not feel rushed at all. Very good value. Our guide Vinh was great, he was very knowledgeable, friendly and went above and beyond. Would definitely recommend this tour!

We booked a private tour with the guide “Bao” (speaking excellent English) into the Mekong Delta. The tour is excellently put together. After visiting the floating market we were able to enjoy various local fruits and specialties. The highlight was the canoe trip through narrow canals. Bao paid great attention to safety during the various boarding and disembarking from the boat. Very exemplary. So the tour could be managed without danger. Bao told us many questions about the country, people and culture during the trip and also in between. Very impressive. We highly recommend Bao as a guide, as well as the tour.

We spent two days on an excursion with Linda. She was fantastic from start to finish. Cheerful, interesting, good advice and very kind. It was two great days exploring the Mekong Delta. We highly recommend this excursion with a special mention for Linda! Thank you very much

A very well organized tour with a good hotel and an excellent guide. It's a shame there's almost nothing left of the floating market, but there were many other great places on the trip. The tour operator is definitely recommended.

Our guide, Thuan, was amazing. He had a great sense of humor and did an excellent job describing where we were going and giving us history and info along the way. The driver was also phenomenal at navigating all of the small streets and places we went. The tour was a lot of fun and would highly recommend!

We had a fantastic time on the 2-day Mekong Delta tour! The group size was perfect, allowing for a more personal experience. Our guide, Kai, was incredibly knowledgeable, friendly, and made the whole trip fun. The driver was skilled, and we felt safe throughout the journey. The food was delicious, and the hotel in Mekong was clean and comfortable. Highly recommend this tour for anyone looking to explore the delta!

We had a fantastic 2-day Mekong tour led by Kai. His knowledge of the region and warm personality created a wonderful atmosphere, making the experience both enjoyable and informative. The itinerary was well-planned, with a great mix of activities that kept things interesting and engaging. Highly recommend Kai for anyone looking to explore the Mekong!

I had an incredible experience on this tour, thanks to our amazing guide, Bao, and our driver, Minh. They took us from Ho Chi Minh City to the Cai Rang Floating Market and the Mekong Delta, and the entire day was filled with unforgettable moments.  The floating market was a real highlight. It was both the first and last floating market we visited in Vietnam, and it was fascinating to see it in action. We had the opportunity to enjoy a delicious bowl of noodle soup and sample a variety of exotic fruits, including pink mango, mangosteen, coconut, and durian—although I must admit, the durian wasn’t to my taste!  The Mekong Delta portion of the tour was equally memorable. We boarded a small, narrow boat that took us through lush waterways to a local coconut candy factory. It was great to see how the candies were made and even better to taste them! For lunch, we stopped at a restaurant renowned for its tilapia, which was absolutely delicious.  What really made the experience special, though, was Bao. His knowledge of the local culture and history, combined with his fun, engaging personality, made the day fly by. He truly went above and beyond to ensure we had a great time.  If you're looking for a knowledgeable, friendly, and professional guide, book with Bao. This tour was one of the highlights of my trip to Vietnam!
Bao was an amazing tour guide. He was knowledgeable, funny and attentive throughout the tour. I would highly recommend him for future tours.

Thank you so much, Ele! Our tour guide was wonderful, very efficient and punctual. The information shared was all very interesting and a diverse array of topics. Every activity made the trip feel really well rounded. I was worried that it would be too much because there are so many activities but we didn't find it too tiring at all. Ele and everyone else helped us so much and took care of everything so everything felt easy!  I can also say, I was nervous about some activities because I'm a big lady (120kgs) but everyone was so helpful and kind and I enjoyed everything!  Thank you so much for a wonderful trip in the Mekong Delta!!
This tour was fantastic! We packed in a week’s worth of sightseeing into 2 days. Our guide Ele was very knowledgeable and friendly.
The tour is really nice, we saw many things, eat amazing food and our guide Thuan was really interesting and funny, I recommend it!
Harry, our guide was very informative, helpful, professional, friendly and always smiling. He helped my wife who has bad knees during getting in and out of boats and bus.
All the best you could expect thanks to the valuable Alex guide, very knowledgeable and engaging. We couldn't ask for anything better.

We had an excellent trip of 2 days and one night to the Delta of Mekong. It was excellent! We had a lot of activities during the trip, we could visit several cities and villages. Everything was so beautiful and well organized by pour amazing guide Tommy. We are so thankful to his kindness and availability, he could help us with everything. I recommend this trip 100%! Goya

Good morning, Fantastic tour where I had the chance to get to know the habits of this part of Vietnam. I would like to stress how important it is to have a good guide during a tour like this. In these 2 days Tommy has been fantastic, not only for the mastery of the English language but also, what for me is fundamental, knowing how to manage and help the visitor at all times. It is true that the availability and courtesy in Vietnam have it as characteristics. But the relationship with Tommy was special. Thank you.

This is a great and authentic Mekong Delta tour. We were a small group of 11 tourists and had the best guide we could have wished for, his name is Lucky. He knew everything and had answers to all our questions. And he has a very good sense of humour. We saw many different things from temples to floating market, fish market ate delicious lunches (one of which we could cook ourselves). In the evening in Can Tho we had plenty of time to discover the night market and had some time for ourselves. It was really a great experience. We highly recommend it to every couple or single traveler. And if you are lucky, you will have Lucky as your tour guide.

The tour was so much fun and there were even more activities then described. Lucky was a wonderful host and definitely made the trip even better! He taught us a lot about the Vietnamese culture and definitely knows how to make a group laugh. The hotel was very nice as well. Big thanks to Lucky for making this trip a perfect start of our holiday!
The trip was amazing. Bao was a great tour guide. He was very informative. My favorite part was the floating river and making the Vietnamese pancakes.
Bao was a great guide for the floating market. All of the food and fruits were sooo yummy. I loved making my own Vietnamese pancake.

We recently enjoyed a fantastic two-day trip in the Mekong Delta.  **Day 1: We started in My Tho City, exploring the charming Ben Tre Province with a serene boat ride through coconut forests and delicious local cuisine.  **Day 2: The highlight was visiting the vibrant Cai Rang Floating Market, where Kai, our brilliant and funny guide, made the experience unforgettable. We then enjoyed a scenic bike tour through the countryside, culminating in a hands-on cooking class.  This trip was a perfect blend of culture and adventure, and I highly recommend it!

We had the pleasure of joining a 2-day Mekong tour led by Kai. He was very friendly, informative and enthusiastic so we absolutely enjoyed the tour. The guide always tried his best to ensure us a good experience. The hotel in Cantho was comfortable and clean. Nothing to complain!
Such a great day through the history and culture of Vietnam. Our guide Jack was passionate and he explained very well in proper English. I highly recommend this tour
Amazing two days Tour to the Mekong Delta River with Jack Sparrow, defenitly the best Captain For this Trip. Would do It Always again!
It has been a very complete excursion, everything perfect and finally we have had a great storm! The guide Ele great, very friendly!

"Helllloooooo Vietnammm..." We had an unforgettable 2-day tour into the Mekong Delta. The tour showed us many facets of the delta and brought people's lives closer. Special mention must be made of our tour guide Tony, who was able to explain us in detail in these two days with his experience, the country, the people and the history of Vietnam and the Delta. During the tour we had experienced many activities. - various boat tours on the Mekong - Try local specialities and curiosities - Visit Floating Market - Small bike tour of local farms - Visit of local producers of chocolate, honey and coconuts - Pagoda visit with explanations of Buddhism
Our Duc Guide was a nice discovery, he told us about life on the river making us try experiences in the visited islands. Recommendation to everyone!

We had an amazing two-day tour in the Mekong Delta, and a big part of that was thanks to our fantastic guide, Alex (Tuc). He was not only incredibly knowledgeable but also funny, friendly, and made the entire experience so much more enjoyable. His energy and enthusiasm were contagious, making the tour both informative and entertaining. We also want to give a special mention to the bus driver, who was excellent – safe, punctual, and very professional. Overall, it was an unforgettable trip, and we highly recommend this team for anyone visiting the Mekong Delta!
Alex was super good Guide and expert throughout the area. Always willing to help you. We recommend it 100%. See you in Nirvana!
We both enjoyed the Mekong tour led by Kai. The guide was informative and helpful. All activities were well organized and interesting to see/ try. Would recommend to our friends!

We did the two-day private tour to the Mekong Delta with Ele. You will travel from Ho Chi Minh in a very comfortable limousine van to Can Tho to admire the different places of the Mekong Delta.  Ele speaks very good English and knows a lot about the history and current economy of Vietnam. We enjoyed and felt well at ease during trip, also Ele took many photos during trip and shared them with us at the end, so you can enjoy the trip yourself. Thank you!

Mecon Delta tour is a fun experience to get some of the history, while experiencing the present. Keep in mind that some points where you stop are commercially constructed. But still worth experiencing.

Our tour guide Bao made our Mekong delta tour Amazing! He was funny and informative. He certainly kept us entertained! The drive from Ho Chi Minh was in a very comfortable van with business class style seating. Very VIP !! There was no shortage of water drinks fruits and local dishes. We did not tour around hungry. The food was delicious and safe for travellers. Neither of us got sick. Highly recommend Vietnam Adventure Tours. Great value for what I paid for a private tour. Ask for Bao. His English is excellent!!

The Mekong 2-day tour with Tommy was really great! His professionalism and storytelling alongside his childhood memories from the Mekong Delta made the tour even more insightful and captivating.  We were in a small group (7 people) so it was easy to follow the activities and had enough free time in the different areas to explore without a rush, everything was well-paced.  I stayed in the 3-star hotel which was comfy and had a view on the Mekong delta, close to the main restaurants and the boat starting point for the Cai Rang market (<5/10 mn). It has a nice terrasse on the last floor for eating breakfast with a view on the city.  Having to participate in the rice noodle preparation or cooking banh xeo was a nice addition.  Highly recommend!

The best tour I've ever had. The best guide Tommy because he was friendly and helpfull making all the experience of the trip, something that didn't feel touristic. It felt familiar and close. He has a lot of knowledge of what he does.

The trip has been spectacular! The places, the experiences, the meals, the friendly people, everything worked perfectly, but what made this possible without a doubt was the dedication and the cordiality of our Tomi Guide, really allows to enjoy every minute of the trip. I recommend it 100%

Amazingly lucky and getting Tommy as your guide. We got to see much more than expected and we had a guide who gave us a lot of value for the trip. Nice hotel for accommodation centrally in the city. Recommended

Very nice 2 day trip. We experienced a lot on the trip. We visited the temple, coconut goes, got to taste everything that was made and on to where we were going to sew flat space and the next day we went to the water market and on to a restaurant. There we got the food made ourselves in the Vietnamese way our guide is named tommy and was the best.

The activity has gone very well, thanks to our Guide (English name Jack). He has been wonderful with us throughout the trip, he has explained the Vietnamese culture and all the details very well, he has been very friendly and attentive with us throughout the trip. With very good and fluent English. It's been lucky to have him as your guide.
The very attentive and friendly guide has treated us wonderfully (Jack) for the Spaniards. An excellent guy. Behaved very well and you were 2 gave us a lot of freedom

100% recommended tour, with many activities that make you know a little more Vietnamese culture and food. Thanks to our Guide Jack, we got to know this country a little more. He made it perfect and we finished the tour very happy, we would definitely do any tour with him again. Also thanks to the driver, who although we could not communicate, was always there with the fresh water. Recommended to everyone who comes to HCN

Perfect two day tour, places, hotel, guide and driver. They treated us luxury, it was a tour for more people but it happened that they did not come and we went alone. Guide Jack (not Sparrow) explained everything about the culture and people we saw, the way they lived and all their curiosities. The hotel was amazing and all inclusive on the tour. For me perfect

Phil (Phú) has been an amazing tour guide during the 2 day tour to the Mekong Delta. During the tour, he was both professional in presentation and casual while talking about his childhood in the Mekong Delta.  One of the best aspects of the tour is that many of the things you do are hands-on; whether that's cooking bánh xèo, shredding coconuts or preparing noodles.

Our Mekong 2-day tour with Kai was exceptional. His deep knowledge and engaging storytelling brought the region’s culture and history to life. The itinerary was well-paced, featuring stunning landscapes, authentic local experiences, and delicious cuisine. The guide’s enthusiasm and expertise made the journey memorable and insightful. Highly recommend this tour for anyone wanting a comprehensive and enjoyable Mekong experience. Worth every moment!
I had a fantastic 2-day Mekong tour with our guide, Kai. He made the trip more enjoyable and interesting with extra activities and helpful advice. Highly recommend!

I recently enjoyed a fantastic 2-day tour of the Mekong Delta led by our guide Kai. The first day included a visit to the stunning Vinh Trang Pagoda and a series of engaging island activities such as a music performance, a serene rowing boat ride, a fascinating bee farm tour, and a coconut candy workshop. The second day was equally memorable, featuring a vibrant floating market experience, an enjoyable bike tour through picturesque landscapes, and a hands-on cooking class that brought the local cuisine to life. Kai's expertise and enthusiasm made the trip truly exceptional. Highly recommend this tour for anyone looking to explore the Mekong Delta!
It was a very nice experience with Phuc! The floating markets were different than expected, but all in all a very good tour!

I did a solo trip on the 2 day excursion from Ho Chi Minh to the Mekong delta region. It wouldn’t have been the same if we did not have our awesome tour guide Lucky! As a tour guide it’s difficult to tend to every persons needs and ways of communicating but Lucky did a fantastic job relating to every person on the tour. His English was easy to understand and made everything more fun. I tend to not do organized tours because I get bored rather easy with operators standing at the front of the bus and announcing history lessons but this was far from it. Lucky was captivating, relatable, and overall just a great personality. I cannot recommend this tour highly enough and if you’re lucky, you will get Lucky as your guide!

Excellent trip. Our guide Ele was friendly, knowledgeable, helpful and patient. Loc was completely competent driver. Felt very safe. Food was varied different things to try. Lots to do. Hardest part is getting on and off moving boats, but all happy to extend a hand. Enjoyed the company on the bus. Good 2 days.

Fantastic Experience, very informative and helpful guide. Exploring many great vietnamese regional villages and cities. Ele is a amazing tour guide very friendly and good company. Loc was an excellent bus driver 11/10.
We had a great time for 2 days on our tour of the Mekong Delta with our Guide Ele. There are lots of Things to do, all interesting. I recommend!

We toured the Mekong over 2 days 1 nights with Luxury Travel. The trip was very interesting with our Guide Ele, we travelled all over the delta with lots of Things to do. Everything was varied and authentic, I recommend!
We strongly recommend this tour. Ask specifically about Alex who will lead you not only to the places but also to the history of Vietnam. Fun and musical experience :-)

I took the 2-day excursion to Cần Thơ with the 3 children aged 15, 13 and 7. Everything went very well. We loved the 4 star hotel, really sumptuous!! We ate Streetfood. This allowed us to taste many different local flavors. Moreover, we enjoyed walking in the evening in the city, the atmosphere was lively and friendly. Our guide, Tommy, was really very friendly. He was kind and welcoming with the whole group. Besides, we were a small group of 10 people, which is all the more appreciated. We made several stops on the way to visit different places. The only disappointment, regardless of the guide and the excursion is that I expected to see a very lively and dynamic floating market in Cái Răng full of colors, as can be seen in the photos... Not at all... there is not much to see nowadays at the floating market... at least we will have done it! Many thanks to our guide Tommy for having a great time with him.

We had a great time with Tommy. He comes from the Mekong Delta himself and this made the tour even more personal and better. We took care of us all the time, answered questions and explained things without getting intrusive. It was a very nice 2 days with Tommy.

We recently took a 2-day Mekong tour with Kai as our guide, and it was fantastic. Kai was incredibly knowledgeable and went out of his way to ensure we had an excellent experience. The local food was delicious, and every stop was well-planned. Kai’s passion and effort made the trip enjoyable and memorable. If you’re looking for an engaging and well-organized tour, this is it. Highly recommend it for anyone wanting to explore the Mekong region with a great guide and tasty local cuisine.

I had a fantastic 2-day Mekong tour with our guide, Kai. He provided us with interesting facts about local history and culture, making the trip both informative and enjoyable. Kai was friendly, knowledgeable, and went out of his way to ensure we had a memorable experience. He made the tour feel personal and engaging, showing great enthusiasm and care throughout. Thanks to his efforts, we gained a deeper understanding of the Mekong region and its people. I highly recommend Kai to anyone looking for an exceptional and informative tour guide.
Ele was a great guide!! Funny, speaks good English, answered every question, on time and always tried very hard!

Best day in Vietnam, the tour was amazing, the two guides explained very precisely the Vietnam war scenario, introducing historical context and showing photos. The visit to Cu Chi tunnels was very interesting, the tour at the Mekong delta as well. Alex the guide entertained the whole group with songs and jokes! Best tour we had in Vietnam!
Ele was the best host (for the best, if you read his tee shirt). We had an amazing day of great touring and professional guiding. Would definitely go on any tour that Ele takes!
Bao was an amazing tour guide with his energetic company. We were not once bored during the tour and would definitely go again the next time we are in vietnam!

Very good trip around the Mekong Delta, lots of activities which allow you to understand the lifestyles of the locals. We see a lot of things without being in a rush, and the floating market is worth the detour (May 2024) despite its gradual disappearance. Very interesting guide, we had a great experience!

We had two very eventful days! We experienced everyday life and Vietnamese culture up close and learned a lot. The food was super tasty and exceeded our expectations. Alex our guide and his trainee An speak great English and were always concerned about everyone's well-being. Alex creates an exuberant, great atmosphere with his guitar and his humor! We really grew together as a group over the two days. We would book the trip again at any time!

Incredible tour, 2 days well spent discovering the Mekong Delta and the Vietnamese people. The guide Alex was fantastic, he speaks English very well, he told us a lot of stories and information, as well as recommending local experiences. Furthermore, every now and then he knew how to entertain us with his guitar. He is a true showman, singer, actor and comedian. Always smiling, super funny! Congratulations also to your colleague, An. He also speaks English very well. Kind, smiling and polite.  In detail for the tour all transfers, 2 lunches and 1 breakfast are included. And the hotel they booked us was nice and clean. Beyond expectations.  Super recommended!!!

Mekong Tour. We chose this tour and were truly fascinated by it. Together with our guide Alex we discovered a corner of Vietnam full of charm. He guided us to the fish market, to the floating market. He made us discover new flavors and accompanied us with his kindness and his music throughout the tour. If you come to Vietnam choose Alex's tour.

Great tour with Justin, I loved it! We did so many activities in two days: * explore temples, the Mekong river and Islande * learned about Vietnamese's culture and history * cooking classes and tastings of multiple Vietnamese's delicacies * nice activities like biking and canooing * discover 2 différent type of market: typical land market and floating market It was great and I was never bord! We were a small group of 11 people and Justin was very nice and educative. The hotel we stayed in in Can Tho was much better than I was expertise. Would totally recommend!

Alex Duc Huu Nguyen is the best tour guide in the whole world, we spent 2 days of visiting and laughing so much with him.  Hope that everybody can have the same xperience I had during this Delta Mekong tour . I will remember you and your teachings forever dear Alex: see you in Nirvana!
Alex is a helpful and cheerful guide. He introduced us to the landscapes and culture of the Mekong with a lot of humor. Thank you for these two days of excursion.
Fun little 2 day tour we did in a group of 4. Our guide Ben was great, funny and professional. He took care of us the whole times from meals to rooms.

Tour as described. The guide was particularly recommended! Phú explained things well with a lot of humor. Luggage can be taken along without any problem. Bus air-conditioned with a pleasant driver. Hotel in Can Tho also very neat and centrally located near the night market. Would like to do the tour again exactly like this.

The two days in the Mekong Delta were truly wonderful. We had two guides who showed us all the life of the Delta. We did a bicycle tour around the hotel (a beautiful wooden cabin), also a "search for snails for dinner" activity that we found very fun. The next day at 5:00 in the morning we went by boat to see the sunrise in the Delta and visit the floating market. Both things... Spectacular. Breakfast on one of the boats and then visit a house where we try to work with rice pasta (we will have to practice more). At night, cooking class and very pleasant chat with the guides (Tomás and Juan, two wonderful Vietnamese people with an enviable level of Spanish). Totally recommendable to spend these two days with them in the Delta. One of the best things on our trip to Vietnam.

The mekong tour was a lot of fun and our tour guide Alex provided a lot of interesting informations at all the stops. Some of the stops are rather touristic but you still see a lot of the local culture and nature. Overall a great experience

Fantastic 2-day tour to the Mekong. Our guide, Alex, was incredibly engaged and his humor created a relaxed atmosphere. The tour itself took us to the most popular attractions where we could experience the local culture up close, accompanied by friendly locals who shared their knowledge and traditions with us. The Tuk-Tuk ride was a unique experience, excitingly navigating us through narrow streets and offering us the opportunity to see the surroundings from a completely new perspective.

Alex is an excellent and knowledgeable guide. His English is very good. His other talents are photography, guitar playing and singing… he will serenade you on the boat ride. Tour was well worth it…could not have done it on my own. Hotel was very good as were the meals. Only wish was if we could have been at the floating market earlier to see actual business taking place. Alex gets a 10 out of 10! Funny and quirky guy who makes this your fun and informative!
Very nice and interesting trip to Mekong Delta with our guide Vinh. Vinh was perfectly prepared to lead such a trip and provided us with a lot of interesting information

We had a great experience with My Duyen who may be called Alan for non vietnamese speakers. She had a great way of explaining the things and made it a wonderful experience for all of us. The floating Market was interesting and My Duyen made some exclusive looks possible with visiting a vendors ship which is also their home. Furthermore she spoke fluently and clearly so that it was a pleasure to listen to her. We hope to come back someday and meet My Duyen again! Best regards, palle and susann

The tour was very well organized and Vang aka Nelson mandela made sure it did run smoothly. The 2nd morning was extremely early but doing to the very early market was brilliant. The floating market was interesting and then going to the village for a bike ride was also good.
Ele was a really great guide ! He makes us discover very cute gardens and the tresors of Mékong Delta. Really liked it ! I recommend YEAH !!
Ele our Vietnamese guide provided excellent service, with in-depth knowledge of local culture and history, significantly enhancing our travel experience.

tour from Ho Chi Minh City to the Mekong Delta area, guided tour of the areas both by land and by boat, visit to the floating market, all meals included were adequate but above all Ele was an excellent guide, always available, cheerful and excellent company, like all Vietnamese people.
All perfect. We had a very good time with the guide Ele. An experience worth trying, especially for the part of the market on the river

Alex was our guide for this tour and he was brilliant , very informative and showed us the traditional Vietnamese culture, he was very friendly and funny, there was lots to see and we could join in certain activities, plenty to eat an all round amazing trip from beginning to end would definitely recommend this tour

We had a very good and informative guide in Alex Duc, who also helped us with restaurant recommendations outside of the tour. We had great experiences and were able to gain good and unique impressions through him. 2 day-1 night tour was more than worth the money. Good morning - Vietnam Greetings Hans

The tour is informative and entertaining thanks to the tour guide Alex Duc. He tells us a lot about the country and its people, customs and the roles that individual family members have in relation to their status in the family. About supplying the rural population with food, the supply routes for food in Vietnam. At the same time, fishing and its processing were shown directly at the fish market in connection with the wholesale market early in the morning at 4.30 a.m. The landing of live fish, fruit and vegetables and their distribution via moped couriers.

She accompanied us for this superb 2-day tour. It's much more interesting than doing it yourself. In a small, friendly group, 2 boat tours, etc., everything is well organized and unbeatable value for money. 2 busy and pleasant days. Thanks to the team
Two amazing days! The itinerary is organized in a way that you have the chance to see and do a lot of things even though you are only gone two days. Nice guide, good driver.
Ele ist a very good Guide. We enjoyed the tour very much. Lunch was super delicious. Thank you so much. Highly recommend the Tour.

This trip is a great way to see some of the Mekong Delta. Our guide Beo was excellent. He was very engaging and informative and made sure the entire group was enjoying the excursions. All the stops during the trip were worthwhile. Make sure you visit the Can Tho Night Market!
Fantastic experience. Everything very well organised. Alex our guide, was spectacular. If everything was perfect it is above all thanks to him!
Very fun trip! Our guide Alex was very fun and will for ever remember him playing guitar and singing on the boat! Highly recommend this trip!
A really great tour with Kynie. Super interesting stops, great hotel and Kynie was super informative , friendly and welcoming. Highly recommended.

First day full of activities, everything organized very well and, as always, unparalleled kindness! Second day floating market and experience making noodles in a really nice floating house! I advise Thank you Kynie🫰🏽
Excellent trip and the tour gide was very very good.. was a great tour and seen very interesting things would recommend to a friend.
Ele was amazing, learnt a lot about this amazing country. Highly recommend do it and have an amazing time
Unbelievable time ele our tour guide gave us an excellent experience bringing us round all the different areas once in a life time experience
We had a tour with Phufoole and it was a great tour. He took good care of us and gave us a lot of background about the Mekong Delta.

Beautiful tour! There are lots of activities, all very interesting. The guide was great and the hotel booked was wonderful. The times of the various activities are well marked. An unmissable full immersion in the Mekong Delta.

We booked a 2 day tour to the Mekong Delta. The guide Alex Duc knew how to get the relatively small tour group (12 people) excited about the culture and the culinary delights with his friendly, cheerful manner. His knowledge of political but also cultural/religious contexts in particular made the travel times exciting and informative. It was fun with Alex to experience the activities through him (making rice noodles, baking pancakes, tasting coffee, coconut confectionery and liqueur, exploring the area a little by bike). The absolute highlight was visiting the morning market in Can, the lively, working life of the population - that was exciting, but also humbling about how hard people have to earn their money. Very nice tour, highly recommended!

a tour for all ages! Thank you Alex for taking extra time explaining Vietnamese culture to us. We had an excellent time and learned so much from Alex, who showed us many interesting sights and delicious food. We will be back and will recommend to our friends.
Such a fun trip and Alex was a great tour guide! Funny and educational. The stops on the trip were very interesting and we got to see a lot of local activity

The tour includes many different activities and the times between one visit and another are right. The bus is very comfortable and the guide Vinh is very good! The tour is spectacular, truly a fantastic experience!

The whole Mekong-Delta-Tour was awesome, I really loved everything on the trip. I’ve got so many impressions, learned a lot about the local people, the culture, religion, food and different plants. I can highly recommend the tour for everyone. On the first day we visited many different islands, tried fresh honey, had the best coconut candy, delicious fruits and very good lunch with local food. On the second day we got up really early to go to the fishmarket with all the local people, this was really impressive. Afterwards we went on a boot to the floating-market, the sunset on the river was incredible. We also visited some local boats here and had fresh fruits and coffee - which I really liked. Our tourguide Alan (which, by the way, is female) was so sweet and competent. She gave as a lot of interesting information and answered all our questions. I have to admit that this trip was one of the best experiences I had so far. I absolutely loved it. Thank you so much for the great time!

The Cuchitunnel and Mekong River was absolutely fantastic we enjoyed every moment out guide Jason super star was great so kind and big sense of humour provided us a super cool service definitely recommended it every time
Fabulous overnight trip that was well organised and enjoyable. Guide Giau and driver Trong were both excellent and made the trip fun.

This was our favorite tour from our whole 2 weeks Vietnam vacation. Ben our tour guide was the best and gave us a lot of information about the country as well as urged us to try new things during our trip. During the first day of the tour we visited different islands in the Mekong river and the second day the market. I would really recommend this tour and Ben to anyone who wants to discover the southern part of Vietnam.

Blair our tour guide was incredibly funny and engaging and made the trip so enjoyable. We had a jam packed 2 days of seeing parts of the mekong delta we could never have done if we had tried to organise this on our own. Thank you for a wonderful experience!
We did the tour with our guide Harry. It was great with Harry because he speaks English exceptionally well and he made the whole tour very informative.

I recommend the tour- the first day was nice trips to different fruit farms and boat rides to islands and small channels in the river. Can tho was a good night stop and the hotel was very nice. The boats at the floating market were super interesting to see.

This was an amazing experience, 100% recommended! Thuan was the most professional, friendly and knowledgeable guide, super eager to show us the beauty and traditions of the Mekong delta. We loved our tour and we wish we could do another experience with him :)

The whole stay was really great! We saw so many different things and were able to try a lot of things like (cooking, Chinese dough factory, tasting specialties) we saw a lot of different places, all very nice. The guide took the time to explain things to us because my English is very weak! All the activities carried out delighted us, we recommend this experience 100%!

I did the Mekong 2-day tour with Kai and it was amazing. Kai was brilliant, kind and friendly. He made us a wonderful experience in Mekong delta. I’ll miss Vietnam and nice people here a lot. thank you Kai for everything you did for me!

It was an amazing tour with lots of interesting information about culture and people’s life in Mekong delta. A big thanks to Kai, our guide, who made us an unforgettable experience. Will highly recommend!

The two-day trip to the Mekong Delta was very well organized and was led very well by big David with a lot of humor and knowledge.  There were various boat trips and a small cooking class, a cool bike tour and lots of good tips for spending the free evening.  Highly recommended ☺️

Big Dave managed to get our group excited about Vietnamese culture and cuisine. With his pragmatic and friendly manner, he gave us an insight into life and the friendly people in this region. This tour is recommended and the guide is in his element with heart and soul. Thank you!

The trip was amaaaaaazing! Packed with may impressions and activities on the first day already. Our tourguide Eddie welcomed us gently and was very attentive throughout the hole trip. We were able to experience local transportation systems, food and music, and could „take part“ in local businesses. Eddie was very patient with us being fascinated, but kept being organised and made it seem like every activity has been waiting just for us. The program was packed with insights of different kind and Eddie seemed to know an answer to EVERY ONE of our endless questions concerning all kinds of topics (politics,economics,architecture,history etc…) In our case he even helped us by organising a home stay and a separate transport back and made sure we were okay even days after the tour ended. All in all: an amazing trip, made even better by the amazing Eddie !

This was an amazing trip, our tour guide was "Eddie". He was very professional, had great local and historical knowledge while making us feel very welcomed and safe. The stop at the pagoda was great for photos and religious points of interest. While the stops to the islands made for great photos and tasty food stops. In all would highly recommend this trip and would do it again!

Two-day tour with Thuan as guide and Tat Thanh as driver. Driver very skilled and very pleasant to be in the car with him.  The guide could tell us a lot and was also a very pleasant experience! Will definitely plan another outing through this agency again.

I very much enjoyed the 2 day trip, our guide Alex was excellent, very knowledgeable, helpful and funny 😊 the coach was comfortable and air conditioned and the itinerary ran smoothly. It's quite an experience, I'd highly recommend this to anyone visiting Saigon, the Mekong is beautiful and its people are incredibly kind and friendly. The activities were fun and we learned a lot from Alex about the history and culture of the area. The market itself is quite something: the wet market is an overwhelming sight, followed shortly after by the sight of the sunrise over the Mekong, a boat ride to the floating market, buying coffee, fruit and pho from local vendors and then visiting a local village from which we took another boat trip. Definitely check it out, you won't be disappointed!
We really enjoyed the tour! Our guide, Châu, is very competent and make the activities quite enjoyable. The food was tasty and the hotel very comfy :)
Amazing experience in beautiful landscapes! The guide was really nice and available, thank you so much!
Ele is very enthusiastic and welcoming. he speaks very good english and took us on an interesting trip around mekong. highly recommend!

Lan unicorn and Binh. Really good and informative 2 day trip to the Mekong Delta and the floating market from Ho Chi Minh. A well packed program where the evening in Can Tho City is free and gives you the opportunity to explore the city yourself. Large fish market in Can Tho. Would definitely recommend the trip

We had a wonderful trip with our English speaking guide Lan unicorn and Bin, who were well informed and in a good mood. The trip included a boat trip to the floating market, rowing boats, bike rides, coconut production, various tastings, cooking classes, orchards and a nice insight into the daily market for the locals. Really nice trip with different experiences!! A big plus is that you get to see and visit a part of the Mekong Delta that is not so touristy!
We had a great tour with lot of fun activities besides the floating market, which also was great. Our tour guide Bac was fun and made it a great tour. Highly recommend!

Varied program, graced by the excellent guide David with lots of humor and facts. The floating market itself may be a bit overdone , lasts only 1 hour, but all in all definitely worth it with an unannounced mini-cooling class at the end. Program ends in Saigon at 14.00 instead of 17.00, but I found that rather an advantage.
Amazing tour!! Big David was very informative and very funny. I would recommend him to your tour. His English is excellent.
Tour done with the guide Vinh. Very attentive to everyone. The hotel we stayed at is very good, and close to the night market. We enjoyed very much our cooking class food was great.

The experience has been great. Our guide BigDavid has been the best we have had in our whole trip to Vietnam, he is a nice person, joker and gave us many recommendations.  About the activity, I went with my partner and we learned many things. They did a lot of activities and we could see what life is like in the Mekong area. It is worth it if you want to see that area quietly and without being saturated by many tourists.  We will repeat and recommend it to people.

Ele you are a very good guide! Ur laugh brings joy for everyone and ur a very nice and funny guy! Ur english is almost perfect for a vietnamese person! U gotta learn a bit more and its gonna be perfect :)

Last of the large floating markets in the Mekong. Pretty touristy but also very cool!!! 700k for a private boat for about 3 hours. You can just go to the board walk get a ticket. It's standard pricing.

It's a floating market with this fixed location. I saw more than 60 wooden boats, small and big, selling pineapples, durian etc. I am told that they're mostly wholesalers. Some boats were connected, becoming a wider platform where visitors could walk and shop. It's busy early in the morning. I came here at 6am and already busy. It's very intersting to see these boats surviving this crazy era of motorization. It's been here for hundreds of years.

Great morning and nice young fella tour guide, studying tourism, spoke well enough English to have a few hours conversation. Pho and coffee on the river was better than our hotel food. Great to see. nice fresh fruit plate, which filled us all up. All the famy enjoyed this excursion at 6am.

Cai Rang floating market offers a glimpse into a traditional way of life, even if it caters more to tourists now. While the market isn't the same as it once was due to easier land transportation, it's still a worthwhile experience. We arrived at 5:30 am and enjoyed the cool, fresh morning air. Definitely recommend going early to avoid the heat and strong sun! The food options were decent, but the real highlight was the experience itself.
The ticket was 100k and breakfast was 50k

Amazing trip
Absolutely loved this as a family of 4 that love Travel ❤️
A MUST DO when visiting Can Tho.
We did the 6am trip, which was encouraged over 7am, as you see more on the river, the earlier the better.
First we hoped on our small boat, with driver, guide and family of 4.
We went through the narrow canals, which led to the Cai Rang River to then witness the busy waterways of other tourists and floating markets trading.
We were served drinks and pho on the river, how awesome.
Then had fresh fruits on another boat.
We head back down the river to go visit a Traditional Noodle Farm, and how they make Rice Noodles.
The Sun came out and we casually made our way back up the narrow canal to finish our 4hr tour.
Very informative
I am really glad to say I've done this trip as in years to come the floating markets will finish forever  ❤️

Get there whilst you can. Our tour guide said there used to be 15 floating markets, but with the increase of bridges and modern vehicles, there is only 1 left. This market is subsidised by the government yo try and keep it alive. It's certainly an experience worth having a look at.
