Visited at a super quiet time, bonus is we did not have to line up for a single ride. The water park was easy to navigate with a 9 year old ideal for the later half of the day so you are not walking around wet. Pool towel and locker hire available. There isn’t great food variations but enough to manage something simple. Don’t rock up at 9am as nothing opened until 10am and stay for the storybook water show in the evening. Tip. Wear suitable footwear for park and waterpark as the ground is super hot to walk on.

I know in the title I am asking if it is worth the visit. In short if you are visiting Phu Quoc then you should visit. It is not the best or worst Theme Park I have been to. I have been to 3 Theme Parks in Vietnam and in my opinion the other 2 are better. If you have young children then take them to the Aquarium.

Many rides were closed. It is useful to download the app to check what are active. Some rides are only open for 30 min interval.  Our ticket comes with a 350k VND voucher which could only be redeemed in gateway. Somehow it’s so havoc as they take such a long time to ‘check’ our ticket. Waited 30 mins just for this. Buffet was unappetizing here.  Usage of English language overall in the island is very minimal. It is very difficult to ask for anything extra.  Suggested shows : mermaid show, once show lights in evening  Suggested rides : Amazon volcano & Viking river rapids ride.
The best part is the penguins. The cable cars are ok. However, it is far and it seems some shops are closed. I wonder how this hotel can maintain business since there are not many tourists.

В парке три зоны - аттракционы, аквапарк и океанариум. Были семьей с взрослыми детьми (дочь 22 года и сын 17) Про каждую отдельно, потому что очень разные впечатления…. Аттракционы порадовали. Есть и экстремальные - горки, крутилки, и более спокойные (для таких трусих, как мы с дочерью))). Понравились даже детские - стрелялки в замке и «сплав» по речке. Океанариум отличный. До этого были в разных, в том числе в Дубае, было с чем сравнивать. Прикольно посмотреть кормление рыб водолазами. На 2 этаже есть интерактивная зона для детей и игровая. Огромный плюс - помещение кондиционированное, поэтому дважды заходили в течение дня. Аквапарк: тут не удалось всем полноценно провести время. Оказалось что есть ограничения по весу - на одноместном бублике не более 100 кг, на двухместном 160 кг на двух человек. И вообще человека весом больше 100 кг не пустят и на аттракционы где не нужны бублики. Так как билеты покупали у отельного гида, эту информацию узнали только на месте. У нас два человека были больше 100 кг каждый и как раз они хотели бОльшую часть времени отвести на аквапарк…. Было очень обидно! Видимо рассчитано не на европейцев, потому что многие взрослые мужчины и даже подростки которые даже занимаются спортом, весят больше чем 100 кг.

Плюсы: нет очередей, прикольные аттракционы для взрослых и подростков. Минусы: если ваш ребенок ниже 1 метра и 10 сантиметров вас не пустят ни на один аттракцион, еда в парке отвратная и однообразная.

Beatiful theme park but very mismanaged  The place is so beatiful same like Disney . It’s a complete copy of Disney Japan but we had a bad experience with the language and with many many rides not working. And closes the theme park rides and activities at 6-6,30. It was really pathetic to close things so early.  No theme park water world or aquariums close so early. We couldn’t even finish half of it. I feel still the country is not ready for tourists , should have come here after a year.  There were no characters no other fun activities for kids. Most of the food stalls were closed. Would really suggest everyone to visit atleast a year later as phu quoc still is not discovered more and many people don’t know abt it.  I wish I could get get a refund for this.  Otherwise there is no doubt abt it how beautifully it is made.

Хуже чем в Краснодарском крае. Вход стоит 950 000 с человека только парк без канатной дороги и сафари. Полупустой парк не в сезон, на что мы и рассчитывали, но нам приходилось ждать просто так каждый раз по 7 минут... Дальше, в аквапарк платные лежаки! 2 часа, 50. 000 донгов, что??? При том, что детская часть аттракционов вообще закрыта! Меня укачало и мне помогли в медицинском пункте, дали бесплатно 3 таблетки, приношу благодарность за оказанную помощь. Персонал приветлив

The staff there failed to inform about the last call of renting a towel, only mentioning that they closing at 6pm. We even tried to rent the towel before we go in to play but got refused. You guys should at least have a sign or have your staff to inform the guests. Everything else were perfect, sad that all four of us have to leave Vinwonder wet

Visited as part of the combo ticket with the safari, the park looked lovely as we first entered but quickly became apparent that most of the attractions were not working , the water park was nice which was a welcome relief from the heat . We went on the big wheel but the doors failed to close as we went up which was very scary , the staff did reverse the wheel to bring us back down when they realised the doors were faulty and apologised .I wasn’t keen to try anything else that was working after that ! Safari fantastic , Vinwonders not so good .

This place is nice in some areas, but seems to be falling apart, many of the rides are not very well maintained even though the park is quite new. Also the theme of the park is confusing and not very complete. Also some of the rides werent driving at the day we visited. The water park has some nice slides and is great for at hot day.

It’s better to wait until more tourists enter Vietnam. The park had limited options to visit, dining and souvenir shopping were also limited.  The aquarium is a must visit. It has some similarities to the Philippines, and maybe a little smaller than the Monterey Aquarium.  I gave it three stars because the park did not do proper research into some of the displays or performances. The Native American display is very incorrect and historically inaccurate. The performance of the Maya tends to combine dance from Hawaii, Tahini, and Polynesia.  Once the park fully opens it should be fun. Bring water because it gets hot and very humid.

Many rides were closed. Site is very large so a lot of walking is required for not much of a reward. A lot of it seems to have been built just for photo backgrounds for those people who live for that sort of thing (not me). Very hard to get a taxi there at the end of the night so you're at the mercy of the local touts if you need a ride home.

I found this place baffling. There is such a bizarre mix of styles and when we were there, a huge amount of the park was either closed or under construction. We went for the aquarium which was pretty dull. There were also very limited food choices.  The highlights were the big wheel which gave some excellent views and the evening show, which although incomprehensible, was very impressive with its use of the fountains and fireworks.  Had we not gone to the safari park first and come just for this, it would probably be a 2 star review.

Là công viên giải trí được xây dựng theo mô hình các công viên giải trí trên thế giới tuy nhiên ngoài hình thức đẹp thì các trò chơi chưa thật sự hấp dẫn, nhiều khu vực còn đang trong quá trình xây dựng chưa đưa vào phục vụ du khách. Nói chung là thất vọng vì không có nhiều sự lựa chọn để chơi (trừ công viên nước). Nếu bạn có ý định vào đây thì hãy để vài năm nữa khi mọi thứ hoàn thiện.

A lots of amenities still under construction. The tour shuttle is quite infrequent and stopping spot is limited for hot weather. They close after dark, no fireworks. Its an okay amusement park overall.

Phần bố trí xe điện đi Thuỷ cung chưa hơp lý Nên có tour xe điện free di chuyển vòng quanh khu và có một số điểm lên xuống ở các khu chính. Một số nơi (thien duong Bao son - Ha noi) làm phần này tốt hơn nhiều Vinwonder Dịch vụ nghèo làn so với giá vé vào cửa và các trò cho trẻ e o không gian hẹp quá

We had a ticket for Safari and Vinpearl land for the day and can say Vinpearl land is good if you have kids, they have closed a few rides as they are building news ones! Never had to queue for a ride which was odd! But they have a lovely aquarium and the night light show to music is amazing! Definitely worth a trip!
Новая часть парка откроется 30.03.20, а пока по-тихоньку разбирают старый, в парке никого вообще 👍🏼 каруселей немного, аквапарк неприятный , грязноват

Достаточно обзорной экскурсии. Второй раз приехать суда вряд ли возникнет желание. Все развлечения на троечку. Везде громкая музыка, а посидеть и выпить чашечку хорошего кофе негде. Шоу в океанариуме просто отстой, а шоу с фонтанами начинается после заката, когда все организованные экскурсии уже закончены.

Попали мы на экскурсию в Винперл. Экскурсия заняла целый день. Из всего, что мы посмотрели, стоит отметить сафари парк и океанариум. Больше ничего внимания не заслуживает. Был аквапарк, но он ни о чем вообще. Парк развлечений... Тоже делать нечего, особенно в солнцепек. Техника на территории парка практически нет, от зноя спрятаться некуда. Сафари парк просто огонь . Животные не сидят в клетках, что радует. Можно посмотреть тигров, Львов не в каких то клетках, а в заповеднике. Покормить жирафов, слонов, лемуров. В общем, лучше ехать не экскурсией, а дикарём. Потратите полдня, и посетите самый изюм, а не на экскурсию на целый день и много не интересного.

Mid 20s couple, no kids. We purchased the combo tickets with Safari included which also had a free shuttle bus to get you to vinpearl. You don't need tickets to ride the bus and you can buy them at the park ( we got our tickets on klook which also has the bus timetable).  While waiting for the bus, a taxi driver came up and offered us a ride there for 150k dong, we declined and said bus, he laughed.... If this happens to you, take it! The bus was horrendous and it was full by the time we even got to the 5th stop, so the driver just waved and drove past groups of 20 people at the other stops. It's a long drive and you could be standing up the whole time, this resulted in a few people being sick in bags ( heat and motion sickness ).  After getting there we went stayed on the bus and headed to the safari, which was cool but more catered to kids. Half is just a zoo with pretty small sad enclosures but the similar to what you would find in other countries. When heading back from the safari, check all the bus stops, we almost missed the one back to vinpearland and would of had to taxied.  Vinpearland didnt meet our expectations. There where very few rides in the water park and seems a bit outdated with questionable safety measures. But if you've been in vietnam a while now this wont surprise you. However there where no queues and a really cool area for young kids. If you want an awesome flawlessly operated water park go to the aqualand on the small islands in the south at the end of the cable car, well worth the money! Maybe our expectations where to high for vinpearl land after the other water park. The other "land" part of the park was a bit average aswell, definently more set up for younger kids. There was one or two little rides that got our heart racing a little but theres no big rollercoasters or really adrenaline inducing rides.  Long story short, if you've got a young family it will be a well worth while day of fun and no waiting in queues. If youre after a bit more of a fun adrenaline filled day 100% recommend aqualand in the south of Phu Quoc.  But also looks like they are opening up a new big section in april 2020 with some way cooler looking rides.
Was expecting more for what is called amusement park... only about 6 rides and really nothing to do there. 5D and water shows were ok... Best part was the included buffet... lots of options there.

En fin nöjespark, men många stängda åkattraktioner och inte så mycket att göra. Det är mycket som byggs så inom ett år verkar det bli mycket bättre. Har man barn i olika åldrar är inte vattenlandet så roligt - vissa attraktioner måste man väga minst 50kg för att åka, andra ska man antingen vara under eller över 140 cm så syskon i olika längd kan inte åka tillsammans. Missa inte akvariet med spännande fiskar. En orm tycktes inte må så bra dock, den bodde trångt och högg sin egen svans. Game Center med massa gratisspel är också kul!

Покупали комбо-билеты - парк, сафари, кормежка - 970к донгов на взрослого. Были в начале января в новогодние каникулы. Что понравилось: сафари 5-, шоу фонтанов 5, аттракционы 4, зал игровых автоматов 4, еда 4. Что не понравилось: аквапарк 1. Посещение начали с той части, которая Safari - с утра и гулять под солнцем проще, и животные пободрее. Зоопарк интересный, просторный. Если подгадать время, то можно посмотреть, как кормят животных, а некоторых и покормить самому. Часть с сафари забавная, но динамики меньше, чем хотелось бы - стоит автобус в разделительных зонах дольше, чем ездит по самому парку. Минус ставлю за организацию в сафари. Автобус обычный пассажирский - не на всех местах удобно смотреть по сторонам. И наполняли его под завязку, а не только на сидячие места, поэтому в нашем автобусе по старой советской традиции (2/3 в автобусе было русскоговорящих) народ громко посрался из-за сидячих мест. По нашему комбо билету до 13.30 была первая кормежка, кормят только в основной части Land. На обед блюда без выбора, набор был немного странный (за это снимаю бал), но вполне съедобно. Напитки за отдельные деньги. После обеда мы пошли в аквапарк, и тут впечатление о Land испортилось. Система со шкафчиками старая: один подход и ключ на веревочке - это совсем дно. В аквапарке устаревшее оборудование: нет датчиков в трубах, поэтому сотрудник высматривает сам, выехал или нет из трубы человек\группа; подъем ватрушек происходит вручную, и подъемник некольцевой; трубы покрыты желтым налетом, местами напор воды недостаточный. Это общие впечатления от аквапарка, а теперь личная история: неорганизованность и незнание сотрудниками правил аквапарка сильно испортило мое посещение. Я ношу линзы, поэтому водные активности возможно только с использованием плавательных очков. На первом же аттракционе сотрудник попытался заставить меня снять очки. При этом на английском он не говорил, поэтому понять ответ он даже не в состоянии. После 5 минут препирательств он вызвал по рации снизу администратора, которая неспешно поднималась еще какое-то время. Она по английски чуть-чуть говорила, но объяснение, что плавательные очки безопасны, тоже не особо воспринимала. После еще нескольких минут препирательств девушка смилостивилась и сказала: "ок, один раз можете съехать". Мы съехали, и встретили администратора внизу. Я показала ей совершенно целые очки, она меня даже сфотографировала. И мы пошли на следующий аттракцион, там история повторилась - сотрудник опять требовал, чтобы я сняла очки, а я отказалась. Самое увлекательное было в конце посещения аквапарка, когда мы пошли переодеваться - я заметила правила и список разрешенных вещей. Там были плавательные очки!!!!

Аквапарк небольшой, крутых горок нет совсем.  Раздевалок с камерами хранения нет. Есть помещения с душевыми кабинами, где можно принять душ и переодеться в этой кабине. Дальше свои вещи сдаёшь человеку в камеру хранения, которую ты не видишь, он все уносит за стенку🤔. Стоимость услуги 20000 🇲🇦донгов Полотенце дают напрокат за 30000, при этом еще берут залог 150000 донг. Если едешь с отеля лучше взять свои.  Из горок, пара больших где возможно кататься только четвёртом или парой, по одному нельзя. Есть комплекс город, где можно кататься по одному на открытых или в закрытых горках(на матрасе или без него). Конечно как же без ленивой реки и места для малышей и подростков.  Лежаков в зоне горок и бассейна для деток на всех не хватит, а они только там. С местами общепита также все не очень.  Но есть надежда, что все будет лучше. С больших город видно, что строится что то интересное.  По стоимости: посещение на 1 человека ростом выше 140 см(считается взрослым) составляет 500000 🇲🇦 донгов. Если хотите съэкономить, то лучше купить общий билет с посещение сафари парка, так будет стоить: 650000 сафари+250000 Vinpearl Land(аквапарк и парк развлечений). Но посетить это необходимо в один день. Такие билеты мы покупали в сафари парке, наверное тоже самое предлагают и в самом Vinpearl Land.

My family and I visited Vinpearl Land Phu Quoc and had a nice time. There were virtually no lines for the amusement park side. We felt the rules were a little overly cautious as some seemingly tame rides my daughter wasn't tall enough to ride. That said, she had a blast riding the rides she could. She loved the small roller coaster and the bumper cars.  We were very impressed with the aquarium. It probably could have been a bit cooler (the aircon wasn't working that well), but besides that, the animals were all well taken care of and we were impressed with the exhibits. My daughter loved the mermaid show. Just a tip- get there early to ensure you have secured your seats for the show.  The water park was fun as well, but the locker rooms were pretty gross. Make sure you bring shower shoes. Also, bring your own towels. We had to pay a 150,000 VND deposit for each towel and then another fee for the towel that was non-refundable. They also have lockers you can rent which was helpful to keep our things secure. My daughter loved the lazy river, but it didn't have much of a current. There were tons of slides and other things to do. It's perfect for children.  One big tip I have is not to expect a ton of eating options at the park. There was only one functioning restaurant the day we came. It was a Lotteria and although it wasn't terrible, the food was OK and the lines were long given it was the only place to eat.  All in all, it was a fun experience and I recommend going if you are on the island with children.

I get the bad reviews written on here as I agree with all the points, however I went in with low expectations and found this park quite an enjoyable day out with the kids. There isn’t a great deal of rides, the food choices are limited, it is a little run down and they are quite strict at the waterpark. They are building a new section of the park which will be open in 2020 so hopefully that addresses some of the issues already mentioned.
Some of the height restrictions and rules are a bit over the top, but I guess it’s for your own safety.
I feels like an abandoned theme park as it’s so vast. There are a couple of rides not working and you can see weeds growing out of them. They need to be removed and replaced with something else.
Overall we did have fun in this park. Management need to address the issues which quite a few people mention in the reviews to make this place more enjoyable. A little maintenance wouldn’t go astray - replacing rusty fences, old rides etc
If you are staying nearby, definitely take a look.

Итого, что мы имеем на 13 ноября 2019 года: 1. Расписание работы парка в брошюре не соответствует действительности. Парк закрывается в 20.00. 2. Расписание автобусов на транспаранте так же, не соответствует действительности, выдают бумажки с расписанием, примерный интервал движения, раз в 1,5 часа. 3. Шоу дельфинов закрыто. 4. Один аттракцион Кондор не работает. 5. Парк выглядит уныло, как будто я у себя в городе в ЦПКиО пришла в будний день. Аттракционы выглядят потрёпанными, то ли на металле так сказываются климатические условия, то ли им правда тыща лет! Но из-за всей этой обстановки, ощущение забытости и заброшенности. 6. В аквапарке не очень удобно в зоне переодевания, по сути это просто душевые кабинки, и когда у тебя стоит вопрос о переодевании из 100500 вещей в купальник, отсутствие лавочки и банальной полки под вещи удручает, так как есть всего 3 маленьких крючка с которых все сваливается. 7. Для детей подростков достаточно не плохая детская зона. Малышам тоже достаточно, а вот для взрослых не очень весело если вы приедете в семейном составе. Дело в том что горок всего 5 видов, и с 2-х из них кататься можно только на ватрушке для 4-х человек. Но модно легко найти «попутчиков». 8. Водная река не работает. 9. Неплохие ком-то обеды по 120-140 тыс донгов. 10. Мало народа, можно сказать вообще ни кого! Это очень большой плюс! 11. Хороший аквариум с рыбами. 12. Хороший зал с игровыми автоматами. 13. Чисто на территории. 14. Очень красивое и трогательное шоу Музыкального Фонтана! Мне очень понравилось!  Парк расширяют, это хорошо видно с колёса обозрения. Новые горки аквапарка, ещё аттракционы, замки. Через год или чуть более, будет интереснее. Сейчас для тех кто впервые посещает парк такого рода, вполне сойдёт.  Рекомендую к посещению, но после того как будет завершено строительство новой зоны, сейчас цена не оправдывает впечатления.

1. I accompanied with my younger cousins (teens) were so excited to visit Vinpearl Land Phu Quoc 'cause we like to play at water park area and amusement playgrounds. However, we were a bit unsatisfied that some of us were not allowed to access to the water slides due to their height restriction. We would appreciate if Vinpearl Land Phu Quoc could provide more slides for teens and adults. There are no thrilling rides like roller coaster. At the present, I think this is a destination for only family with kids. 2. We honestly loved dolphin & mermaid shows, as well as free shuttle buses that could take us from the town center to the park and vice versa.

We’re staying at the adjoining Vinoasis. So at 9am took a free shuttle across. Master 2 was free and for the 2 adults and Miss 4 it worked out to the equivalent of about $100AUD. We were a little hot and bothered but there’s plenty of shade in the amusement area. Our kids enjoyed the freedom of quiet rides - so got onto teacups, carousel, flying bees then enjoyed the indoor play area and the aquarium and the mermaid show. Our kids then loved the toddler splash area and lazy river. We managed to spend from 9am - 2pm before heading back to our hotel. It was a entertaining way to spend the morning. They are clearly working on building a lot more rides etc. but your a bit trapped on the north end of the island in terms of places to eat and enjoy. I think the Vi pearl land at Nam Hoi An was looking in better shape and more to do when we visited last August. But worth the visit if you have kids and are in this part of the world.

Sympa pour les enfants avec le water park. Mon fils avait un tshirt de bain, on lui a refusé de faire du toboggan si il ne l'enlevait pas, mais a cote notre fille qui avait aussi un tshirt, ça na posé de problème a personne. Pareil il a 9 ans il veut faire un toboggan moins impressionnant on lui refuse et on l'envoie au toboggan quil ne voulait pas faire Parc un peu vide mais mais ca va pas de queue a faire . Mes enfants ont appréciés le cinéma 5D, moi un peu moins, ils ont apprécié l'aquarium et le spectacle. Apres le safari cest sympa. Par contre manger la bas cest vraiment cher, pas beaucoup de choses à vendre comme des paquets de gâteaux. Mes enfants ont quand même bien apprécié le parc, cest un parc pour les enfants Ils ont été effrayés par les nonnes.
Big theme park...especially the aquarium with a lot of species....dolphin show ...wet park quite nice too
Quá nhỏ và quá ít trò chơi so với vinpearl land NHA TRANG, đu quay thấp ko cao và to như nha trang, game trong nhà cũng rất ít game, ko có trò chơi lái xe trượt trên đồi
빈펄에 묵으신다면 가볼만 하지만 굳이 찾아올 정도는 아닌것 같습니다. 사람이 북적이지 않습니다. 빈펄랜드를 경험하고나니 놀이공원의 즐거움에 기다림의 즐거움도 있었다는것을 깨닫습니다.

If you're staying down that end of Phu Quoc with kids it is worth a visit - but not worth planning a holiday around.  A big problem for us was that most rides and slides required you to be 140cm or over. Our 6 year old struggled to find rides/slides that were fun for her. They were all for little kids or big kids with nothing in between for that 6 to 8 year old group.  Dolphin show was fun. Aquarium is pretty good. Shark feeding was a bit dull. Mermaid show was okay.  Rides seemed well maintained. Slides in the water park are looking a bit old and rusted and stained.  Very few food options.  So - all up there was fun to be had - but we had a 6 year old who LOVES water parks and rides and she was ready to go after a couple of hours. That probably sums it up.
정말 더웠다..지쳤다..낮에다니기 힘들어 그냥 돌아왔는데 다음날 다시 가보지를 못해 아쉽다 다시한번 가보고 싶다 ...빈펄랜드

We visited this park while staying at Vinoasis.Has a great water park with plenty of slides and attractions for families.... it was exceptionally quiet with hardly any rides open and many shops closed. The aquarium is well worth a visit many different varieties of fish , reptiles and a few penguins.

We experienced mixed feelings about this park. We were disappointed by the water park part of this. You need four people for the more adult rides, and since we are a couple and the park wasn't full with other couples, we simply could not enjoy this. (this felt like wasted money). We were also disappointed by the food/snack/beverage options. You're not allowed to bring food from outside so our options were very limited and not very healthy. On top of that we were unable to find coffee in any snack kiosk. Apparently it is served somewhere we couldn't find. The aquarium part is excellent. Plenty of sea creatures that seemed well kept. Although the penguins did look a bit sad with their small habitat. All the other animals seemed nice and healthy. The aquarium was beautiful. The water show was absolutely spectacular and probably our favorite of the day. All the rides were really fun and since they were no lines, we thoroughly enjoyed them. The staff is very friendly too. The 5D show was meh. Probably a nice experience for little kids more than adults. Unfortunately our sits were broken so we did not experience the full effect (we did move sits in the middle of the show). We also enjoyed the arcade. So overall, the aquarium, and rides were ok. The water show is great. The water park not so great. The food options, a disappointment. I hope they allow people to bring their own snacks.

The only good thing is no need to queue so long for every activities. Some staff very lazy and don't want to carry the tool for our water park activities. The shutter bus almost can send to museum due to it's condition. Bath/ Changing room lack of facilities as well. They provide free video gaming but you will get very sweat due to no air condition inside the video game room and we bought many drinks there due to replenish our sweat. If you really no place to visit, you can consider to pay visit due to many sexy men and ladies inside the water part. Otherwise can visit some where else.

It's a Vietnamese version of Disneyland, oh yeah throw in a water park along with it. The park is on an island and gives you a choice of either getting there via a cable car or a speedboat. The amusement park is quite large and you could spend no of days there. The place although does not cater for infants there were no parents room. Heaps of restaurants, souvenir shops etc. Recommend planning for at least a 2day visit.

Парк понравится посетителям с детьми А вот взрослым будет скучновато - нам хватило одного посещения на все горки. С колеса обозрения хороший вид на прилегающую территорию, а также на потрясающие закаты - в марте они примерно в 18:13 Шоу с дельфинами, если честно, нам не понравилось - было жалко животных. которые живут в несоответствующих для их размера аквариумах и вынуждены изощряться за еду. А вот шоу фонтанов достойно внимания. Но рекомендую не садиться на нижние ряды амфитеатра, т.к. по ходу представления вас будут орошать водой. Важно: парк развлечения работает до 21:00, но большинство аттракционов закрываются уже в 20:00

The park offers a lot of different types of entertainment, but generally speaking most of them seem to cater to children. The rides are not so blood boiling. The aquarium has a nice selection of species, but the building and the tank itself are a bit outdated. On the flip side, the waterpark is fun and the dolphin show is by far the best attraction. The staff is very kind and helpful, and the due to the location, chances are the weather will be amazing during your visit. It is most likely a fun day out for a family with children but for adults, it should be good for just a couple hours.

Theres little info about showtimes in the park. dolpinarium has no time schedule. 5d movie theater hasnt got any info about the movies. Staff barely speak english if you try to adk thede things. They understabd basics: when yo buy something or they welcome you, but thats it.. some spoke also russia as for many in the island. Which was wierd because i dont. Indoor gaming hall was quite nice since you get to play free. Downside is that half of the machines are broken and had been shut down. Amusement park was nice, very few people going on there. On somepoint thought the place was closed when none of the machines where running (at 4pm) it was just that there werent any people. Go there on the morning when the shows are on.  Waterpark was nice. If you dont wana slide alone you need 4 people to slide down the pipes with rafts. They will put you with strangers if necessary (4 is minimum)

Vinpearl Amusement Park is no Disney World ! Ok the water park is good for the kids, the rides are very average, the only thing worth going for is the Aquarium which was great. The shuttle busses from the Safari Park to the Amusement Park are shocking, need more, long waits, everyone pushing and shoving. Over priced ! Would not go again.

Судя по составу отдыхающих ( регионы Россия и Китая), а также по их восторженным отзывам, ибо кроме областного парка отдыха ничего и не видели - может создаться иллюзия прекрасного места. Однако это - я бы сказал отрыжка европейских и американских аналогов " Диснейлендов". Аквапарк - ну три горки для взрослых, и все баллон рассчитан на посадку 4 х человек. Это создает ряд проблем, так как приходится играть в кооперацию и это весьма неудобно. Одиночные спуски выстроины под неправильным углом наклона и люди постоянно застревают, я застрял аж 2 раза ( на горке- нормально?). Полотенца и хранение вещей- за отд.деньги. Парк. Ну все грустно. Аттракционы примитивны, не захватывающие( но, для Вьетнама круто видимо), "большие" горки и еще парочка- не работают. Один мне правда понравился- но он такой, тошнотворный слегка, круг вращающийся и скользящий вперед- назад. Колесо обозрения высокое, кабинки полностью закрытые - мне не понравилось, видов нет носью, да и днем думаю тоже. Океанариум на троечку ( если нигде раньше не были- понравится). Шоу дельфинов не видел, ибо оно в самую жару проходит, в 14.00, для посещаемости видимо ( ибо в адекватных парках - это с утра происходит, и не раз). А здесь все по одному разу. Шоу фонтанов. Без вопросов - красиво. Своебразно, менее маштабно конечно чем в Лас- Вегасе, но неплохо. Особенно третья песня. Вся продолжительность 18 минут. Еда. Попкорн, мороженое, вода. Видел две кафешки, в одной брал лапшу - пиво, да недорого- фастфуд. Народу было мало. Меньше половины трибун , человек 200- 300. После шоу - все и уехали практически. Время 19.30 . Общий вывод - на один раз, если совсем занятся нечем ( а здесь реально нечем). Но, видевшие Дисней в Париже например - будут СИЛЬНО разочарованы. 😁. Второй раз я не поеду- факт!

Сравнивать с Винперлом в Ня чанге нельзя.Это просто луна-парк с водными горками.Главное-нет пляжа у моря.Пляж есть, но он для гостей отеля.Повезло, что в праздничные дни перед новым годом ходил бесплатный автобус, но мест в нем мало, а объявление о его остановке у храма недалеко от ночного рынка надо написать поярче и поднять повыше.Повезло, что на ресепшене отеля все говорили на английском и все объяснили. Понравился только аквариум и дельфины. Ради пингвинов надо ехать! Они там ухоженные, ЭНЕРГИЧНЫЕ,летают как птички (во всех местах где я была они вялые и просто стоят без движения).Рыбки цветные плавают по полу...Видно, что кто это организовал, то вносят придумки как интереснее показать обитателей. Но вообще посещение дорогое.На наши деньги 1500 руб. В моем городе я бы заплатила 500руб. и до 20 часов.Тут же ты связан автобусом (он до 16 часов).Но в них чисто, кондиционер мощный, ходит четко по расписанию. В Доминикане, например, еще был этнопарк, в Ня чанге есть пагода. Я бы с удовольствием посмотрела вьетнамские танцы. Или бы выступления животных. А так:карусели, покатушки с горок, магазины и ВСЕ!Но радовала ЧИСТОТА.Ура!!!Надоело за неделю ходить мимо гор мусора, то быстрее СЮДА. Но вид с колеса обозрения немного удручает:опять какие то стройки, рытвины и пр.По пятибальной системе этому парку ставлю 3+...

Парк маленький, чистый. Взрослым там и подросткам там конечно не очень интересно. Он больше для маленьких. Но есть и несколько"+" для подростков: атракцион "машинки"(я со своим сыном там часа 3 зависала 🎉🎉🎉), зал игровых автоматов, карусель на цепочках). Это пожалуй и все. Есть конечно и водная часть, но мы там не были т.к. там мелко. А вот денег за вход берут как за большой полноценный аквапарк с аттракционами.

In the water park some slides only useable for 4 pax. Nobody understands a word in English. I mean, I don’t expect them to undermine everything but not even the sentence “where is the toilet”?? That was painful....but that’s something we had to experience in the whole are in Phu Quoc.  No sugar free drinks or healthy options available in the park. Yes water was available but the rest of the drinks only sugar +++ Waiting time for fast food is 30 minutes and we were the only guests.....  The rest was okayish. Really well maintained greenery and it was clean, at least when we were there. Toilets, restaurants etc. All in good condition. But there were also no crowds at that time. Don’t know hoe the standard will be next time. The lockers: this concept sucks! Sorry but charging 10k every time when you need your bag is disgusting. And the worst part is that you don’t even see where they put your bags. It’s behind the front desk and you can’t even see where your bag is put in. I’ve been in so many water Parks and everywhere you put your bag inside and lock it on your own. And you pay a fee for the whole day.  It’s a small amusement park, don’t expect Disney Land, but hey if you want Disney land don’t go to Phu Quoc. This is small island in Vietnam and for this poor area it’s a big thing. All in one said: if you need a small change while your stay and your budget is not too tight do it. At the end with our entrance fees we support this area and some of these poor guys can have a job. As long as you are the customer you are still on the brighter side of life!

Very extraordinary feeling when You are almost the only client, no queues. Slides nor the amusement park were not top quality but worth one day visit. Aquarium had plenty of fishes and other creatures to see, maybe having penguins in places like this is already too much...

Having been to PhuQuoc we decided to visit this park. The weather was wonderful but the park was almost empty, initially we were surprised but later we understood why it was that way. The water attractions were great, but when we tranferred to carousels it turned out that 3 of them were not available due technical reasons. From the first site it was evident that equipment is very old, they look after territory, its quite cosy around but they don't input money into euipment. This park is not worth this money 500vnd.To sum up I wouldn't recommend this park for visiting.

Visited Vinpearl Land with my wife Joanna a couple of weeks ago and reckon more people have been to the moon than were at this place.  The waterpark is pretty decent and has some great rides. But as other reviews have stated you need 4 people to get on the good ones which proves difficult.  The theme park has no thrill rides. It's pretty much for kids. Was strange being the only couple on each ride. I wouldn't recommend the dodgems, not much to dodge!!  If you like aquariums then you'll probably like this one. The main part with the tunnel is spacious but most of the tanks were far too small with too many fish. Send the penguins back home... seen bigger fridges in supermarkets!  Ordered a chicken burger in the burger place. Waited a long time for the fast food. Received a bun with little fatty stringy nuggets in it. Bring a packed lunch.  Limited fun for couples. Lots of fun for young families of 4 or more.  If a tree falls in Vinpearl Land does it make a noise????

We visited Vinpearl land last week, as the weather was cloudy and not much else to do.  It was 500,000VND per person, which included a free shuttle there and back.  The whole place was really empty but was huge and all very spread out. It was really clean and the slides and rides were all really fun!  Some of the big water slides you need 4 people, which is annoying when there is 2 of you.  We stayed for around 3 hours and had fun, but it was so empty that there wasn’t much of a buzz.

This theme park was ok. The rides were ok, however as it was quiet season when in the waterpark we spent most of our time searching for strangers to go with us on rides as most required 4 people. Something desperately needs to be done about the floors as they got incredibly hot and were very hard to walk on. The aquarium was pretty cool, however I understand what another reviewer said about the small tanks some of the animals are kept in, especially some of the reptiles. Would be a fun place to take children ages 5 and up. Vego food options very limited.

It was close to our hotel so we gave it a go. The water park was a lot of fun, and it became great when there was a sudden downpour. I was the only person on the tornado ride, but it needed four to work. So all three of the guys running the ride jumped on and rode with me. NO ONE WAS RUNNING THE RIDE FOR 3 MINUTES. Truthfully, it was a legit downpour, so it wasn’t as issue. The dry part of the park was a bit boring, and many of the better rides were closed down. We waited for the dolphin show for twenty minutes, but it didn’t start because the sea lion wouldn’t get out of the premises. They asked everyone to leave in order for the sea lion to calm down. Whatever, we left. Not a bad diversion, but not great either.

A few positives: we bought our tickets through Klook.com and only paid ₫ 1,340,000 for 2 x Adult, 1 x Child (Height 100cm-140cm), this included a free shuttle bus transfer from our Hotel (tou can check the bus schedule for pick-up and drop-off points) The facilities were all clean & the food at Lotteria was good and very cheap, Negatives: Family activities for kids btw 1-1,4m tall is very restricted- as only small kids is allowed to go down the “kiddies” supertubes and only kids taller than 1,4m can use the rest of the slides, so except for the lazy river there is no joint family fun. The staff are painful in enforcing these rules, no consideration is given to the ability of the kids, i.e. the fact that they are actually good swimmers even though they are not 1,4m tall. Kids/ nobody is allowed to wear sunglasses or even swimming goggles when going down any slides, which really doesn’t make sense as many kids does not like the chlorine water burning their eyes. Lastly some of the slides are getting old with rough edges, my son got a bad cut and scratches on the “big” yellow slide in the childrens pool. Overall, very frustrating experience due to painful staff that can’t understand or speak English and unreasonable rules.

it’s a beautiful place for family and couples or even solo to spend a day in adrenaline gushing! the rides most of them is well maintain (except for 2 rides was not operated on the day I visited due to maintenance stuff”) and maybe since it’s weekdays, there’s no queue for the games. we spent lunch at jinggu bbq and the staff is really helpful, some of them speak English well and we are so happy about it. on the other hand the water park is kinda disappointing if u come in small group of 2 or lesser, most of the rides needs 4 person to play. other than that, the toilet is clean and it’s good environment for family to hang out

We had a free entry pass, which we thought would be for the day, but it wasn’t we could not leave and return, which was very disappointing as we would have liked to visit in the evening. Most of the rides only allow 1.3m or 1.4m high on them, this includes the water park. And 2 of the rides in the water park needed to have 4 people over 1.4 to go in them which ruled most families out. The food near the entrance is a quarter of the price of offical park food. We had a great day there but with a 5 & 7 yr old we had to keep saying they could not go on things which was disappointing. If I had paid the full gate price it would have been terrible.
Mất vé vào cổng 500k, nhưng không có quá nhiều điều đáng giá. Nhiều trò chơi bảo trì, cơ sở hạ tầng đang xuống cấp, hoạt động hoạt náo không hấp dẫn.
For future information outside the galaxy hotel is the vinpearl bus stop. No one at our hotel told us where to go or had a clue what we were saying.
Chúng tôi hơi thất vọng . Hơi ít trò chơi hơn so với vinpearl land nha trang. Chất lượng Film 5D quá tệ.

Gratis shuttlebusser fra de fleste steder på øen. Der var kun os og en familie mere på vej derop i hele bussen som i øvrigt var helt ny - meget komfortabel. Vinpearl land er som et mini Disney World, men dog meget mindre og mere asiatisk. Der er rent og pænt. Der var stort set ingen mennesker under vores besøg så der var aldrig kø til forlystelserne. Der er en gratis spille-arkade som var et kæmpe hit hos vores børn - dog fungerede kun ca 1/3 af spillene. Badelandet er super fint med nogle fede rutsjebaner - de er dog meget strikse med højdekravene - generelt er der mest for folk over 140cm. Fontæne-showet var det flotteste vi har set nogensinde. Akvariet er flot - dog mange fisk ifht størrelsen af akvarierne. Vi nåede ikke Safarien - brugte 7 timer på alt det andet. Alt i alt en solid 3’er. Der mangler en del for at komme højere op til lignende steder i Europa.

We went with another family to Vinpearl Land overall it was enjoyable as the kids had a great time at the waterpark and on the rides in the amusement park but if we were a couple with no kids I would not bother as there is not much to do. The park itself is quite large but there seem to be large gaps of nothing. The waterpark the kids enjoyed but there were some odd rules. We got to the top of the stairs of one ride only to find out it had a weight restriction. Our friends son weighed 49 kilos and had to be 50 so he was not allowed on the ride. This would have been helpful to know at the bottom of the stairs instead of the top. There was only the one ride where you are weighed which was strange as some of the other rides were way more intense than this one. You can also be too tall for a ride. This happened to the kids on two occasions but just after they were told no on one of the tube rides an adult male bigger than the kids went down the same ride. On one slide the boys were told they could not wear rashes but the girls could. Main thing is the majority of the rides are four people only so groups are best at this attraction. The lazy river is GREEN and not appealing at all. The brochure and other adverts show it as clear blue but not sure what year those were taken. The aquarium was ok but not overly exciting. Tanks for some fish are quite small. Went into the amusement games area I think it was called the fun zone or something like that but had to leave because the B.O stench was overwhelming. If there was aircon it was definitely not working. All in all for a group it is not s bad place to pass a few hours. Also note that amusement park entry fee is based on height not age. If you have a tall 9 year old they will be charged as an Adult.

We had spent the morning in the safari and as part of the combo ticket headed to ‘theme park’ in the afternoon. It was so quiet with most of the tourists arriving in the park about 4-5pm. The whole children’s part was closed but that didn’t matter to us. However the 3 big rides we could only go on one but we got stuck every time as the other two you need 4 people to ride in the 4 person dingy. Why we couldn’t just use a double person dingy I don’t know? Luckily we found a couple in need of another couple to ride the slides so we did them once each.  The aquarium was really nice but some of the tanks were way too small for the fish which was a little sad.  The indoor games were cool and all free to play so we spent half an hour in there.  The ‘rollercoasters’ are pretty tame and we were the only ones on them each time.  The fountain show was nice but only lasted over 10 minutes instead of the 25 on the schedule.  If you’re getting the bus back to Duong Duong town make sure you get the 19:40 if not you have to wait until 21:10!!!
Roligt vattenland för äldre barn eller unga vuxna, akvariumet var väldigt sorgligt djuren såg/var helt döda och deprimerade simmade runt och runt i det minimala akvarium tråkigt och hemskt och se!

Went there on a Monday so it was pretty Empty, felt like one of those famous people who rent out the whole of Disney so it was a tad boring being the only ones on the ride. Shouldn't complain since there is no line for anything. The rides were okay, a bit tame which is fine. The staff were nice and helpful.  The water park of this theme park was a bit disappointing. It was super hot, the ground literally burnt our feet off. Some rides need 4 people so we couldn't go on them and as there wasn't lines for anything it wasn't like we can join another available couple. The wave pool was a big disappointment haha we waited and waited for the wave to pick up when it was turned on. It was very mediocre.  The aquarium part was actually quite pleasant and cool inside if you want to get away from the heat. For some you wish they had bigger tanks for the massive fishes it looked pretty cramped.

So, the entrance fee is 600,000 dong. The place was more or less deserted for most of the day. The water park was ok. Would be great if you have kids, def worth the entrance then. Some of the slides are 4 persons only? Which as couples is not ideal, otherwise a good few hours can be spent here. The theme park has no real theme. Lame rides from an age gone by. But again, if the demographic is 8-13 yr olds, ideal. The food and drink here is cheap, and the musical fountain show at 7pm is well worth the wait. There are indoor games, included, giving some shade and rest, and the aquarium was good and poor. By this, I mean the poor reptiles were kept in such small enclosures :-( My suggestion is get a combo ticket, so the safari in the morning 3-4 hours, then come to VP land.

Huvipuistossa oli aika vähän laitteita. Turvarajat olivat tiukat ja esimerkiksi keinukaruselliin piti olla yli 130cm pitkä. Moni laite vaati 140cm pituuden. En kuitenkaan suosittele puistoa pelkästään aikuisille, koska yli 140cm laitteita oli vain muutama. Vesipuisto oli kiva lisä. Siellä erikseen iso alue pelkästään lapsille. Kokonaisuutena ihan ok kokemus. Hinta turhan kallis.

This is a great place for kids and adults. The rides and games were included in the entrance fee. If you like a particular ride, you can go for it again and again but you will need to get back in the queue.  The amusement park is pretty big so lots of walking is required like any other parks.  In the park there is a section for water park. The water were not very clean but acceptable.  The only gripe I have is that smoking is allowed in the park. Smoking should not be allowed where the one of the designs of the park is children focused.

We bought the combo ticket with the Vinpearl Safari (which was fantastic) but was a little disappointed with the Theme Park.  Our main reason for buying the combo ticket was the Safari but when we saw there was a water park we thought after a few hours in the baking sun it would be fun to cool down.  A lot of the water park was run down and in a poor state of repair. I think it might appeal to older kids (we were there with a 3 & 5 year old) but the only area we could really enjoy had freezing water. Even on a 30 degree day we all felt cold in this water.  Once we exited the water park we found most of the other rides were shut or one member of staff was controlling 3 rides.  Overall the combo ticket was decent value for money but I wouldn't go out of my way to return to Vinpearl Land.

Super fint vandland med nogle fede vand-rutschebaner - men man skal være over 140cm til de bedste, og personalet er mega strikse!  Resten af parken er okay men igen skal man være 140cm til nogle af de bedste.  Havde begge vores børn været 140cm, så havde det fået 4 stjerner.  Der var ikke mange mennesker, så spildte ikke meget tid på kø (og gratis bus fra hotel og hjem igen).

As a couple it wasn’t worth our time. A few of the rides required 4 people and the place was practically deserted when we went which is great for children who want to keep riding the same rides or experience others as there were NO QUEUES, but not good for us when we needed to find 2 more people for the four person water slide rides, the restaurant food was very, very average and there is such a better example of Western and Vietnamese cuisine around Phu Quoc compared to this. Rides seemed fairly old. There’s a surfer wear shop if you need to buy swimmers or surf wear but it’s very overpriced and expensive. Other shops are expensive or have things no one wants. Free shuttle bus to town which was good. This place needs a revamp.

Non è grandissimo ma le vasche regalano molte emozioni . Pesci piccoli e grandi e show nella vasca più grande con Nettuno e due sirene orientali che nuotano tra gli abitanti naturali delle profondità marine. A sorpresa , e senza motivo, è apparso anche Babbo Natale tra gli squali, a gennaio. Tutto molto surreale ma divertente. Consigliato a tutti , non solo per l'acquario, ma anche per il parco acquatico e le altre attrazioni.

Det ble en tur på stedets fornøyelsespark. Her var vi helt klart utenfor sesong. Glissent med besøkende, tomme is kiosker og flere karuseller uten bemanning.  Vannforestillingen på kvelden var likevel verdt inngangsbilletten.

We arrived by the gates at 11 o'clock, by taxi from Long Beach Center - 276k VND. Inside we were almost alone, with only a few other families spread out in the park. Since we were a bit peckish, we decided to start out with a bite to eat. There's a burger joint near the castle, right hand side at the end of the 'shopping street'. We spent nearly 45 minutes waiting for two cheese burgers, a chicken burger, and a fish burger, and when we got our food, it was not warm. Not even lukewarm. Cheese hadn't melted. The two cheese burgers were not alike, and the fish burger had mysterious chewy bits in it. The chicken burger had fatty, grizzly bits. We were really, really disappointed. The aquarium was great, and close to being worth the entry fee alone. I must admit I really like fish and aquariums. The underwater tunnel was great! There were no foul odors in the reptile department, and that's kind of an achievement. The outdoor attractions were OK, I guess. The kids like it. We took a few rides, but avoided the ferris-wheel, because of the heat. The absolutely mind-numbingly worst part, was the free gaming arcade. The sound levels were deafening, and must surely be hazardous to the heroic people who work there. Yes, it's free, but a lot of the machines aren't turned on, or working at all. Again, the kids liked it, but to me, male 42, it was HELL. Luckily, there are benches outside, where the German emo-rock emanating from the not functioning drummer game, just barely reach you. We didn't try the aqua park, and know nothing about it.

Мы поехали с мужем самостоятельно, недалеко от теля Gaia курсирует бесплатный автобус. Карусели включают даже для одного человека, а вот почти все горки аквапарка для взрослых предполагают вместимость в шлюпки от 4-х человек. Чтобы прокатиться ты должен найти желающих. Мой муж долго искал их, потому что посетителей крайне мало. Приехали китайцы, благодаря чему с ними он смог прокатиться по разу на горках. При этом уже к вечеру у него случилось расстройство желудка - наглотался этой воды ... два дня лечили, ничего не ел. Аквариум понравился. Однако дельфинарий не работал. Часть развлечений тоже не работала (о чем узнали после оплаты билета в 500 000 донгов на 1 чел). Покушать на территории негде. Только вода бутылочка 0,5 стоит 15 000 донгов, кола фанта и мороженое.

Ấn tượng nhất là khu công viên nước rất hoành tráng và nhiều trò chơi. Khu thủy cung cũng rất đẹp.
Còn về điểm trừ chắc là khoảng cách từ khu Vinpearl land đến trung tâm thị trấn của đảo Phú quốc hơi xa.

Gia đình tôi đến Vinpearl Land vào buổi chiều sau khi tham quan Safari. Không gian ở đây cũng rộng với nhiều trò chơi hiện đại, tôi đánh giá cao hệ thống thủy cung với các tiết mục biểu diễn nàng tiên cá, cho cá mập ăn, tiếc là thời điểm này sân khấu nhạc nước đang sửa chữa nên không thể trải nghiệm. Nên đầu tư thêm các nhà hàng, quán cafe với menu đặc sắc hơn. Ngoài ra, khi mua bất kỳ món nào cũng được tích điểm vào thẻ Vin ID (tuy nhiên nhân viên không hỏi khách hàng có thẻ để tích điểm).

We went here when we were staying at Vinpearl Resort. We were disappointed with the price, although our 9 year old son loved amusement park (except for being a bit disappointed that he didn't quite meet the 140cm height minimum on quite a few of the rides (he was 135cm). It looks great. We enjoyed the amusement arcade (Games Castle) where all games were part of the price. The aquarium was good, nothing overly special though. The waterpark was ok. The best part for me was the wave pool. Again our 9 year old was too short for most of the rides. We loved the Zulu dancers outside the waterpark at 5pm (I think) for half an hour daily. We had a 3 day pass which made our son happy, but overall I think it needed more - more exciting rides. The great thing was that we didn't have to wait for the rides as it was pretty quiet there.
Go there if you have to and you are looking for some action for your young ones. It is quite small with a limited selection of rides.

I took my 10y/o and my 13 y/o to the amusement park/pools/aquarium today. Left all our pool stuff in the locker ( 10,000 VD) and headed for the rides first. Not as many rides as we expected, but nice rides, suitable for both the daring and the faint-hearted. We did have great fun here. We were pretty impressed with their aquarium, not very big, but very clean, with a very wide variety of fish and reptiles. We did take our time watching all the amazing forms of life there. The whole family agreed that this is way better than the sad London Aquarium we visited last year( the saddest traveling experience so far in our family) lol There's a display of penguins, too. Pool time next, we headed for the lockers to get our pool gear. Now beware, every time you check out your stuff from the locker, once you want to put it back in, you have to pay again the fee( which is not much, but you might want to consider what you need to have on you while enjoying the pools). We decided to carry nothing on us, but the water-proof key capsule they gave us with the key in and I threw some ice-cream money in there. We decided to leave our shoes in the locker too, and I'm glad we did, it would've been bothersome to worry about our flip flops every time we moved to a different pool or worry they might get stolen( happens to nice shoes I was told). Anyway, there are lots of pools, lots of slides and attractions, yes, but beware of your kids' size!!! if you're taking kids there. Everything is decided into categories depending on your size. You have the small baby/kiddy area which looks like a ton of fun for the tiny ones. Out for us though. Then you have these awesome slides that only kids up to 140cm can use. Yey for my younger one, boo for the older. Next it's those super cool float rides that you can only use if you're over 140cm. Had one ride with one kid while the other was sulking waiting for us at the drop point. We were left in the end with the wave pool and the flowing circular pool, both really shallow( up to my waist-I'm 164cm) and hence really really hot ( felt gross) and boring. So we all agreed that the pool site doesn't work for us right now and also it probably isn't something we would ever go back to. On the way out we stopped at the shops, found some quality stuff, decently priced and ended the day realizing that we didn't do much really ( just about 5 rides, lunch, pool-just 3 rounds of slides and mostly trying to FIND something to do there , shopping) but we managed to spend 7 all-in-all pleasant hours there. In conclusion, a decent day out if you're out of other options for time-fillers.

We got to Vinpearl around 10.30am thinking we need to beat the crowd but when we arrived there was hardly anyone there. Most of the rides & shops weren't even open yet. It's not very big. The most popular attractions was the water park & aquarium. If you've been to Disneyland or Dreamworld or other amusement parks around the world, you will be disappointed with this one. The location of the park was also strangely in the middle of nowhere. I guess for the price, which wasn't too expensive, it was worth a visit whilst you're on the island to see what it's like.

ヴィンパールホテルに泊まっていたため、ホテルのカートに5分ほど乗って到着。大人50000ドン、子供40000ドン、100cm以下無料です。市内からのシャトルバスが出ているようですが、時刻表が見当たりませんでした。 【荷物について】 コインロッカーはなく、有人カウンターにお願いして1回ずつ預けたり取り出したりする感じです。【食事について】 入口付近の中華料理でディナー、プール中央のオープンなレストランでランチしましたが、中華のほうは結構おいしく、ランチのほうは微妙でした。特にピザがひどかった。アイスクリームは200円、ビールは180円くらいで園内の売店どこでも買えます。 【プールについて】 子供（8歳と4歳）がいるので入口すぐの子供用スライダーがいくつかあるプールに陣取っていたのですが、大人は1つのスライダーを除いて滑れないということであまり楽しめず。子供たちも親と一緒に滑れないということでテンションがあまり上がらないようでした。もちろんほかの恐めなスライダーは大人が対象なのですが、逆に140cm以下の子供は不可なので家族では楽しめないため、スライダーを諦め波のプールや流れるプールに主にいました。事前情報通り、とにかく空いていました。 【遊園地について】 こちらも圧倒的に空いています。長男がはまったゴーカートが一瞬だけ5分程度待った程度で、あとの乗り物は一人のお客のために動かす、という感じです。あまりに暑かったのでゲームコーナーに行ったのですが、エアホッケーが4台中2台壊れていたり、ボタン押しても動作しなかったり、まあそんな感じです。
どの乗り物も、ちゃんと点検されているのか、不安でした。日中暑いときに行きましたが、がらがらでした。ハンバーガーを食べましたが、パンが乾パンと思うほど、硬くて、取り替えてもらいました
Waterpark was very good and fun but the aquarium was awful. There were big animals captivated in way too small cages and aquariums!

Spent a day in Vinpearl Land in the beginning of april, and it was almost no other people than us there that day. The aquarium was great and well maintained, but other places in the park some maintainance is needed. For example, in the game-room, half of the machines was out of order, but a good thing that everything in there was free to use. The waterpark was fun, but an hour there is enough. Free transport from the hotel is a plus. All in all, ok park, but could be better. Ok price.

Totally bizarre to be in a deserted amusement park, 0 minutes wait time, in fact my wife and I were the only people on the rides. The ride operators actually seemed happy to see someone!! Bare streets, water park had some good rides, also 0 waiting time. The aquarium was good, and the mermaid show was the busiest place we saw all day. The Main Street area was mostly closed stores, nothing on offer. Food was typical western/Vietnamese fusion, but a bit tasteless and mass produced, prices on the high side.

We visited the park with small kids. Our kids love water so they really enyojed the waterslides, tho the childrens pool had cold water. Amusement park was a disapointment because there was nothing interesting for smaller than 1,3m
Grounds are a little scruffy, very few food options, but amazing aquarium. Kids of 6 and 8 loved it.

This water park has some potential as a small parl but NOT ENOUGH WATER ON THE SLIDES. Constantly stuck on the water bowl and slow moving in the tubes. The aquarium is nice and the amusement park is all new and empty when we were there. This attraction is mostly for family and small kids not thrill seekers but something to do in the heat

Children liked it, the parents didn't. As an adult: why come to Vietnam and go to a European style Disneyland? 2 stars. As a child: great activity. 4 and 5 stars.  Not crowded which was great, got to all attractions quick. No lines in cafeteria. Most of the stores closed or empty. Free bus from Duong Dong great, but the entrance fee to high, if lower probably would get more guests. The sodas, beers, food and all too expensive!  The aquarium OK, but don't understand why keep big fish in a small "fish bowl"?  Easy place, if you want to have a lazy day.
It is a huge areawith watrslides,roundabouts,foodstalls etc,Best part is the aquarium,which is worth visiting
Awesome water park, friendly staff! But the aquarium.. The fish and snakes had much to small spaces. We as a group really didnt like that

やはりここはお子様連れで行くのがオススメですね。 遊園地は大人が楽しめるようなアトラクションは少ないかもしれません。 中にある水族館もまぁ、ベトナムならではの魚や爬虫類の展示はそこそこ楽しめましたが、規模は小さいです。 ウォーターパークは利用していないのでわかりません。 でもどこもまったく混雑がないので、アミューズメントパーク=大行列に慣れてしまっている日本人からすると、そこのストレスはないかも。
二回めは無いと感じました。でも悪くはありません。子供がいる方は二回以上行ってもお子さんは楽しめると思います。宿泊者無料はホテルの宿泊内容を決めるとき選ばなくてはいけません。全員が無料ではありません。因みに入場料は大人５０万ドンでした。

Nöjesparken var inte något speciellt, mer anpassat för mindre barn. Trots det längdgräns på 1.30 eller 1.40 på flera attraktioner. Vi var där under högsäsong ändå nästan tomt i parken och flera attraktioner stängda pga underhåll. Den stora behållningen var vattenparken med flera bra rutschkanor och pooler. Tyvärr hade de bästa längdgräns på 1.40. På kvällen visades en vatten och musikshow som var riktigt bra. Rekommenderar att åka hit pga vattenlandet. Det går gratis bussar från Duong Dong som tar ca 40 min.
В Винперл Лэнд особо смотреть нечего кроме океанариума, он оставил положительные впечатления, ну и аква-горки для любителей.

C'est avec l'aide de la Découverte que j y suis. allé  Prix de l'entrée 500000 Vietnam dong  Restaurants nul nul  On a eu droit à un abruti devant sa cour de 60 personnes avec un micro hurlant dedans pour les motiver ou je ne sais quoi c'était insoutenable  Activités de jeux d'eau pour les adultes il y en a trois ou quatre affaires si elles sont pas stoppees ou maintenance.  L'aquarium est tout simplement fabuleux

В парке практически полное отсутствие людей. Большинство аттракционов рассчитано на детей до 12 лет. В кафе на территории парка меню ассортиментом не радует. Вокруг парка в настоящее время ведутся строительные работы.

The theme park is not huge, so you can do it easily in 1 day. Is it worth to go there from far from the island ? I doubt it unless you have children. If you stay in a Vinpearl hotel next to it like us, of course its great - you have the entry included during your entire stay and then it ads to your hotel experience/entertainment. The staff could do with some training. They dont seem well supervised, some quite clearly are bored or demotivated, some plain rude or simply making long faces. Vinpearl Land can learn here from other Theme Parks - hard ware is one thing, soft ware (employees) another which I dont think is handled appropriately.

You may have seen the film West World which was a Yul Brynner classic back from the seventies. On arrival by Free bus which was great we entered the theme park and it was dead, I mean no one on any rides whatsoever other than staff waiting in the cabin to activate the rides. It was as if you were waiting for the robots to arrive and join you in the theme park!!  While this was great it was disappointing that many rides weren't working likewise in the water park only 50% were working because they were doing maintenance.  All in all we had a day out but a lot to pay at 500,000 VND per person to enter which with half the rides not working was disappointing.  Vinpearl, get all the rides working or offer discount as I felt cheated!!
Hôm tôi đi trời mưa tầm tã. Có ít nhất 3 trò chơi chưa xây xong thì khoảng 4-5 trò hỏng , chập điện gì đó. Rồi xe điện thì chạy chậm rì rì. Tóm lại chơi được mấy trò là hết và chán .

Pasamos un lindo día en el parque temático. Si bien no estaba abierto al 100% y hacía mucho calor. Es un parque no muy grande pero con lindas atracciones. Quizás falta de info de distintos horarios de los shows para poder organizar bien el día sería fantástico. Señalización algo confusa.
Gia đình có con nhỏ, công viên nước thì lý tưởng. Nhà game bị hư hỏng nhiều, nhiều thứ không chơi được. Nhiều cây xanh đẹp.

Två nöjesparker av ansenlig storlek med allehanda aktiviteter. En djurpark med djungeltema samt en nöjespark. Systemet är under utbyggnad. Vi besökte endast nöjesparken. Parken är avpassad för mindre barn. Det finns en hel del åkattraktioner men de de är av mindre format. Områdena har enklare men bra retauranger. En imponerande anläggning är dock ett havsakvarium där man bl.a. går i tunnlar under ytan och fiskarna simmar bredvid och över dig.  Bra och gratis bussförbindelser mellan huvudorten och parken.

in Phu Quoc, this is one of the place the visitors should to visit, it is not to much speacial or interesting but quiet good. It is small park but have a lot of funny place, clean swimming pools and a suitable place for children

To all those that worship greed ,exploitation and kitch, this should suit you.What a disgusting display of wealth, what ruination of a beautiful coastline,what absolute exploitation of many thousand of workers forced to live in conditions similar to a refugee camp. What arevolting place.

Vinpearl Land is a nice amusement park to visit while in Phu Quoc. It's a small park with a very nice water park suitable for kids and adults. There is a small aquarium and game room. There is also a nice water dance show. I only gave it 3 stars because it's just average. Although it's a small park with few rides, a third of the rides were not even in operation. Fortunately, it's low season so we did get to ride the few over and over again without waiting in line long. As long as you know it's not at Disney or Six Flags standards, you will enjoy it.
When i go to Vinpearland in May with my friends, the weather is hot and almost game is maintained. I just had chance to play a little game. The aquarium was short and boring.
I'm not a fan of aquariums (this one was particularly sad) but the water park was brilliant for adults. Go just for that!

We didn't plan to go, but went anyways. The park was not even done yet, a lot of attractions were not even op yet, but yet they wanted us to pay the full price. We went to the safari and zoo instead. The safari was fun, but the zoo.. It was way too hot and a lot of the animals are sleeping.

If you like thrilling game, then i have to tell you this park has none, all roller coaster types are really boring and mainly for kids! A lot of games are under maintenance... Water park is not big as expected, rather small I think! However, it is very clean and many places for talking picture with family and friends On the other hands, umbrellas are free to use, but most of them are low quality or already broken!
어른이 놀기에는 다소 시시한.. 슬라이드는 재미있지만 5개중에서 2개(젤 무서운거)가 꼭 4명이 되어야만 탈수 있어요ㅠㅠ

Провели там целый день, билет в зоопарк не брали ,поэтому билеты получились по 500 донгов. Аттракционы хорошие, новые, можно подпитаться адреналинчиком. Комната игровых автоматов - отстой, даже в Нячанге интереснее. Идешь по парку и из динамиков играет Лепс))) Водный парк удивляет - он новейший , но когда катаешься с горок - спина все равно ободранная!!! Стройка идет полным ходом! С колеса обозрения открывается вид на прекрасный отель, с другой стороны - горы кирпичей и исхудавших рабочих. К вечеру собралось огромное количество китайцев , они так орали что голова , наверное, болела даже у рыб в океанариуме. Акулы бедные поприлипали к стенкам. Ценник на еду в разы выше чем на остальном острове в среднем. В целом Проект не законченный, поэтому такой ценник не обоснован.

Kleiner Erlebnispark mit Karussells, Wasserpark und Meeresaquarium. Wir haben pro Person 500 000 Dong Eintritt gezahlt. Es besteht auch die Möglichkeit für 700 000 Dong pro Person ein Kombiticket mit der Safaritour zu buchen. Diese haben wir allerdings ausgelassen, da ich bei der Hitze keine Lust hatte und ich mir vorstellen kann, dass die Tierhaltung nicht die Beste ist. Der Wasserpark an sich bietet ca. 10 Rutschen. Hier ist auf jedenfall für alle was dabei. Allerdings dürfen auf manchen Rutschen immer nur 4 Personen zusammen auf einem Gummiring rutschen. Vormittags war der Park komplett leer. Daher auch keine Wartezeiten an den Rutschen. Wenn man allerdings auf einer Rutsche rutschen wollte die 4 Personen erfordert dann war es etwas schwierig noch 2 Personen zu finden. Ab späten Nachmittag wurde der Park dann wesentlich voller. Es kamen ein haufen Busse mit Asiaten. Durch die Hitze war es unmöglich barfuß zu laufen. Wir haben die Flipflops dann einfach mit auf die Rutsche genommen. Die Rutschen an sich weisen einige Sicherheitsmängel auf. Es fehlen hier ein paar Schrauben, dort ist eine Stufe defekt und die Trittflächen auf den Rutschen sind schwindelerregend dünn. Aber das scheint den Vietnamesen nicht zu jucken :) Es gibt neben den krassen Rutschen natürlich auch was für Kinder. Ein riesiges Kinderbecken mit vielen Rutschen und anderen Wasserspielzeugen. Für ein Kind das Paradies für die Eltern eher etwas Furcht einflößend. Das komplette Becken ist mit sehr glatten Fliesen ausgestattet. Ich würde hier ein paar rutschfeste Schuhe ( am besten noch einen Helm :) ) empfehlen. Im Kinderbecken gibt es auf der einen Rutsche ein riesiger Wassereimer der sich regelmäßig füllt und dann umkippt. Eigentlich für Kinder was witziges. Aber nicht wenn es sich hier um mehr als 600 l aus einer Höhe von 10 Meter handelt. Wenn man darunter steht, schmeißt es auch einen Erwachsenen um. Aber auf allen Rutschen sowie im Kinderbecken stehen Mitarbeiter und Sorgen für Ordnung. Wir sind auch zwei Karussells gefahren, die sind in dem Eintrittspreis von 500 000 Dong pro Person dabei. War ok. Am Ende haben wir uns noch das Meeresaquarium angesehen. Es ist sehr modern und gepflegt. Aber manche Becken waren für einige Fische definitiv zu klein. In keinem Becken gab es echte Pflanzen. Alles aus Plastik. Die armen Fische hatten noch nicht mal Sand auf dem Grund. Die Wasserröhre war der Wahnsinn. Trotzdem war ich im Nachhinein froh, dass ich die Safari nicht gebucht habe.

Inträdet kostar 500k dong p.p och det är väldigt mycket pengar mot vad de har att erbjuda. Finns ett 10-tal rutschkanor där många var super, en ganska bra pool för alla under 1,4 m men det sprutade strålar överallt. Nöjesdelen med åkattraktioner var medelmåttig. Vi var här på förmiddagen och fördelen var att det knappt var några andra här, men shower finns på kvällen så jag tror man ska åka hit vid 3-tiden på eftermiddagen om man inte har småbarn. Inte värt pengarna i jämförelse med Skara Sommarland.
どこでもビンパールホテルとビンパールランドはセットのようなものだが、フーコック島のビンパールランドは、ホテルに滞在していなければ敢えて行く価値はない。規模が小さすぎる。
tết 2016 đi cùng gia đình. khá đẹp, giá phải chăng nhưng ít trò chơi cho người lớn, không bằng vinper nha trang

the park isn't finish. there are a few attraction on the map but isn't open or even build. The park is small. With in 1 hour you properly see the most highlights. Мы были в комплексе "зоопарк+сафари", там симпатично, но слово "сафари" следует понимать метафорично, скорее, как аттракцион, и не пробуждать в памяти какое-нибудь настоящее сафари (если вы на таком когда-нибудь где-нибудь побывали). Parc tres sympa, propre et tres tres fun. En famille avec enfant c'est vraiment sympa. Gros plus sur mes jardiners qui font un super boulot en plein soleil, le jardin est tres beau. Vinpearl land is fairly newly opened. Alot of the attractions were not even working. In terms of water park i think its rather out dated. The slides are all far apart and they have a ridiculous system of sending up the tube by lift one at a time , then you have walk up 5 flights of stairs. The resort was not busy at this time , but i cant imagine that systen working when they are busy . I have been water parks like atlantis and this is very old fashioned. The resort has an amusement park aswell. Many things like the dolphin show and 5 d which is advertised on the pamphlet was not in operation or not even there yet.its good fun though for a day out considering entertainment is not much on an island.

Trở lại Vinpearl Land lần này, cảm giác như nó nhỏ hơn, đơn điệu hơn ngày mới khai trương. Chắc là vì cũng giống các khu tương tự ở Hà Nội hay Nha Trang, mà qui mô khu game thì bé hơn hẳn khu Game Royal City, khu công viên nước thì thua xa Vinpearl Nha Trang, lại không có bãi biển. Các trò chơi cảm giác mạnh ngoài trời cũng không phong phú lắm, được cái là có vòng quay khổng lồ nhưng dù lên cao nhất cũng chỉ có tầm nhìn khá hạn chế. Khu thủy cung thì đơn giản giống trong Time City. Với giá vé 500.000 đồng/ người lớn và khoảng cách 30km từ Dương Đông, chưa chắc đây đã là một lựa chọn hấp dẫn. Nếu bạn muốn có hành trình hợp lý thì có thể đi đầu giờ chiều, thăm khu Safari gần đó (tầm 3h30 chiều có trình diễn thú, 4h30 chiều đóng cửa Safari) rồi sang Vinpearl Land chơi chiều tối, khi đó sẽ khá vắng khách, không phải xếp hàng.

Das Aqualand hat viel Spaß für Kinder unter 10 Jahren zu bieten . Die Duschen und Sanitäranlagen sind in hervorragendem Zustand . Das Aquarium ist teilweise zu klein für die Tiere gebaut, was außer Bewunderung auch Mitleid für die eingesperrten Tiere hervorruft. Wer im Vinpearlland Nha Trang war wird von diesem enttäuscht sein. Positiv ist der kostenlose Shuttlebus vom Long Beach.

Good points: 500000 dong entrance fee seems quite steep but once you're there it makes sense; you are allowed to do everything at no extra cost. The water park is great for all ages, even the 'kids pool' was used by adults as the slides are pretty good.  The only part that made me sad: to see how many turtles they jammed into the aquarium. The other lizards in cages around looked really startled when you came close and I suppose it's the nature of any zoo/aquarium. There was a snake that looked so enclosed it would merely move in circles and it's nose was quite cracked looking from trying pressing on the chicken wire at the top of to its cage. Otherwise; fish tanks were very crowded but the penguins seemed happy swimming around in their enclosure, which was clean and had its own snow machine.  We only really went in to see the penguins and out of curiosity but I felt that most reptiles could have done with more space to move around.

We were staying at the Vinpearl Resort, which gave us complimentary access to the amusement and water parks.  Even though there are shuttle buses from Duong Dong and other resorts, the amusement park does not seem very popular with the locals and tourists. As such, most of the land rides only operate periodically. Some rides, e.g. the roller coaster, also appear to be under construction. We liked the indoor games arcade though, where you can play the video games without requiring any credits. The aquarium and musical water fountain show were good too.  The water park was more popular, where there were more rides to choose from. The rides were quite thrilling and comparable to other water parks in Asia. However, some areas of the water playground were quite slippery, and we saw a guy slipped and cut his head quite badly. Parents should be extra careful when allowing their kids to play there.  On a positive note, there are no queues for both the amusement and water parks. We also heard that Vinpearl is opening their new Safari attraction on 24 Dec 2015, so it might be better to visit them altogether then.

Cannot compare with Disneyland but not too bad of an attraction. Needs more staff inside to keep the neat, tidy, clean and especially control inside the kids area. Being international those kids needs to learn to share with others.

This place will be great in a few years. I'd still recommend going now though tbh as the emptiness of it is weirdly creepy in a fun way and there are no queues for any of the rides. The water park is pretty good but a lot of the bigger rides require 4 people and when you're there as a couples and there is pretty much nobody else there to even ask will they join you, you can miss out on some of the rides. Despite all of this I would recommend going, just go as a group and don't plan to eat there as there are basically no restaurants open. Also, I hope you like the band ""Aqua" and in particular the song "Barbie Girl"...

Bizarre experience as there was no one there. It was great!! We had the whole water park to ourselves!! For 500,000 VND we had done all the rides twice over in 1.5 hours. I assume that they have set this up with the idea of future tourism growth...

парк для тех кто не видел парки. полное разочарование два года в него собирались поехали и поняли что сюда больше не ногой ровно на один раз что тут от него тащятся и восхищаются вообще не понятно ровно разовое посещение для диких и кто не видел вообще ни чего и ни когда

A fun place to visit to kill time. There was no line mid week. My girl and I were the only ones to walk down the main street, eerily empty. Total amount of people were probably 50 people in the entire park! Carnival rides, aquarium, Free Game Zone, Dolphin Show park (currently closed), Dancing water show at night.  Things to Know: roughly 8-10 rides so far in the park. The park is still adding new rides. About 3-4 new rides were being installed. The water park closes at 6pm. great spot to cool off and fun. Free slippers to use, and towels to rent. Use the slippers or bring your own, walking on the floor barefoot is painful! Lockers are rented by the staff and items taken by the staff at front desk to prevent theft. Changing rooms are slippery, and showers. Some of the paint is not dried or coming off such as the wave pool, my toes were blue afterwards. Food and water are very moderately priced. Water is 50cents, Food was about $15 (ate at the Deli restaurant on the left upon entering the park). THEY SELL BEER!  Transportation: You can take a FREE bus from Duong Dong town hourly, and buy your tickets at a discount in Duong Dong town. Regular price is 500,000 VND at Vinpearl. It is a ticket voucher, make sure it's stamped with a numeric stamp on the back. If you take a taxi, from Duong Dong it's roughly 160,000 VND, one way. FREE BUS Back into Duong Dong town. Make sure you tell the driver where you want to be let off.

Mermaid show is not really interesting. All the arcade games in the games centre is free which was a huge draw for the kids. The main pool is huge. However their facilities are still not finished. Some parts of the park are still under construction.

It was a nice escape for a day to have some non Asian style fun. The park was not the best I've ever been too but the slides were still fun the gondola ride there and back was neat and it was pretty easy to spend a whole day there and not be bored.
