Tldr: Almost no rides functioning in the park.

The aquarium and mermaid show were quite spectacular. The whole aquarium structure was amazing .... Huge turtle shaped building. It was the first attraction we went to and I was wowed.

After that, pretty much every ride we went into was closed, broken or malfunctioning. For two rides, we waited in line and got on the ride and then it didn't work. Our bad luck I guess. At the end of the entire day, the adults had got a grand total of ZERO rides. The kids got 2 baby rides which the adults were not even allowed on.

The main area of the park was made well I guess with a lot of public domain characters and areas which is fine. Not amazing but not bad either.

It's just too bad they can't handle the actual maintenance of the rides.

English translation:

We arrived to see the place with high expectations, but unfortunately we were disappointed. Many rides were not working, and it even happened that we had already boarded a ride and then had to get off because it broke down. The park has clearly seen better days; it is quite worn out and would really benefit from a renovation. The rides seem to break down easily, apparently due to a lack of maintenance. In the water park the slides do work, but this reflects the whole park as well: the service staff serve customers with extremely slow and cumbersome procedures, strictly following the rules, even weighing people by their body weight. Additional English translation (to be added):

Unfortunately, the park also has a very large number of visitors, and many of them are quite inconsiderate. This results in a lot of trash and dirt, especially by the afternoon. The changing rooms near the slides are almost unusable due to the filth and grime. Sadly, this significantly lowers our overall opinion of the park. Additional English translation:

Despite everything, we really liked the evening show and the aquarium. For all these reasons, I can only give it two stars. Similar parks in Europe and elsewhere in the world are much better organized.

I have mixed feelings about this place. We booked the package with buggy and free ice cream as we have an almost 4yo who sometimes doesn't want to walk and we didn't want to carry him the whole time under the sun. What a mistake! Buggies always full and long waiting times we used it two times but just we were luckily two people got off and we could squeeze in. Ice cream was just one sort and very hard to find where to get it (pro tip: next to the big wheel😉), we walked for ever to find the bar who was giving the ice included in the offer.
Also most of the games and attractions were for kids over 140cm (or 120cm in some cases). We paid ticket for our child who is 105 cm but we could not use most of the offered attractions. This is a scam. Why not letting kids free up to 120cm as they will use maybe 10% of the offered stuff? For the price we paid I would not recommend it to anyone. Waste of money. We enjoyed only the water part, which we discovered at the end when we were too tired after too much walking although we paid for the buggy...
From 2pm it got so crowded you couldn't go anywhere without a very long queue. The rollercoast would take only two people at a time and let you wait 30min. Rip off!

I’m quite disappointed with the theme park because
- the theme park is not well maintained. There were two times when we were asked to clear out the ride as there was a problem.
- We experienced two spoilt games - the iPads in the Egyptian park and the guns in the shooting game at the Wild West. Might as well not open it up.
- Some rides were closed because there was just not enough crowd to make it viable (I think)
- There was no crowds and no queues. Some people will say it’s a positive but I fear that if the theme park is loss-making due to the lack of visitors, then mgmt will be pressured to cut cost on maintenance.
The aquarium saved the day. I gave the aquarium a 5* rating in a separate review but would give the rest of the park just a 2*.

I’m giving only 2 stars. Aside from the aquarium, everything else feels overrated compared to Ba Na Hills and VinWonders Nha Trang.
If this is the only place you plan to visit in VinWonders Phu Quoc, I honestly don’t think it’s worth it. It’s one of the most overrated places I’ve been to, and I wouldn’t come back again. I’d choose VinWonders Nha Trang instead

I’ve no idea how this place has good reviews, here’s our experience…

Negatives:
- There is only one good rollercoaster. The rest of the rides are bad other than one or two average ones
- The park is not busy - it doesn’t have a good atmosphere. No one visits which means yes, no queues, but then they still wait 10 mins before sending rides off, I’m guessing, to save power or something 😂
- On the one good rollercoaster, we waited for the front seat because there was nothing else good. It took 30 mins to send 3 trains then it broke down. Waste of time and sounds like that happens often
- If you are over 100kg (I’m 103kg) you won’t be permitted to ride almost all of the waterpark rides. That’s a normal weight for a tall man so it seems odd the rides can’t handle this weight (the water park at the other side of the island has no problem with this).
- They are so quiet that they also run some rides only for 30 mins at a time through the day meaning you have to walk back and forth lots
- They’ve also removed rides, which leaves big empty spaces adding to the apocalyptic feeling of this ghost town park

Pros:
- The staff are really friendly
- The aquarium is impressive
- And the nighttime show was better than expected

So the entry fee is quite significant. When we entered around 10am it was already quite crowded. There are very few really nice theme park attractions:

1. Water rollercoaster
2. Water river in viking town
3. The rollercoaster
4. Rest is smaller and less enticing imho

The queues are awful, we spent around 50 minutes in a queue to get to the Viking river which lasted around 2-3 mins I guess? Thats not great. And when we got there the queue was way smaller than the maze of gates suggest it may be.

On another ride - sort of merry go round - the lady had to personally open each and every single shackle to let people out. This took more than the ride itself! Its ridiculous! I have never seen such terrible and pointless waste of time. Central locks were invented years ago! In the viking river ride the staff also buckled up everybody themselves - instead of just checking it. This is just mind boggling.

And the water rollercoaster simply broke down and was not available at all.

The other thing for instance: lockers in the pool - they are paid extra - this feels so cheap to be honest. I understand that some extra services can be provided but lockers? Maybe you should also pay for the 3d glasses in the castle.

I also need to mention that all the atractions close at 5 or 6pm. Then you have a very nice fountain and fire show (why no fireworks?:() and CHAOS at the exit with everyone trying to figure out busses etc. I think it should be better organized. I guess vast majority of folks leave right after the show and it could be arranged somehow.

In general there is a lot of potential here but the very strange combination of poor choices and weird decisions make this way worse experience than it could be.

Another place NOT TO GO to in Phu Quoc (Beyond not coming to this island at all...!)

The Good:
The Theme Park is well laid out and good layout. Nice themes although rip off from popular movies and cartoons. Lots if food stalls with decent food and good amount of rubbish bins ans toilets.

The Bad:
Every other ride is closed, and all the ones you want for sure are under maintenance, construction or worn out. Decent park for small kids, nothing to do for kids 12 years above. Insane ques for the ones that are open, and short rides.

Verdict:
For the price of entrance i would strongly advice against going here unless seriously discounted tickets. Worn out park that overcharge and under deliver. Not recommended.

honestly alot of the rides were on checks and maintenance.... queued for one and suddenly they had to close it for checks. $45 sgd per person for theme park and waterpark it seems worth but their system is very bad, almost no queue but they take forever for us to enter the ride and start the ride which alot of time is wasted. and the waterpark dont even expect to sit most of the rides if you are below 60kg😂😂😂 litterally a joke then should this place be opened only for males because mostly females are under 60kg LOL. and be prepared that you have to walk a distance to carry the float and go back to the entrance and walk up the stairs they dont have floats ready at the entrance area. inconvenience 10/10 they make it easy for them and keep the floats where people get off

Poorly maintained rides, understaffed, fairly empty park but excessive waits for no reason.
Two rides failed after waiting 1/2 hour then 1 hour just as we got to the very front of the queue. A queue that shouldn’t have even been a queue. Anyone giving this place a high rating has never been to a real theme park.
The waterpark is fun when you’re not being told you’re doing something wrong, which is only about 5% of the time.
There’s a narrow band of people allowed to go on the slides. Must be above 140cm, above 60kg but not over 100kg. Dual rides must again have individual riders that are over 60kg each, but not over 160kg total.
The public weigh-ins at the top of each ride were a gamble each time for someone like me who was showing at 99-101kg depending on the scale. My wife like most women really enjoyed being publicly weighed!
The locker system is also bizarre. You pay someone. They put your bag in a locker that you don’t see, then give you a key in some screw-top floatie thing, which is a big hassle, large, and you can’t wear on a couple of the rides. Just give me a band or have some electronic system. Who are you even locking them away from? Other workers?
The only redeeming feature was the aquarium. Large-scale tanks, great selection of marine life, and some really large and impressive fish. It’s the only thing that brought this up from the one star to two.

A huge disappointment after experiencing hon Thom Aquatopia.

Our 2 kids went up on a slide and was sent away as one was too tall (above 140cm) and the other was too short (under 120cm).

5YO could not use much of the water park and amusement park due to height limit.  He is 115cm.

Some of the rides were not open, we only went on 4 rides in the theme park and 5YO was only allowed to play in the kiddy pool.

If you're after a decent water park, go down South.  Don't waste your money or time here.

I'm a 45 year old male from Australia, with twin 5 year olds.

There is no point going here with children aged 5 or younger, as you just can't participate or go on any rides.

The staff are really confused on how tall you have to be for most rides and our kids were between 1m - 1.40m and they couldn't do much.

Everything is so slow and takes way too long. If you've been to anything Disney related, don't expect anything like this. Staff are particularly rude and unhelpful and it's not just the language barrier.

It might work for kids over 1.40m, but honestly don't go if they're less than this height. Lots of parents were getting very frustrated.

It's very clean and food inside is not overpriced, which was a pleasant surprise.

The mermaid show is incredible though and this saved the day for us.

When we came here, the staff at the entrance counter checked our bags and found outside food. I explained that it was halal food because there is no halal food available inside VinWonders, so we came prepared with our own meals. However, the staff still did not allow it and insisted that we try the Maharaja restaurant, which they claimed was halal. But when we arrived at Maharaja, it was just an Indian restaurant with no halal logo. 🙄 They are deceiving Muslim customers by claiming it’s halal when it’s actually not. Please fix your service and be honest!

good place almost like disney,fun amusment park,less crowded than my country. The only negative part is this place does not provide HALAL FOOD FOR MUSLIM. YOU CONFISCATED OUR LUNCH OUTSIDE AND TELL US TO BUY FOOD INSIDE WITH ALL THE SHOP SERVE NON HALAL FOOD. ITS LIKE INSULTING US AND TELL US TO EAT PIG.

Knock off Disney with a Sprinkle of the magic. Very important to go and read the bounty of negative reviews for this place before setting yourself or your children up for a bad or unsafe day here.

The lead up to Vinwonders is very similar to that of Disney or Universal parks, think large buildings with false artistic facades, but thanks to the magic of COVID, these are all empty and where is is clear there should be bustling shopping villages there is nothing but emptiness.

Arrive at the gates to find a quick entry process due to lack of people and straight in to start exploring.

The park itself is a rip off magic kingdom, complete with castle and different lands of similar names. There are a few decent rides dotted around the place but for adults who enjoy proper rides they aren't overly exciting. Went on a few goodies and bypassed a good handful as their age is very evident. It's obvious these are old and second hand rides and this does give the immediate impression that maintenance isn't the best (could be a false impression of course but first impressions do count for a lot.) Queues are small so you can ride the few good rides / coasters many times if you like.

While queue areas are set up for a lot of people queue times were less than 5 minutes mostly. These areas were very hot and desperately need fans to cool guests down.

The views from the ferris wheel are good and it is interesting to see the old park next door in its state of abandon and disrepair.

The aquarium is nice and is much cooler as it is indoors so we spent a lot of time in here for comfort more than interest. It's a decent aquarium compared to ones you would pay for individually SeaLife / Kelly Tarltons etc.

The theme park bit I would rate 4/5. It was an enjoyable value for money rip off Disney that is just missing a mouse. For children it would be amazing, especially as no queue time so easy to keep kids entertained if they can handle the heat.

It went seriously downhill in the water park area.

Walking around this place is like a maze, no physical maps and no signs to speak of around the slide areas, and the English is not good enough for the many many staff to help much.

Good selection of slides, the lazy river is okay but very shallow compared to others so more aimed at children, and the wave pool is the same, the waves aren't spectacular.

Upon going to get on a slide, we were weighed (in front of everyone - no privacy here) and half the party was turned away. For some unknown reason there is a 100kg weight limit on all slides bar two. We have visited water parks all over the world and never ever had this weighing happen or been turned away. Okay, I'll be nice and still rate the park 3 stars / 5. The day wasn't totally ruined by this and we could still have a nice enough time.

My brother who was under the weight limit went on two slides, the second of which friction burned his entire back and left him with several very large hand sized red burned areas. He doesn't want the photo sharing on a public forum but it should be made public that there are serious safety concerns here. This lad is a string bean, tall and fit, so there is no excuse for this occurring other than lack of proper care and maintenance. Such strict weight and height rules which clearly aren't keeping punters safe. Again we have been to water parks across the globe and this has never ever happened. When a life guard saw it he pulled an 'ouch' face and just laughed.

There is first aid in the park but we didn't interact with any staff whose English was good enough to even bother trying to get a burns gel or anything.

He spent 20 minutes cooling his new burn in the wave pool for pain relief and we left. With a very sour taste in our mouth.

2/5. I wouldnt recommend the park. It's a very average knock off of Disney's Magic Kingdom with a few good parts. The water park is a hazard and I would strongly recommend at the very least wearing a rash shirt on slides to prevent similar injuries to those sustained by my brother.

Went here with my family, the place is cute and has different theme.  However it fat shame people on certain rides that involves being lifted up.  If you are 165 lbs over you're not allowed on it. They even weigh you before you can go on.  If they don't let people who are 165 lbs on the ride then I am not very confident of the safety protocols of the rides here. We've been to many theme parks and this is the only one that is fat shaming.  We had fun until the fat shaming. I would give 4 stars but the fat shaming just ruined it.

What’s up with these unnecessary restrictions at the Typhoon water park? I’m 15 and couldn’t even go up the average slide on the kid’s area (If you’ve been here, A 15 YEAR OLD COULD ABSOLUTELY GO UP THERE). Couldn’t go far at the fake beach when I legit know have to swim? Couldn’t sit on the floatie when I saw other visitors doing it? For every moment got whistle at by the life guard when I was just standing, what the hell buddy?

Feels like Disneyland rip-off with all of these rules.
Generally nice. Except that they try to get money out of you every corner. Extra fees here food prices like in europe. Generally a decent experience. Even the lockers are 3.5 euros!

Generally clean, however more teenagers friendly ride to be added.

The food vouchers and ice cream vouchers have so many limitations. Total waste of time.

A lot of rides were not open. The ones that are open only operates for 30 minutes then there is a 50 minutes break. It’s really inconvenient. All the rides close at 5:30pm so plan well. Suggest to start at waterpark then go to aquarium. Fantasy Land was a waste of time unless you have very young kids.

Nice attraction but only 2 stars because restaurant is not good, they fix minimum to eat 1.000.000 by table, after they ask to pay in advance. I think there are enough other good restaurant et we must forget this one.

i have 6 days family trip (10 people) to Phu Quoc island at mid of July.
I saw a news that the island is one of best attractive place in the world.
I bought 3days unlimited ticket for Vinpearl Wonders/Safari hoping to have good …

Fantastic place with never seen before rollercoasters and great amusements. 2 stars because of crazy weight restrictions in the water park. Anyone weighting above 100kg won't be able to ride on almost everything, same with two persons …

90% of the MAIN attractions in Vinwonder were not open 😭🥴, very disappointing. For compensation we got 200/100 kVND food-voucher for each adult/child . The park itself is beautiful, the Waterpark is great fun for children. The 7pm Lightshow …
Although not many people but the rides are very slow due to lack of employees.
Most of the rides are not in working
A mismanaged mess, we arrived at the ride and waited for 20 minutes to be told that the ride is closed and we can’t take it.
The staff at the amusement park were so friendly but at the water park they were horrible and yelled and screamed at us.
The damn smoke smell fills every place，Let someone take care of it！

The shops on both sides of the entrance have plenty of places to smoke, which is friendly to smokers but not good for children. There aren't many rides or attractions, and the food is expensive. If you really want to come, three hours is about enough to see the aquarium and ride the Ferris wheel.

VinWonders Park left me with very mixed feelings.
On the one hand, the area is large and seems like it should be fun and interesting. But! The execution is so-so... …

An ok park, but several rides were broken. The situation meant that there was, among other things, a bit of unnecessary waiting time. The park, like most things, is just bent on being huge, but it loses some of its charm. It is …

A pathetic parody of Disneyland or Universal Parks. Barely worth it. If you're expecting that level of experience, don't bother. But the price is the same. There's no staff, everything is empty and unclear. Sometimes you can't even ask …
A park where you think twice before entering an attraction, fearing for your life because the attractions look neglected. …
It's quite ordinary; it's not crowded, but it's not particularly outstanding either.

i have 6 days family trip (10 people) to Phu Quoc island at mid of July.
I saw a news that the island is one of best attractive place in the world.
I bought 3days unlimited ticket for Vinpearl Wonders/Safari hoping to have good memory.

1) I did not realise how often the rain will come during the rainy season of Phu Quoc Island. I just asked to travel agency and they said "who knows the weaher' which everyone usually says. (It was my mistake, I found that local people in this island know rain will come all the long during typical rainy season.)

2) Vinpearl Wonders has many good outdoor activities such as roller coaster (Zeus, Eagle) / strict safety rule, which are good things.

However, problem is that
- many tourists like me will visit there during summer vacation, which means rainy season.

- Vinpearl shut down the outdoor activities when rain comes. Staff explained that indoor activies are open
such as video game and Aquarium (my family visited there 3 times during 3days)
One day luckily rain has stopped few hours, I visited several outdoor activities as explain below but staff said it is their policy not to run it for safety purpose - My kids are so disappointed.
I said to them that rule is rule.

- Staff cannot speak english. (When I walked, one staff announced that outdoor activities is opened during rain stopped. I ran to roller coaster with my kids with smile after several bad direction from different staffs making me and kids goes the same way again. However, the activites were not opened after all as above)

- Water park has ambiguous strict rule as well. I wore polyester sport T-shirt with
Rip Curl surfing short pant. (Same type they sell at the store inside of Vinpearl Wonders). I tried to bring my kids to water slide. My kids said that there should be another reason we cannot enjoy the riding and send me alone to check. Staff near the water slide said that
. I did not wear the swim suit. (I explained surfing wear should the same as swim suit)
. My surfing pant has zipper which is not allowed for slide. I explained that it has unexposed design for water activities - making no harm to their slide and to me but staff said that zipper are not allowed. Ok...rule is rule.

- I think Vinpearl Wonders should have policy to refund the fee for free pass ticket during rainy season.

- It was gambling for me to come Phu Quoc during rainy season which I chose and high possibility to lose.

p.s) the 20 min night show based on vietnam's ancient story was truely wonderful.

Fantastic place with never seen before rollercoasters and great amusements. 2 stars because of crazy weight restrictions in the water park. Anyone weighting above 100kg won't be able to ride on almost everything, same with two persons weighting 160kg. If you want to go to waterpark, it's better to visit the south one named Aquatopia with fantastic cable car carrying you there.

90% of the MAIN attractions in Vinwonder were not open 😭🥴, very disappointing. For compensation we got 200/100 kVND food-voucher for each adult/child . The park itself is beautiful, the Waterpark is great fun for children. The 7pm Lightshow is absolutely fantastic. I think the 30 U$ entry fee for a Rollercoaster ride, 20 minutes in the Big Wheel, a slide in a Waterpark and an evening show is rather steep by Vietnamese standards. But when you are on a holiday ......
The following MAIN attractions were closed: Viking River Rapids Ride, The Sea Shell, Spartan Race, Achilles's Shield, The Eagle Warrior, Xibalba Drop, Nemesis Spin, Ipanema Skate Ride, Amazon Volcano and Jaguar Jungle.
進大門的兩旁店家，門口都是抽菸的好地方，對癮君子很友善，對孩子很不好。能玩的設施並不多，吃的東西也很貴，如果真的要來玩，三個小時逛完水族館跟搭個摩天輪就差不多啦。

Парк VinWonders оставил очень смешанные впечатления.
С одной стороны, территория большая и как будто там должно быть прикольно и интересно. Но! Реализация этой задумки так себе...
Посетив парки аттракционов в разных странах, могу сказать - этот самый посредственный вариант.
Несколько горок оказались закрыты, и это заметно испортило впечатление. Кроме того, многие аттракционы выглядят уже довольно потрёпанными, как будто парк гораздо старше, чем есть на самом деле – удивляет, учитывая, что он был построен относительно недавно.
В целом место очень туристическое, как будто с расчётом «да и так сойдёт»..
Явно есть над чем поработать, чтобы соответствовать статусу «парк развлечений» и цене входа.

En ok park, men flere forlystelser var i stykker. Det skabte gjorde at der blandt andet var lidt unødvendig ventetid. Parken er som det meste andet bare bukket til at være kæmpe stor, men den mister derved noget charme. Det er præget af at det bare skal være stor og flot på lang afstand.
Det er et fint sted at få en dag til at gå hvis man har børn med.

Жалкая пародия на диснейленд или юниверсал парки . Прям на минималках-минималках. кто ждет жтого уровня можете не ходить). Зато цена такая же. Персонала нет, везде пустота и непонятность. Куда идти порой даже не у кого спросить. При этом территория очень небольшая, разгуляться негде. Единственное достойное место - океанариум: и детям и взрослым интересно. На этом из плюсов все. Аттракционы и декорации очень уставшие, гораздо менее масштабнее аналогичных в других местах. Приехали - два аттракциона не работают, а центральный замок dragons spell сломался прям в очереди и всех выгнали.
Еда вообще грусть печаль если не едите вьетнамскую кухню. Личное мнение - абсолютно не стоит своих денег. Если прям хочется, то берите билеты в разных сервисах или своем отеле заранее чтоб не так сильно сокрушаться о потраченных впустую

Park, w którym przed wejściem na jakąś atrakcje zastanawiasz się 10 razy w obawie o własne życie, bo atrakcje wyglądają na zaniedbane.

Z diabelskiego młynu widać tragiczne, opustoszałe i zaniedbane pozostałości parku. Dodatkowo podczas przejażdżki dostrzegliśmy jak inna atrakcja zatrzymała się w połowie drogi i pasażerowie musieli ją opuścić schodami ewakuacyjnymi.

Niestety park nie informuje przed przyjazdem, że jakaś atrakcja nie działa. Podczas naszej wizyty duży basen był wyłączony z użytku oraz kilka innych atrakcji.

Jedynym plusem jest aquarium, które robi niesamowite wrażenie!
很普通，確實是不擠擁，但也不突出。

很無聊的樂園
裡面東西跟外面價差很離譜
價差一半吧
雖然樂園貴很正常但真的貴的離譜
外面椰子20k-25k左右
園內50k🙀 還不冰
透過平台買會有150k餐券
但不是每個地方都可以使用
水族館冷氣很強 可以在躲太陽看人魚秀
餵企鵝的價格是300k 含一隻小娃娃

Парк Винвондерс не стоит своих денег!
Брали комбо на 2 дня, в первый день посетили Сафари (все было супер). На второй день приехали в Винвондерс и сразу начались проблемы! Нас не пускали, так как их система не распознавала наши билеты, хорошо что чек не выбросили. Вообщем на разбирательство ушло 20 минут.
Аттракционы, они есть, их не так много, но... проблема -большая часть во время дня закрывается на 30-40 минут на технический перерыв и при этом одновременно. А установить для каждого аттракциона график тех обслуживания не судьба???
График работ каждого аттракциона свой, а в брошурке написано что аттракционы работают до 18-00
Аквапарк- по приходу, ты пытаешься найти место (шезлонг), так оно платное. Шезлонг стоит 200 тыс. Даже если ты пришел в аквапарк на 1- 2 часа и все равно плати. Бесплатно по их словам, сиди на песке или на свободных скамейках вдоль дорожки, если найдешь. А сбором денег за шезлонги, занимаются спасатели, которые по мировому опыту должны следить за отдыхающими на воде, а не сброс денег!
Для сравнения, в Винперле в Нячянге шезлонги бесплатные.
Главный бассейн, дно уже с дырками, боюсь что можно поранить ноги.
С колеса обозрения в одну сторону открывается шикарный вид на парк, но в другую их старый разрушенный парк, мне он напоминает заброшенный город Припять!
Понравилось- это вечернее шоу, оно действительно великолепно и океанариум!
Сказать что я разочарован, не сказать ничего!!! Больше точно не приеду сюда и не буду рекомендовать!!!

C'est un parc du style Disney, avec des attractions sympa et peu d'attente.
Mais j'ai déchanté en arrivant au parc aquatique où on nous oblige à nous peser devant tout le monde à chaque toboggan!
C'est soit la pesée devant tout le monde soit on part...
Quelle humiliation... Vous pouvez former vos équipes à estimer environ le poids d'une personne si c'est une question de sécurité, mais faire subir cela à des personnes complexées c'est vraiment déshonorant.
Et le pire c'est que fois que je n'ai plus voulu subir ça, mon fils ne pouvait plus faire de toboggan car tout seul ..
Ça a totalement gâché notre journée.

В целом парк хороший еда была вкусная, аттракционы были отличными за такую цену! Не знаю как это работает. Совпадение? Мы были всей семьёй и ночью после парка всех рвало температура была 39.Мы все пожелали что туда поехали! И теперь весь отдых проводим в кроватях!😡

Ходила в VinWonders на свое день рождение. Половина аттракционов не работало. Ваучера на еду не было. Ходили 17 марта, сказали ваучер на еду будет действителен с апреля 🤡. Честно разочарована. Понравилось только 4 аттракциона, это скоростные. И океанариум интересный и все. Не знаю стоит или нет своих денег. Но самые интересные аттракционы были закрыты и это печально

這裡很無聊 有點像戶外公園
設施環境悶悶臭臭的
整體規模很小
設施不多
人超少
水族館比較有價值，還有美的表演可以看

Парк с большой территорией. Многие аттракционы работают не на полную мощность (работники не производят почему-то полную посадку гостей), работают на расслабоне,  в связи с чем образуется дополнительная очередь и гости  вынуждены стоять под палящим солнцем с летьми, что сильно утомляет . На семейных аттракционах в очереди можно провести до 1 часа (в среднем 40 минут).  В аквапарке на горках тоже очень медленно производят посадку. Из-за медлительности работников и очередей все аттракционы вам не удасться попробовать.  В аквапарке в раздевалке нет вообще никаких лавочек, лежаки на пляже платные. В сравнении с другими развлекательными центрами можно поставить только 2 из 5.

Не знаю за что тут ставить 5 звезд. Очень мало аттракционов для детей меньше 120 см .  Вода ледяная, волновой бассейн со спасателями которые дрюкают тебя за каждое движение. Шашлык не прожаренный! Вилок и ножек не дают . Обслуживание долгое. А вода в детской зоне ледяная

Một chuyến đi không mấy thoả mái. Thật sự ở đây ko đáng để trải nghiệm chỉ có thuỷ cung để đi thử. Một khu rộng mà ko lấy một nhân viên để hướng dẫn khách hàng.
Nhà hàng Cá Ngựa là nhà hàng phục vụ khách rất tệ khi bạn nhân viên nữ ở đây thái độ rất ko tốt ở tại quầy nhận món cũng như lúc phục vụ (Mình có để ý nhưng bạn đó ko đeo bảng tên)
Thật sự không đáng để trải nghiệm.

Jestem totalnie zaskoczony pozytywnymi opiniami. Najsłabszy park rozrywki w jakim kiedykolwiek byłem. Atrakcje słabe stare i generalnie nudne, na plus tylko część wodna
Tragiczna komunikacja i zerowe oznaczenia.
Fajny pokaz na koniec i tyle.
Całkowity zawód

Сложно сказать однозначно. С одной стороны - невероятный океанариум, с другой стороны только в него купить билет нельзя - нужно в весь парк. Мы купили два билета с мужем и подумали что ну ладно, прокатимся на паре аттракционов заодно. Но мой муж - высокий и крепко слаженный, весом больше 100 кг, его пустили из всех аттракционов только на колеса обозрения. Больше ни один аттракцион недоступен при таком весе. Сделайте тогда билеты для тех, чей вес и рост не соответствует вашим стандартам, люди все равно не могут пользоваться вашими услугами. В итогу вышли через два часа, да, океанариум чудесный, размах парка большой, но не покидает ощущение выкинутых денег.

Cũng bình thường, ko có j nổi bật
Vắt khách từng đồng, không có xe điện free
Mua vè xe điện 120k 1 người xong đi đc đúng 1 lần. Các lần sau thì 1 là lâu quá ko thấy xe, 2 là xe đến mà ko có chỗ đi.
Biết trước thế thà đi bộ còn đỡ cay hơn
Buffet ăn tạm đc, ít ra ko bị dở

Phong cảnh quy mô hoành tráng không thua gì Disneyland nhưng đa số đều chưa hoàn thiện chưa chơi được những trò chính mà đã thu tiền vé 750k 1 người lớn thì hơi mắc đặt trên mạng thì có thể đc giảm giá. Mọi người nên cân nhắc mình thấy chắc đạt được như Disney phải mất vài năm nữa giờ đi (4/2021) thì hơi phí tiền. Nên đi Grand World

Très bon parc et attractions, peu d'attente (vendredi en décembre).
Toutefois les conditions de vie de certains animaux de l'aquarium (manchots notamment) ne sont pas éthiques.

Phần lớn các trò tính đến t4 2022 còn chưa xong. Thủy cung chưa mở, chỉ có vài trò cho thanh niên mạo hiểm, các trò cho bé ít, nhiều công trình còn dang dở, dịch vụ tạm được, nhưng cơ bản là chưa xứng tầm chi phí, ăn uống cũng khá là đắt. Nói chung ko bằng bên Sun hiện tại. Đến gửi đồ cũng nông dân hơn #_#

Atrakce už mají nejlepší léta za sebou, horská dráha byla při naší návštěvě v poruše. Vše je uděláno jen na oko, skoro všechny budovy jsou jen jako kulisy, uvnitř nic. Obchody předražené. Čekal jsem od toho víc. Část parku je trvale uzavřena, jsou tam ještě netknuté staré kolotoče. Akvárium bylo hezké.
Đẹp, rộng lớn, mình đi đúng dịp nhiều khu trò chơi không mở cửa, trò chơi khá chất lượng, nhất là tàu lượn siêu tốc và vòng tròn xoay
진짜 할거없어요...내부에 있는 놀이기구는 입구에 사진이나 영상이 없어서 들어갈때까지 무슨 놀이기구인지 알수 없습니다(3D안경쓰고 총쏘는거였는데 총 고장나 있어서 하지도 못함)그리고 성수기 주말인데도 후룸라이드만 줄 길고 나머지는 줄 1도없어요. 직원들 매우느리고 아쿠아리움도 걍 그저그렇습니다. 1~2시간이면 다봐요

Co z tego, że ładnie, skoro godziny otwarcia =/= godziny atrakcji? Czuję się oszukany, bo niewiele mogliśmy zobaczyć. Wizualnie spoko, ale na zdjęciach wyglądało to zdecydowanie lepiej. Na plus jedzenie w restauracji na miejscu.

בפארק עצמו יש אזור של מתקני מים ושאר הפארק מחולק לנושאים. היינו במתקנים עצמם וללא מתקני מים.
הפארק עצמו מסודר ונקי , עם זאת החוויה מאכזבת! המתקנים מועטים, ההמתנה במתקנים שכבר עובדים מעט מתישה ומרגיש שהתחזוקה של המתקנים השונים לוקה בחסר.
הדבר היחידי שממנו נהננו היה האקווריום .
תמורה לא ממש טובה למחיר.

Chúng tôi mua vé combo vào tham quan, ăn buffet trưa và chơi tại đây. Buffet chỉ phục vụ tới 14h.
Đi vào cuối tuần lượng người từ các tour đông kinh khủng, khi đi tới chỗ ăn buffet thì giống như 1 trận chiến, vào rồi còn phải chờ có bàn. Thời điểm tôi vào là 12h30 trưa, đồ ăn không còn nhiều, đánh giá của tôi nó trông giống như buffet sáng hơn là bữa chính.
Với giá buffet 300k/người, tôi chỉ có thể nhanh chóng lấy được 1 số món còn và có thể ăn tạm như hình, lúc đi lấy nước uống, khi có cốc thì hết nước, khi có nước thì hết cốc. Cảm giác rất tệ.
Tuy nhiên có các khu vui chơi, nhất là khu thuỷ cung thì khá tốt, các bạn nhỏ rất thích.

Đây là lần thứ 3 gia đình mình đến đây, cũng với cảm giác háo hức như những lần trước, sau khi tham quan vui chơi chúng tôi ghé vào nhà hàng “Cơm gà Hội An” trên đường đi ra về, bước vào quán giữa trời nắng gắt và mệt mỏi, đón tiếp chúng tôi là những nhân viên trông có buồn ngủ, sau khi tôi order tại quầy , thức ăn được dọn lên. Tôi hỏi bạn phục vụ cho tôi xin ít chanh và ớt. Bạn ấy lạnh lùng chỉ ra quầy, nơi để các thứ đồ gia vị với nhãn tên thì cái còn cái mất, “ra đấy mà lấy” tôi thực sự chưng hửng khi vừa nãy tôi thấy vị khách nước ngoài kia thì họ lại phục vụ đồ gia vị tại bàn. Không hiểu nổi. Đồ ăn thì nêm khá ngọt có lẽ cho nhiều bột ngọt nên điểm này tôi chỉ cho 2 điểm. Vài dòng bức xúc góp ý với Vin Wonder.
Giá tăng nhiều so với cách đây 2 năm trong khi dịch vụ và cơ sở vật chất thì xuống cấp.

1 ngày trải nghiệm VinWonders Phú Quốc thật sự rất thất vọng.Vé vào cổng gần cả triệu, vào cổng phải xếp hàng gần 30'.Vừa vào thì mưa gần gần 60' k đi chơi được gì, mua vé xe đi chuyển giữa các khu mất thêm 120k chỉ tham quan được cung điện hải vương, rồi mưa tiếp, trong lúc chờ mưa tạnh thì ăn trưa tới hơn 2h chiều mới hết mưa, chờ xe đi tới vòng xoáy thời gian xếp hàng hơn 30' mới được lên, đi được 1 vòng, muốn qua trãi nghiệm trượt nước, xếp hàng lặn lội leo lên tới tháp trượt, gần 1tiếng đồng hồ thì cũng gần 5h mới tới lượt, tới lượt thì mấy a hướng dẫn nghiêm túc nói đó mặt quần sort jean k được chơi. Trong khi phía trước có anh mặc quần có khoá kéo thì anh hướng dẫn hỗ trợ cho trượt 1 lần nên được chơi.(Vậy mới lên tăng xông, bỏ hơn 1tiếng đồng hồ xếp hàng k được chơi mà phải leo xuống.Qui định gì thì người ta qui định trước khi xếp hàng đi đỡ mất thời gian người ta chờ đợi rồi k được chơi). Vậy là gần 5h đành xuống khu hồ bơi, chỗ phòng thay đồ thì cả khu nước ngập như mùa nước lũ, nồng nặc mùi hôi thối của ống cống. 5h30 thì sắp hết thời gian hoạt động phải ra về. Xong 1ngày trải nghiệm VinWonders Phú Quốc.

App cần internet mà wifi công viên chập chờn, chưa nói là khó xem với người lớn tuổi, thêm nữa là mưa rất ngại cứ lấy điện thoại ra xem. プールエリアは結構混んでいました。Vin系列は毎度ですが、プールのルールが厳しい。そのくせキッズエリアで子供用スライダーのところには係員の配置が少ない。６個くらいあるスライダーの上に１人と下に１人。エリア外に階段がある方のスライダー下にいた係員にいたっては、滑ってくるのを見ているだけ。勢いよく滑ってきてやや溺れ気味になっても放置。いる意味ある？

子どもが疲れていたのでショーは見ずに帰りました。

Билет на весь день для взрослого стоит 950.000 VND. Это вход в аквапарк, парк развлечений, океанариум и ваучер на обед 250.000 VND.
В день посещения несколько раз шел мелкий дождь. Кроме аквапарка все аттракционы прекращают свою работу на время дождя. В августе половина аттракционов было закрыто. Непонятно почему об этом не сказали при входе. И непонятно почему я должен заплатить полную стоимость за половину работающих горок. Об этом точно стоит говорить при покупке билета.
Камера хранения в аквапарке 80.000 VND, полотенце 100.000 VND.
В аквапарке сотрудники взвешиванием и медленной работой способны живую очередь превратить в мертвую. Горки хорошие и их много.
Океанариум и его шоу в 15:00 впечатлило
Колесо обозрения было действительно большим, круг 20 минут.
На территории парка по ваучеру зашли в ресторан, через 2 часа рвота, через 4 часа диарея, боль в животе и озноб. Несвежий бургер. Мясо имело странный запах.
Такое просто недопустимо в парке развлечений!
Здесь сотрудники взвешивают людей по 2 раза на аттракционы , все перепроверяют по 10 минут, зато в кафе без зазрения совести травят людей.

2024/2/6 進入到園區參觀遊玩，整體一切其實都很棒，水族館也不錯，直到坐摩天輪遇到的事情，讓我整個印象大打折。

與朋友搭摩天輪結果在中高點時候停電，冷氣突然熄滅，整個靜止不動在中高點！
心中當下想：靠，完蛋了，我會不會就這樣要死了，因為風一直吹，我們的車廂還在搖晃。我們要嚇死了！這什麼電影情節發生在我們身上！

其實進入車廂後，工作人員會跟你說如果萬一有什麼緊急事故可以按那一顆！但是停電完全沒有用處，我們在上面緊張按了不下數十次，完全沒有作用的鈕，在緊急時候那是一個希望，至少要死也要知道到底為何停電我不想不知道發生什麼事就這樣墜落，所幸在上面沒多久，有慢慢的降落，下去之後我看到工程師在處理，後面還有排對人潮。
我詢問了工作人員發生什麼事了，只是一句I am sorry，沒人安撫乘客受驚嚇的心情，就請我離開沒有人要告訴我發生什麼事。

請園區務必重視類似的問題！不然真的會嚇死遊客。

Malheureusement nous avons eté très déçu. Des qu'il pleut, les attractions ne peuvent plus fonctionner... On se demande pourquoi car en France les attractions continuent malgré la pluie. Il n'y a pas d'organisation, ce n'est pas rapide, le personnel est lent et quand tu arrive pour faire une attractions, le personnel te demande d'attendre 5 à 7 minutes alors que l'attraction est vide. On ne comprend pas ce qui se passe dans ce parc d'attraction... Quand on voit la rapidité en France et partout dans le monde, Phu Quoc reste une grosse déception. Arrivés à 10h, à 15h on etaient déjà parti car c'est epuisant de perdre du temps pour rien. Je ne recommande vraiment pas ce parc

Bên Vinwonder đã tìm hiểu vấn đề và xử lí nhanh chóng. Hy vọng các bạn nhân viên sẽ được training thật chi tiết và những gia đình có con nhỏ, đi du lịch cùng bé nhỏ sau nè sẽ được hỗ trợ nhiều hơn.

Lần đầu tiên mình và con gái 3 tuổi đi chơi một mình tại VinWonder. Vừa nhận diện khuôn mặt tại cổng chào xong là mình có hỏi mượn xe đẩy, bạn nhiên viên kiểm soát kêu mình đợi một bên, mình đứng đợi xong rồi mình thấy bạn đó hỗ trợ cho đình khách người nước ngoài có con lớn hơn bé nhà mình. Vừa xong bạn nhân viên nói thay vì mượn xe đẩy em bé chị mua vé xe điện đi mình nói ok luôn rồi bạn đó tiếp tục kêu đợi, tầm 10p sau bạn quay lại nói mình hay chị đi đâu đó thăm quam đi rồi chút quay lại em trợ cho chị tại khách đông quá. Nếu mà mình muốn đi thăm quan luôn thì đã không hỏi xe đẩy làm gì. Rõ ràng là bạn vừa mới hỗ trợ gia đình người nước ngoài xong quay sang tới mình bạn kêu khách đông.
Mình cho cái dịch vụ khách hàng của Vinwonder 2 sao là quá nhẹ nhàng. Các bạn nhân viên nên được training cho chuẩn để hỗ trợ gia đình có con nhỏ. Quá tệ.

1. Ở trò chơi dòng sông Viking: là trò chơi 4 người ngồi lên 1 cái cabin tròn và trôi/xoay qua qua dòng sông gập ghền. Ở cửa vào, có nhân viên bán áo mưa dùng 1 lần (15k/cái), giải thích là sẽ có phun nước dọc đường, nếu không mặc áo mưa sẽ bị ướt. Phần lớn khách đều mua để mặc, sau khi đi xong 1 vòng lên bờ thì vứt áo mưa này vào sọt rác. Một ngày không biết bao nhiêu nghìn chiếc áo mưa dùng 1 lần này được bán ra, sử dụng trong vòng vài phút và vứt vào sọt rác như vậy. Cả Phú Quốc hiện chưa có nhà máy xử lý rác thải, toàn bộ rác đều được đưa vào 1 số bãi lộ thiên trên đảo, nhà mình đã đi qua và thấy đúng là 'rác chất như núi'. Với tình trạng xử lý rác như thế, mình nghĩ 1 doanh nghiệp lớn như Vin cần phải có nhận thức và đi đầu trong việc hạn chế rác thải plastic để bảo vệ môi trường. Nếu sợ khách ướt thì tốt nhất là tắt chức năng phun nước đi. Hoặc khách chơi thì chấp nhận bị ướt thôi. Mình đã chơi trò này ở 1 số nước, chỉ thấy ở VN là có sáng kiến bán áo mưa dùng 1 lần đi kèm.
2. Ô nhiễm tiếng ồn trầm trọng: rất nhiều trò chơi, có loa tự động phát thanh ra những thông điệp khi người chơi bắt đầu và kết thúc, nội dung đại khái: Chào mừng quý khách; Quý khách vui lòng thắt dây an toàn; Xin cảm ơn quý khách, v.v. Cứ chơi trò nào cũng phải nghe đi nghe lại những câu ghi âm máy móc đó, ong hết cả tai. Ngoài ra, những khu có bàn ghế ngồi nghỉ ngơi thì có loa phát quảng cáo cho VinWonders (chả nhớ nội dung là gì nữa),  âm lượng rất lớn. Xem phim 4D hay 5D gì đó, âm thanh mở lớn tới mức mình choáng hết cả đầu. Phản ánh với nhân viên thì bạn ý bảo là standard nó thế, ko chỉnh bé đi được (mình ko tin).
3. Tủ đồ giá đắt: Khách thuê tủ đồ, giá không hề rẻ, nhưng không được tự 'quản lý' tủ đồ của mình mà phải qua nhân viên tại quầy mở tủ, đóng tủ cho. Nhà mình quên đồ, quay lại yêu cầu mở tủ ra lấy đồ thì bị chém giá (gần) như gửi mới.
4. Bữa tối nhà mình ăn tối ở 1 nhà hàng (món VN), xem biểu diễn, ăn kem rồi mới về. Khi về thì cả nhà bị ngộ độc, mất 2 ngày mới khỏi. Không biết là do bữa chính hay do kem, nhưng do cái gì thì cũng không chấp nhận được.
在玩水的地方有溜滑梯看起來很刺激還說要140公分以下才可以玩

Gia đình mình đến khu Safari ngày 20/09, do gđ có người lớn tuổi, em bé và mẹ bầu nên mình đã chủ động mua vé và thanh toán trước 100% trên app Vinwonders từ tháng 07. Khi đến nơi mình đã rất háo hức vì đã từng đi Vinwonders ở Nha Trang và khá hài lòng dv ở đây, tuy nhiên sau khi check vé tại quầy thì đến bước quét mã QR vào cổng bạn nhân viên báo mã QR của mình không khả dụng, mình đã mở app và nhờ bạn nv cổng thì bạn hướng dẫn mình qua lại quầy vé, tại đây bạn quầy vé lại bảo vào cổng bình thường, khi quay lại cổng thì vẫn ko quét QR được nên bạn soát vé ở cổng dẫn mình quay lại phòng vé để check lần nữa. Sau khi kiểm tra lại bạn quầy vé đoàn thông báo mình là vé mua trước ngày 15/8 có thay đổi nên vé của mình hiện không có hiệu lực, mình không đồng ý vì đó hoàn toàn không phải lỗi của bên mình, vấn đề này của Vin thì Vin phải có trách nhiệm giải quyết. Bạn lại bảo mình chờ xin ý kiến, sau khoảng 10ph thì báo lại xử lý nhanh cho gđ mình là cọc tiền vé mới và trong thời gian gđ mình vui chơi trong safari thì bên Vin sẽ kiểm tra lại. Mình cũng muốn giải quyết nhanh nên hỏi bạn cần cọc bao nhiêu thì bạn báo lại mình là gần 8 triệu, tức là ngang việc mua vé mới hoàn toàn. Mình đương nhiên không đồng ý, và bạn nói vậy phải chờ kiểm tra xong mới được vào. Khi mình yêu cầu gặp quản lý bạn lại vòng vo không để mình gặp, sau đó cho mình sđt tổng đài để mình tự liên hệ nhưng lát sau lại thông báo sẽ có tổng đài liên hệ lại mình. Tiếp tục chờ tầm 10ph sau có 1 bạn gọi lại và hỏi ghi nhận thông tin lại từ đầu rất mất thời gian, rồi lại báo sẽ gọi lại mình sớm nhất có thể, khi mình hỏi sớm là khi nào thì bạn cũng không trả lời được. Gđ mình lại tiếp tục chờ  tầm 15ph sau thì bạn ở quầy vé mới xuất vé giấy có mã QR mới cho gđ mình.
Thời gian cả gđ gồm cả người già, mẹ bầu và trẻ em mình phải chờ là hơn 1h đồng hồ giữa thời tiết nắng nóng, không 1 chai nước, không 1 cái ghế, không lời xin lỗi. Bạn tổng đài hứa gọi lại cũng không hề có động thái nào. Đáng ra đi sớm để có thể đi hết safari trong buổi sáng và di chuyển sang Vinwonders vào buổi chiều, nhưng thật sự mất hết cả tâm trạng để tham quan du lịch.
Mình nghĩ hệ thống khu du lịch lớn như Vin thì dịch vụ cskh sẽ tốt hơn nhưng thật sự thất vọng trước cách xử lý của các bạn nv quầy vé và bạn tổng đài ở đây.
Mình vẫn cho 2* vì các bạn nv bên trong khu rất dễ thương và nhiệt tình.

nice aquarium and water park Otherwise the themepark is a scam with no people or activities.  The entry fee is 30 USD and they charge seperately once u enter for the Buggy, tower, shower, everything so not impressed.

We enjoyed the theme park and water park however we did not like that alot of the large fish are very cramped inside small tanks and various marine life cramped in open water tanks fof children to touch and examine. We saw a tiger pacing up and down the fence at the safari and a beautiful tiger cub all on his own in a small dark room in the kids zoo section, assuming he is only there for photo opportunities. The Vinsafari didn't feel right. The poor lemurs were desperately trying to get away from the masses of inconsiderate tourists trying to pat and hold them. I was actually surprised you allow people to go into their enclosures. I saw alot of people smoking around the zoo and not one security guard to tell. Also, the giraffes at the restaurant were being fed all kinds of tourists meals which I find to be very bizarre that this is also so freely allowed? Again no staff to monitor or control tourists patting and feeding the giraffes. I asked our tour guide on our safari bus a couple of questions about the animals and he had absolutely no idea. Perhaps if you educated your staff or employed animal zoologists instead of just theme park workers we might have thought you actually cared about the animals welfare. It's 2025. Do better.

Это отличное место, если вы никогда не были ни в каком другом парке аттракционов или у вас есть маленькие дети (до 10 лет), которые в восторге от всего. Парк состоит из 3 частей: 1. аттракционов , большая часть из которых закрыта 2. «океанариума» , если вообще его можно так назвать (один большой аквариум с рыбками, где периодически «русалы» и «русалки» представляют шоу среднего уровня. 3. Аквапарка. Там мы не были, но видно было, что часть горок были закрыты.  Когда-то это могло стать классным местом. Но очень грустно, что что-то пошло не так. Мы поднялись на колесе обозрения и вид с одной стороны был ок, но 1/3 парка просто заброшена , очень грустно. На остальных горках у персонала занимает раз в 5 дольше всех посадить. Такое чувство, что это происходит, чтоб создать ажиотаж и хоть какое-то ощущение очереди. Много где взвешивают, но непонятно зачем , так как персонал даже не смотрит на весы. Возможно это для ультра пышных людей, которых нельзя пускать.  На входе поверяют рюкзаки/сумки, никакой еды проносить нельзя. Так как единственное, что работает повсюду- это точки общепита.  Вообщем, если вы были хоть в паре качественных парках, сюда только от «нечего делать» или с маленькими детьми, им тут будет прикольно.

The theme park was absolutely surreal. I tried the roller coaster, which turned out to be extreme for me—I came off with severe motion sickness and was hit hard by the 30-degree heat. There were no fans or shade in the waiting areas, which ended my visit rather abruptly. I attempted to cool off at the water park, but the water was uncomfortably warm, offering little relief. Throughout the park, aggressive techno music blasted from speakers everywhere, reaching a crescendo at the exit, where a DJ was playing music louder than any concert I’ve been to. The music choice—intense, hardcore techno—made the atmosphere feel almost nightmarish.  Overall, the experience was strange and unpleasant, and I wouldn’t return. To be fair, kids might enjoy it, but visitors should be prepared for extensive walking, limited shade, and few places to sit and cool down.

I’m not sure what’s gone to really make of this place. On one hand you have a decent water park as part of the day ticket but on the other, you have a sub-par theme park which occasionally shows glimpses of being something better.  Let’s start with the positives: 1) the night time show is pretty spectacular and has some great effects. The fireballs which go off especially got the crowd excited  2) the aquarium is a decent addition and serves a useful purpose for absorbing the (very small) crowds throughout the park  3) the food was pretty decent throughout and was a nice change from the standard food you get at theme parks  4) Typhoon World is a nice addition to the day ticket and has a nice range of slides and activities going on.  All this however cannot take away from the fact this park is just lacking. Whilst there’s a couple of decent rides (Wrath of Zeus) it’s so confused as to what it wants to be. There’s so much for younger kids but then you have a couple of high thrill rides thrown in which really distorts what this park is aiming for.  The theming is pretty decent but if you look closely it could use some TLC all round. It’s clearly taking its inspiration (and when I say inspiration, gone “yeah, we can do that” and used exactly the same!) from Disney but just can’t execute it like this, it’s just poor.  The park is also dead! We visited on a Saturday and walked on to everything, this cannot be sustained for much longer can it?  Give this park another 2 solid, big ticket attractions and some love and it may be worth a revisit but at the moment it can occupy you for about 2 hours tops.  Such a wasted opportunity.

Desværre en rigtig kedelig oplevelse. Mine børn kunne stortset ikke prøve nogen af deres forlystelser, da man i de fleste forlystelser skulle være min. 130 cm. Høj. Mine børn er 5 og 7 og kan normalt i DK sagens prøve en del forlystelser hvor vi som forældre er med, dette var dog ikke en mulighed i vinwonders og vi gik derfor forgæves i hele parken. Ydermere var der flere forlystelser som var lukket eller i stykker. Det var også gældende i badelandet hvor de delte børnene op i højde i forhold til, hvilke vandrutsjebaner de måtte prøve, så børnene kunne ikke rutsje samme sted fordi den ene enten var for stor eller den anden for lille og igen kunne vi som forældre ikke tage med den lille i rutsjebanen, da vi som voksne KUN måtte benytte de største af vandrutsjebanerne. Ydermere begyndte det at regne og mange forlystelser måtte lukke fordi de ikke kunne benyttes i regnvejr. Jeg ville helt klart have valgt anderledes og sparet de penge, hvis jeg havde vidst det på forhånd. Jeg havde meget skuffede børn.

As a family we have visited the park 4 times already- yet today when buying our tickets we were misinformed about the ticket options and what it entails.  1) We were told the cost per adult is 950k and this then includes a 200k Food voucher (which btw previously was included too) When we asked about the meal vouchers the cashier assured us that a gentleman at the entrance would assist us as we need to download their APP.  We did so, fast forward to later the day when we handed our app barcode for the "meal vouchers" and were told our tickets don't include this. I halted and walked to the entrance to ask the gentleman that previously helped us. He then conveniently explained the vouchers were ONLY valid at Grand World.  2) We went to grandworld after dinner and walked to 6 different listed stores to ask about using the vouchers. ALL of them said NO and couldn't direct us to any single store that actually did. Toykingdom even said it's a scam as they were listed but never accepted it.  3) I then contacted Vinwonders just to get a reply saying the stores i checked aren't a part anymore and I should walk around more and ask all the stores? Really... False advertising to promote. Shocking-I will not be supporting

ホテルからのシャトルバスがあったので便利でしたが、時刻表によると空港までのシャトルバスの記載があったが、運転手に聞くと空港までは行かないとの事で、仕方がなくホテルまで戻ろうと思ったが、空港まで8キロほどの何も無い場所で降ろされてしまい困りました。 しかも運転手がその場所にゴミを捨てるのを見てしまい幻滅しました。 立派なパークだっただけに残念です。

Ngoài khu chơi giải trí cùng với thuỷ cung ra thì chị nhân viên bán vé ở đây cho tôi thấy rằng lối tư duy logic rất cần thiết trong cuộc sống hằng ngày cũng như trong công việc =))))))) Bạn tôi đặt vé online và đã thanh toán trên app đồng thời cô ấy cũng chụp lại mã code để dễ dàng hơn cho nhân viên bán vé ở đây. Nhưng điều bất ngờ là chị nhân viên chỉ đọc tiêu đề của biên lai mà không check mã code chúng tôi đưa, chị ấy khẳng định đây không phải mã code khả dụng để chị ấy xuất vé cho chúng tôi. Nhưng chuyện gì đến rồi cũng sẽ đến =))))))) Sau khi chúng tôi giải thích với chị ấy một hồi, chị ấy đã nhận ra rằng chị ấy đã sai và quyết định quyét mã code đó cho chúng tôi. Vâng thưa mọi người, kết quả như đã định trước rằng cái mã code đó hoạt động như bình thường và không có vấn đề gì xảy ra, vấn đề ở đây là chị nhân viên ấy đã không chuyên nghiệp còn cố chấp nữa mọi người ạ. Và cũng không có một lời "xin lỗi đã keos dài thời gian chờ đợi của quý khách" hay đại loại như vậy được thốt ra. Giữa cái thời tiết nắng muốn khô bộ tóc mới gội của tôi ngày hôm nay và phải đứng chờ chị nhân viên ấy làm thủ tục rườm rà như vậy thì quả là một trải nghiệm khó quên. Chúc mọi người đi chơi vui vẻ tại Phú Quốc.

The service was terrible I'm extremely uncomfortable with that., most employees don't greet customers. They speak loudly even if there are guests there, It opens at 9 PM, but most of the experience areas don't open until 10 PM. Earn money indiscriminately, In spite of that the games were fun. I put one more star because the last story of the experience was quite interesting.

So hard to find good information about visiting the park, and when you do, it doesn’t make sense. I want to just go to the aquarium, but am told I need to buy a ticket for the whole park. $100 to go to an aquarium is too expensive in any country, let alone Vietnam. Then I saw a combo deal to visit the Safari as well, but you have to use both tickets on the same day! Way too much for a single day! The translations aren’t great, so maybe they don’t really care about foreigners visiting, but I actually live on Phu Quoc and am having these issues. I lived in Orlando before (Disney) and other places where tourism was a big part of the economy, and every place had discounts or special memberships for local people. Not Vinwonders.

We went to VinWonders in September 2020. It has a lot of potential, but the park was opened before it was ready to serve customers. We stayed at VinOasis where we were constantly bombarded by promotional videos for VinWonders. The problem is that once you actually get to the park 80% of the attractions in the video are either closed, or not built yet in the park. They really shouldn't be selling full price tickets to a park that is less than half complete.  We would be happy to go again, but ONLY if they actually open/build the attractions they advertise. It's so frustrating to walk around the park, and then see a sign that says a ride is closed for maintenance every time you see something that looks interesting. There were entire sections of the park where you could see rides, but the pathway to these areas was roped off, and the rides you could see from the rope were covered in tarp to protect from weather.  Bottom line, this park could be good, but going before it's actually completed is a recipe for disappointment.

Vẫn đang xây dựng, nhiều chỗ không chơi được, đinh thì rơi vãi khắp nơi. Nói chung phí tiền. Đáng nhẽ chưa hoàn thiện thì giá vé phải rẻ đằng này đắt lòi lại còn thế. Chốt hạ một số cảm nhận, roller coaster không có cảm giác mạnh. Trò chơi bên typhoon cũng vậy được cái phù hợp cho hầu hết trẻ 1m2 trở lên. Hàng quán ăn ít, nhỏ và chật. Never come back P/s. Lúc soát vé không hiểu công nghệ nhận diện khuôn mặt tân tiến thế nào mà cái line xếp hàng nó dài mút mùa ... Nói chung là siêu lởm

Nous avons pris nos billets au Novotel, ou nous séjournions ,pour une journée incluant le parc animalier et le parc d attractions, nous étions 3 adultes et deux enfants de 13 ans ; le matin un bus est venu nous chercher ; premier choc nous avons dû rester debout durant près de 40 minutes pour faire les 20 kilomètres, bus bondé inadmissible, voyage horrible et très fatigant. Direction le parc d attractions ; très jolie place, énormément d'investissements également ; le monde pour les enfants est mignon et le monde égyptien également .Puis peu à peu l'arnaque reprend de plus belle ; comme vous pourrez le voir sur mes photos presque toutes les attractions sont fermées, on se croyait dans une zone désertique et toujours aucune aide ; à noter tout de même que le personnel dans le parc d attractions est agréable et souriant .Après une demi-heure de marche en plein soleil nous arrivons à un vieil aquarium ,le nouveau devant ouvrir en avril comme expliqué sur les affiches et nous étions en juillet ; retour en arrière car tous les accès sont fermés à la suite de cet aquarium ; direction la plage artificielle ; toutes les attractions sont aussi fermées mais La piscine à vague fonctionne ; animation et musique à 200 décibels et endroit bondé ; pour finir direction l'aventure land seul endroit ou 3 attractions sont ouvertes ; à savoir que les attractions ont l'air d'ouvrir à partir de 17 heures dans ce lieu...pourquoi ? ça c'est un mystère .Important a savoir dans l espace des jeux électroniques tout est payant alors que dans le même parc a nha trang tout est gratuit , le parc de nha trang est moins grand mais beaucoup mieux. Pour finir avant de repartir en taxi cette fois-ci , Lol (25 $us), nous avons voulu diner au Loteria ; là c était le bouquet final, plus d hamburger, plus de poulet, plus de frite , plus aucune boisson etc. .Incroyable d'inorganisation après avoir autant investi quel dommage . Pour terminer une arnaque totale ; quand tout est fermé il faut l'annoncer ou fermer son parc ; se sera peut-être bien quand les travaux seront terminés à condition de prendre des managers de chez mickey par exemple ; j habite en Asie depuis 10 ans les parcs d attractions de chine et le zoo de Singapour sont 1 milliard de fois mieux ... Lieu à éviter pour l'instant ne perdez ni votre temps ni votre argent...

The theme park itself is reasonable for the price. Some rides were fun along with the waterpark. The state of the aquarium is outright terrible. Displaying fish and reptiles in tiny aquariums. The big aquarium you walk though in the tunnel is a mess. Really dirty with old paint and fake plants (?!). Who the hell puts fake plants in an aquarium pretending to mimic a normal environment for the fish Fake grass and plants at the reptiles as well. A turtle in a 15 by 15 cm terrarium. That's all just a big joke Vinpearl. To finish it of you put up signs with the 'future of the shark' (see picture) and the rainforest pretending to care about the subject. You obviously don't give a damn building An aquarium like this and polluting the island with huge construction works, resorts and a freaking cable car between Phu Quoc and some other small islands. If you want to keep tourists coming to the island, you better start with preserving it today, otherwise no one will have a reason anymore to come here in a couple years.

В 2017 мы были в Ньячанге на Винперле, в тот день дождь помешал нам посмотреть музыкальный фонтан. Фонтан красивый, световое шоу понравилось! Мы приехали в парк в 15.00, там нас ждал приятный сюрприз - это талоны в буфет. Еда специфическая, в буфете винперл, который в Ньячанге нам больше понравилось! Территория парка не большая, но красивая, парк расширяется! Океанариум не большой, но есть экзотические морские обитатели! Шоу русалок в аквапарке и кормление акул особого впечатления не произвели... В аквапарке не купались. Горок не много, вода с сильным запахом хлорки. Пляж винперл доступен только постояльцам отелей. Атракционов не много. Нет комнаты страха. Шоу в павильоне 5D вечером совпало с временем демонстрации фонтана, и мы на него не попали. Есть колесо обозрения, которое закрылось в 20.00 вместо 21.00 в воскресенье. Самый загадочный объект - это бесплатный автобус, его расписание меняется и об этом ни кто не предупреждает! В воскресенье 5 яваря 2020 парк почему-то закрыли на час раньше в 20.00 Зашли в туалет, в 20.10, уже на пол уборщицы поналивали воды, хоть сдвай нормы ГТО! Совдеповское отношение к посетителям! Платили 480.000донгов за одного взрослого. Надеемся что в недалёком будущем парк изменится к лучшему!

Went up to Vinpearl , and was disappointed. It was New Year’s Day and was empty ,so didn’t have to wait for any rides. Which was good . The little choice to get food was just a bad burger joint . Crossed over to the water park and although quite small . Was enough for a hot sunny day . Just a few slides and a circuit lake , which had no current at all . The highlight was the 20 mins in the massage chair before leaving on the scooter we hired . After travelling 1 hr to get there I would have liked more . Don’t bother going . Not At least until the water park extension has been completed

My wife and my 10 and 12 year old daughters spent the day at Vinpearl Land and we were disappointed with the water park portion of the park. The height and weight limitations on the rides made it difficult to for us to go on most of the rides. I wish it would have been stated at the entrance to the park that these rules would be strictly enforced. The rest of the park was enjoyable enough. Overall not good value for money.
T hele park wordt uitgebreid met kastelen achtbanen huisjes t is 1 grote bouwput Ook rondom zijn ze hele dorpen uit de grond aan t stampen. Als t klaar is heb je een mega park maar nu is t behelpen

There isn't much thought or effort put into the theme park to make it shine. The decoration resembles like a cheap knock off of Disney World, causing it to lack any soul and identity. It is little wonder that the park is deserted during our visit there. Save your money and visit the Safari instead. I reckon it'll be much more interesting than this.

Rides and water Park as expected all just ok, nothing special, with many rides closed due to it being off season. Best part was no lines so covered all rides/slides in 2.5 hours. However the aquarium was shocking with comparatively small tanks holding large numbers of very large fish, many fish with sores on bodies. Also reptiles being held in small tanks with many agitated snakes and lizards. Not good enough for a company that claims to have an "animal conservation Park" across the road. Did not to attend the dolphin show or Safari Park for obvious reasons.

Half of the attractions are out of order waterpark closed for the day nobody informed us about this  Still paid full price 4x 500.000 Dong  Please go if you want to spend money, time in "half" a park , to see how maintenance people are at work on the park  Food is crap and half of the menu is not available  The two points are for the nice dolphin show
Attractions du moyen-âge. Peux de monde donc peux d'attente, ça reste calme et agréable pour une sortie en famille. Le spectacle d"eau de fin de journée est sympas.

Dès l'entrée, il y a un problème. Nous venions de sortir de Vinpearl Safari où nous avions acheté plusieurs bouteilles d'eau pour les enfants, et arrivés à l'entrée, de Vinpear Land, quelle surprise !!!!! On nous refuse ces bouteilles car considées comme nourriture extérieure. Là on frise le vol. Jamais je n'ai vu ça dans d'autres parcs d'attractions 😡😡😡😡 Trop fort.  Ensuite pour le prix il y a peu d'attractions. Côté parc aquatique, il faut souvent être à 4 pour profiter des meilleures attractions, c'est frustrant si on est seul ou à deux.  Ensuite, le personnel qui s'occupe des attractions est souvent désagréable, voire autoritaire. Pour un rien, on se fait disputer ou siffler. Les instructions de sécurité devraient être traduites dans plus de langues, surtout quand les enfants ne savent pas bien lire l'Anglais.  Bref, le Vinpearl de Phu Quoc, par rapport au prix d'entrée, n'est pas à la hauteur des autres parcs d'Asie du sud-est.

Went there as a family of five with one young child. Staff gave us mixed messages which meant an hour of waiting in the queue for the park shuttlebus at the wrong end of the line despite 3 employees telling us that is the correct spot.  What followed was appalling. Staff saw us waiting for a long time and allowed us to the front of another queue.  This upset some locals who shouted at us in Vietnamese and resulted in one adult woman pushing our child away at the queue. This wad after repeated explanation from staff that we had been waiting as per (wrongly) instructed. Note English signs are limited so we did what staff told us.  After the woman pushed our child, staff did not stop her. Her two adult, largely built male companions continued to threaten us to the point I said I need to call the police and would not feel safe for these violent people to board the bus with us. (The bus ride is 45 minutes).  To my disgust staff allowed them on, smiled and bowed to them to say goodbye and told me everything is sorted. We had not one apology of the incident which was badly handled.  The park facilities were enjoyable but the incident of the pushing and unnecessary yelling is why I will never even advise anyone to go there because clearly, staff have no idea to even keep the place running in an orderly and safe environment.  This is a great shame because for families with young children. This is not a safe park to visit.

The place was full of young kids, ours included. Yet over half the slides you need to be 140cm or 50kg. It is a surreal almost ghost town like experience with old rusty slides and rubbish junk food. Save your money!

This is my first bad review and I'm an understanding, patient person! Vinpearl Land has so much potential. There are good rides (not thrilling but good). The water park is big and has plenty of rides. I can see it being a busy 'Vietnamese Disneyland' ...but... The 5D cinema was 3D. The chairs didn't move, the effects didn't work. And the storyline terrified the children watching. (Seriously one family left with their child screaming). The rollercoaster rides were interesting but my husband couldn't go on any of them. Why? Because you have to take your glasses off. That's OK for me, I can see. He can't - no glasses no vision. They wouldn't listen to us saying he can't see. Every ride was glasses off or no ride. These were vision glasses not even sunglasses.  Thats OK we still had the water park. The wave pool didn't have any crashing waves, they all just rolled underneath you. The water slides have a 90kg weight limit. So there goes most westerners. I understand safety, but this was ridiculous. They were turning people away! "No you too big" and we aren't big people by any means. Then if you can't go on a raft ride because you need 4 people. Its just me and my husband in low tourist season.  So summary, we couldn't go on any rollercoaster rides and only in the lazy river or wave pool. We left feeling utterly disappointed and saddened by our experience. Not just for us but how many families visit and dads / mums can't go on rides with their kids. So much potential and so much disappointment.

Bus transfer was great from southern hotel. Vinpearl Land was just ok, not busy and unfortunately alot of rides were not operating I think because not many visitors. Aquarium was good, the fish feeding was fantastic but not translated in english. Water Park was just ok, again not all rides were operating and the big slides that were, must have had water turned low as our family got stuck half way down and had to be rescued. Other slides weren't worth going on as you had to move yourself along. Can't take food & drink into park, so have to buy from only 2 decent places for lunch. Very disappointed with the service at burger place (Lotteria) half the menu wasn't available to buy, only Pepsi available and we don't srink that rubbish - they refused to swap to another drink. She was VERY rude to us. Couldn't eat burger, tgey obviously premake them and they sit there until sold - it was disgusting, inedible and a waste of money. This needs to be addressed. Then the wrong bus information was given to us from the ticket counter lady and we missed the bus and were forced to pay for a taxi to the Safari. Overall I would give Vinpearl Land and Water park a miss. Lots of upgrading is needed, looks very old and dated.

This site is in serious need of a facelift and updating, compared to Sun World and Bana Hills this place is a desert. Even the 5D cinema is grubby, they don't clean the glasses between use and the cheap specs make looking at the screen terrible. Only junk food is available and of poor quality. The water park is the only area where some enjoyment is likely. A company like Vinpearl has the funds to make over this park and bring it out of the 90s.

We were really looking forward to visiting but were a little disappointed.  A lot of the rides seemed very old, as if they were purchased second hand perhaps.  The aquarium was horrible! The fish, lizards, turtles and snakes were kept in the smallest enclosures, or they jammed in so many huge fish that there was hardly room for them to swim. There were also penguins who also had a pretty poor looking living area.  I felt quite sad walking through and I personally wouldn’t recommend this place to people, mainly due to the old rides and poor conditions in the aquarium.

Кто был в Нячанге, даже и не стоит, будете реально разочарованы. Всё хуже и в меньшем масштабе. Выход к морю закрыт отелем, купаться только в детских лягушатниках. Плохая уменьшенная копия абсолютно во всем.

Helt ok vattenland, katastrofal mat, fruktansvärd djurhållning och delfinshowen var plågsam o se på. Inträde kostade ca 200 svenska kronor vilket är värt om man älskar vattenland men inte annars. Karusellerna vågade vi inte oss på då vi hade bristande kundkap om underhållet av dom så kan inte utvärdera.

Если вы были хотя бы в одном приличном парке (Хотя бы в Турции!) , то вы точно не оцените. Вообще не понимаю и не разделяю восторженных отзывов тут! Машинки, цепочки, лошадки - и все!!!! Две горки американские не работали, в игровых автоматах - не работает половина! Кинотеатр 5 Д просто смех - назад в СССР какое-то. Аквапарк тоже самый ужасный из всех что мы видели. Все горки плохо отрегулированы, едешь слишком быстро- вся кожа ободрана. Нигде нельзя ехать вместе с ребёнком - горка либо только для детей, либо только для взрослых- бред вообще (во всех парках мира нас везде пускали вместе). Весь персонал не говорит на английском, недружелюбны. Вход ужасно дорогой, учитывая наполнение, так ещё и не многоразовый (нельзя выйти и снова зайти в течении дня). Нормально поесть нельзя нигде - только мороженое и фастфуд (сосиски и жареная курица).

Took “free bus” to Vinpearlland from town ( approx 40 mins from the major town) ... the bus was enclosed meaning you could not see outside windows while travelling..... a big concern for foreigners! The bus then stopped in the middle of no where where the bus driver demanded to see tickets to park ( a lot got caught out as we were also told you could buy at park...where else are you going to go?).. they got marched out of bus to buy them!! Like other reviewers park was pretty empty but clean. Aquarium was the highlight. Food was disgusting....other amusement parks have a range of food choices this didn’t... we found a burger place that claimed they had the best burgers.... all ours were cold ( returned them and they were shocked and just microwaved them)....I mean really!! I agree with other reviewers about the water park unless you are in a 4 you can’t ride the major water rides.... ridiculous as you can in all the major water parks in the western world. Found most of the water attendants acting like the police which was unacceptable. My son who has frequented many water parks worldwide was actually stopped riding a few as some of the attendants didn’t believe his aqua shorts ( submersible...billabong/ ripcurl) could be used!!! Crazy... they had no idea!! Major construction around park going on ..... highly Russian enterprises. Don’t waste your money or time on this.... big tip take taxi as we did on way back ( very cheap and a lot faster)!

Check in was easy, welcome drink nice enough. First thing, the staff do try and help but even on reception, English is very basic at best. Weather was poor until the last 36 hours or so, we were limited so had to use the hotel facilities. Casino still closed, the main bar always empty, carpet not laid yet and 80k for a small beer.  Felt like a ghost town, surroundings are very classy, buffet breakfast was good for most, i’m a vegetarian so had to overload with carbs. Only had bed and breakfast so we ate at the food hall, various eateries available although many not quite finished with some closed shops. Pizza place very good, had a frustrating issue at the Chinese. We popped in about 8pm to ask when they closed so we could go for a beer first, was told 10pm so we went back at 9.30pm, to be told it was closed. Felt frustrated so back to Italian again.  Safari probably good, but was pouring down so visit short. Theme park empty, more staff than customers and a little drab. The snakes in the reasonably well stocked aquarium (strangely enough ha), and some large fish could barely move as the cabinets far too small which upset me. WiFi throughout hotel and generally fast enough for my IPTV stick. Room was big and superb, one of the best rooms I’ve been in although we only had standard room.  Beach has towel issuing stations literally every 15 meters, but I can’t get a drink and I’m currently dehydrating while typing this. Expect I’ll have to somehow get back to the pool bar where I’ll find the staff doing some endless admin, while customers wait at the bar. The walk from my room to the beach was 20 mins plus, though I believe they will take you in a buggy if you ask, and in the unlikely event they understand your request. Actually finding the exit from the hotel to the beach was hugely frustrating with locked doors and no signage.  All in all, I’ve tried to be fair as there are teething problems, poor weather not the hotels fault but there was very little to do and the desperate feeling of an empty and massive hotel will be my overwhelming memory of the place.
We visited one evening from the bin pearl hotel . It’s ok but bit odd and it’s deserted not many people about.

Djurhållning är under all kritik i deras akvarium. Hur de har tänkt där är obegripligt då det är relativt nytt .

Vattenlandet är ok med kul rutschbanor .

Nöjesfältet är trist och har märkliga längdkrav för barn.

All personal är trevlig och det är med västerländska mått rätt billigt men man knappt värt en resa om man inte älskar vattenland.

Complexe immense qui donne envie de s’y attarder surtout le soir avec ces jeux de lumières dans les rouges !!!

Hormis cela rien hormis ce complexe des perles ou des hôtesses russes vous accueille

Rien mais alors rien de local à se mettre sous la dent donc passer votre chemin
The only thing worth your time here is the aquarium. The wheel is boring because all you can see is the construction site.

We are from Australia and have Great water parks! We expected the same thinking that whoever built Vinpearl Land would have done their research. The majority of the rides need 4 people So unless your travelling in a group you will need to make friends quickly. Went on a ride and there was barely any water to even push you through! No lockers in sight! But saying this it is an experience! Don’t know if it is worth $30 AUD pp.

We travelled as a lot of families do, two adaults and two children aged 11 & 8, most of the exciting water slides needed 4 people of 130-140cm as our yougest is only 125cm we couldnt go on many slides. The rides werent much different most needing a minimum height of 130cm, unless we left our daughter to watch on as we enjoyed the rides we couldnt go on many rides. Positive was there was hardly anyone there so we disnt have to line up for the few rides we could go on.

We appreciate it is off peak season and the weather was poor and therefore the crowds very low but if they are going to keep the place open they should offer the same services and oppurtunitues for customers. Rides not working, many of the games were turned off in the games area and it appeared most of the staff were hiding out of the rain. The water park was a waste of time and effort because the wave pool had no waves, the lazy river was not flowing and most rides didn’t have enough water flowing which resulted in people getting stuck regularly and having to get out of the tube and push themselves to get moving. Lots of potential with a little more effort. Not up to the standard we have come to expect from the rest of our Vinpearl experience

Massor m turister, fick knappt se hur dom öppna å tog ur pärlor i skalet va så mycke folk! Sen följde dom efter en för dom vill ju att man handlar eftersom det är gratis entré!Tyckte bara det va jobbigt handlade inget, dom håller på att bygga en ny pärlfarm jätte stort ser mer ut som ett hotell!

아직 곳곳이 공사중이더라구요. 사파리는 동물들 종류도 많지않은데다가 상태도 안좋아보였구.. 워터파크랑 놀이동산(?)은 규모가 정말 작더라구요. 기구들도 많지않고..  빈펄랜드 사파리보단 에버랜드 사파리가 훨씬 좋구요 빈펄랜드 워터파크/놀이동산보단 한국에있는 워터파크/놀이동산이 훨씬 더 재밌어요.  푸꿕에서 내로라하는 관광지로 알고 있는데 많이 아쉽고 실망스러웠습니다.

Don't bother going if you don't have kids. Water park doesn't have much going on, theme park is small and limited. The castles are boring. The aquarium is quite good!
