Отличное впечатление произвел только океанариум, он действительно шикарен. Жирный плюс за бесплатные игровые автоматы. В остальном, часть аттракционов на ремонте, что в парке, что в аквапарке. Человеку больше 90 кг в аквапарке совсем нечего делать, не пускают на горки. Если рост больше 180 то и на карусели не поместишься удобно.

Die Bahnen wareb nicht so spektakular. Das einzige gute war, dass es wenig Besucher hatte und man dadurch nie anstehen musste. Die Rutschbahnen sahen gut aus, man musste allerding zu viert sein um zu rutschen. Die 500'000 Eintritt lohnten sich nicht!

We visited 2 days ago. The bus is a good idea. Pretty much wherever you stay on the island you can jump on and the trip to and from is free. The main rides in the theme park and water park were closed. Information that should have been shared with us before they had our money. We tried to enjoy what was open but the rides and chutes aren't great. The wave pool is a waste of time. I've seen bigger ripples. If you have kids they would enjoy the area in the middle of the water park. The chutes don't have enough water to lubricate them. The rides that we could get on in the theme park were rubbish. However again the kids would probably enjoy it. If you do go. Go early and pray there are no Chinese tour groups there at the same time. We got a couple of hours before they arrived. They are easily the rudest people on the planet. We ended up leaving because they were driving us crazy. They have zero manners and think it's acceptable to just barge past and do whatever they like.

Well... it's a small amusement park. Some rides look like they bought them from Disney (merry-go-round) and it's Really quiet. And this is High season. You can also enter the water park from here... it was hot as hell so we did a couple rides, saw the mermaid show (lame) then the family went to the arcade and I want to the water park. I wouldn't go to the park for anything other than the water park.

Посетить это местечко решили самостоятельно. Уточнили время когда корпоративный автобус от Vinpearl останавливается на ближайшей к отелю остановке... да он таки там проезжает по расписанию, но не останавливается! Поехали на байке, дорога на север(жили в Chen Sea Resort and Spa) уже оказалась атракционом(((( "прекрасные" виды и ароматы городской свалки, узкая и местами ужасно разбитая дорога, по которой едут грузовики, тягачи с тракторами, фуры... и та дам ! выезжают на встречную полосу, где для байка уже места не оказывается! Доехали, билеты на двоих взрослых 1000000 VND. Сразу же на кассе нас предупредили, что есть аттракционы, которые не работают. Отдельного внимания заслуживает место для храния вещей( именно Место!) Процедура такая: если надо переодеться- идешь в грязную, воняющую мочой и с водой по щиколотку раздевалку. Далее, подходишь к стойке, где за 50000 VND, отдаешь все свои вещи( ценные в том числе) работнику парка, он их уносит и приносит тебе ключ. Как я могу быть уверенна, что мои вещи находятся в безопасности??? Их просто унесли и дали ключ!!!! Я должна доверять незнакомому человеку?! Если вам необходимо полотенце, то стоить его прокат будет 15000(+залог в случае утери 150000). Аквапарк: горки так себе, везде ржавчина и разболтанные болты. На многих горках можно прокатиться только вдвоем, втроем или вчетвером( но не по одному). Шезлонгов максимум на 10% посетителей аквапарка.Босиком в солнечный день не походишь, плитка жутко нагревается.Еще веселее было забирать вещи обратно))))) Минут 20 ждали, т.к. Любой Вьетнамец, подходивший к стойке, оказывался намного важнее нас. Парк развлечений: Ну, получше аквапарка. Но подход какой-то жмотский. Вот люди закончили кататься на аттракционе, и мы подошли чтобы прокатиться... Ответ:"Нет ! Через 7 мин" . И так приходилось стоять ждать, хотя очереди нет. Шоу фонтанов неплохое, но если вы видели фонтаны в Дубае, то лучше ничего от этих не ждать. Океанариум:Очень симпатичный, много видов рыб, есть тунель. Довольно компактно представлен максимум возможного. Океанариум на твердую 4-ку. Опять таки, если вы бывали, скажем в Океанариуме Бангкока , то этот вас не впечатлит. Скорее приятно порадует после разочарования Аквапарком и Аттракционам. Сложилось впечатление, что открывался Vinperl Land за здравие, а работает ... только ради входного билета( грязь, ненадежность атракционов и отсутсвие какого-либо сервиса).

Приехали в будний день к 9-ти утра,т.к. турагент сказала,что много людей не будет...на первый аттракцион мы стояли в очереди 1 час 15 минут, а катались на нем минуты 2-3. Вот, собственно, и всё, что мог этот парк предложить для детей и взрослых выше 150 см. Шоу русалок разрекламировали очень активно, мы пошли. Огромная толпа китайцев чуть не затоптала всех на своем пути. После окончания этого перфоманса, толпа ломанулась в аквапарк. Детям развлечение, их мало что может заставить переживать,а вот наше впечатление сильно испорчено. Не впечатлили ничем.

９月に、隣接のホテルに５泊し、宿泊者は無料だったので専用カートで入り口まで送ってもらい午後の数時間を過ごしました。 ランド全体の印象は、『今日、休園日？貸切だっけ？』と思うほど閑散としていました。ウォーターアトラクションは、若者１０人位居ただけ。乗り物アトラクションは全てが動いているのに誰も乗っていないくて、係員も見かけませんでした。レストラン＆ショッピングエリアも数組の子供連れを見かけたくらい。品揃えは良かったですが、期限のある物は要確認だと思います。 そんなこんなで、がっかりしながら暑さ凌ぎで入ったつもりの水族館が、まさかの大当たり！夫と私の貸切状態だったので、係員が同行して魚の餌付けをさせてくれたり、予定時間関係なくペンギンショーに誘ってもらえたり。 設備は40年前の日本の水族館のイメージでしたが、海洋生物の種類も豊富で説明も多言語で、とても楽しかったです。

⭐ 1-Star Review: Overrated, Unsafe & Not Worth the Money – VinWonders Phu Quoc

VinWonders Phu Quoc was a complete disappointment. It stands nowhere near Disneyland, Universal Studios, or even the Sea Aquarium in Abu Dhabi. The park feels old, poorly managed, and at times unsafe.

When we visited, two main rides in Adventure World were “under repair” all day. We even witnessed a roller coaster malfunction — it rolled back in reverse from the top! Riders had to be rescued with stairs because the ride couldn’t return to its base. It was scary and could have been dangerous.

The entire park was in poor condition, with most attractions outdated or non-functional.
Here’s a quick breakdown:

🏰 Zone 1: European Streetmosphere
• Hunting Games Village: Machines broken and poorly maintained.
• Palace of Dream: Nothing worth seeing.
• Rest of the area — just decoration.

🎠 Zone 2: Fantasy World
• Completely for kids (not mentioned anywhere).
• One average ride and one show (only in Vietnamese).
• Maharaja Lounge: Overpriced food, limited menu, no AC, and nearly empty.
• Random fire alarm went off during lunch — loud and irritating in the heat.

🎢 Zone 3: Adventure World
• 6 rides in total, 2 not working (roller coaster & splash).
• Others were just average.

⚔️ Zone 4: Viking Village
• Only one ride where they claimed “you’ll get wet” — sold raincoats for 50,000 VND, but the ride barely had water. They just turned on a fountain at the end to justify it — ridiculous!
• “Thor Adventure” is nothing but an army-style obstacle setup.

🐠 Zone 5: Sea Shell
• Overrated aquarium with repetitive fish displays.
• Only highlights: fish feeding (11 AM) and mermaid show (2 PM), both just 10 minutes.
• Second floor “interactive” area not working.

🌊 Zone 6: Typhoon World
• Small water park — most people were there just to pass time after paying around ₹3,500 (~USD 40) for entry.

⸻

⚠️ Overall Verdict

VinWonders looks attractive in photos but in reality, it’s poorly maintained, overpriced, and below average.
There was no feedback or complaint option at the exit, and most staff don’t understand English, making it frustrating for foreign visitors.

💰 I genuinely wish to claim a refund — this place is not worth the ticket price.
💡 Pro Tip: Don’t go before 2 PM — it’s empty, hot, and boring. We went at 10 AM and left by 3 PM.

🏖️ Better option: Stay at your resort, enjoy their amenities and pool instead of wasting money here.

Attened today, Half or the rides / attractions at vin wonders either weren't open or under repair. Weren't advised at time of ticket purchase and if so wouldn't have wasted my time and money!

No good.

Absolutely terrible experience. One of the worst amusement parks I’ve ever visited.

There is no shade at all in the areas where queues build up — people, including small children, are forced to stand in direct sun for a long time. To make it even worse, kids are required to remove their caps before rides, so they sit under the scorching heat with no protection. Completely irresponsible and unsafe.

The park itself looks neglected and run down — everything is dirty, peeling, broken, and clearly not maintained. Many attractions look old and poorly taken care of, which makes the whole place feel unsafe.

The food is disgusting — low quality and frankly inedible.

Staff give confusing and senseless instructions, act indifferent, and show zero care for visitors or children’s comfort. No clear signage, no logic, no basic customer service.

A total waste of time. Avoid at all costs.

We boarded the ferris wheel at 5.45pm when the weather cleared up for a while. When we were close to the top, it suddenly started storming, causing the cabin to sway strongly. The cable door started opening and slamming slightly - suction of the rubber lining was not strong enough. I proceeded to witness a big white metal box fly off from the blue cabin in front of us which is probably the aircon box on the roof (view pic for comparison between cabins with roof and no roof. Pretty sure the orange cabin after us also has no roof). After that, some fabric like debris also flew off. When we were about to reach the end, the power tripped and we stopped. Staff proceeded to scramble around and the power did come up soon after but the door had to be manually pried open. The staff gave a uninformative ‘sorry’, gave us a bottle of water and drove us back to the main entrance with the buggy. When we reached, the whole theme park’s power tripped - castle lights, toilet lights, gift shop lights, street lights and ferris wheel lights were all off. No updates or broadcasts were given that the 6.45pm show was cancelled. Maybe they couldn’t broadcast because they did not have power but the least I expect is people to shine torches and usher people out, not have people walk off on their own with their own phone torches when the show time had passed. As we were still sitting there at 7pm, we were eventually shooed out by a staff saying “no show no power”.
As a theme park in a place with very erratic and bad weather, these safety measures are very inadequate. Please do some upgrading before reopening the ferris wheel.

Not worth the high price at all. We waited an hour for a water ride,  because most of the "boats" were broken,  just floating around,  then the ride itself wasn't even fun, they had to spray water at the end just to fulfill the promis that we would get wet, rediculous.

I was really looking forward to visiting this park, but the experience was disappointing. Despite being relatively new, the place looks neglected the paint is peeling, and many parts are visibly rusted.

The biggest issue is the efficiency (or lack thereof). Many rollercoasters were running empty because they were "partially broken" and couldn't take passengers. Even with short lines, everything moves at a snail's pace. The staff seems completely unmotivated and tired; it’s ironic because they drive their scooters like maniacs on the streets, but inside the park, they barely move at all.

The water slides have the same problem you’ll wait forever not because of the crowds, but because the staff just doesn't care if you get to try everything or not. While the park grounds are well-kept and look nice, the view from the Ferris wheel tells a different story, revealing piles of trash just outside the perimeter. Overall, it’s a beautiful shell with very poor service.

To the Management of VinWonders,
I am writing this to express my deep indignation regarding the humiliating and unprofessional treatment I received at VinWonders Phu Quoc.

I am a legitimate ticket holder and an international visitor. Due to a simple mistake, I accidentally exited through a gate that required a ticket for re-entry. Realizing my mistake immediately, I approached the entrance staff to return to my group, who were still inside the park.
However, the experience that followed was a total disgrace to Vingroup’s reputation:

* Communication Barrier: There was not a single staff member among the many at the entrance who could speak basic English. We had to rely on Google Translate for a simple situation.

* Unjustified Interrogation: Even after my companion inside showed a valid QR code ticket, your staff acted like interrogators rather than service providers. They repeatedly asked how long I had been outside, despite my explanation that I had just stepped out by mistake.

* Invasion of Privacy: Most outrageously, your staff demanded to see my private photos taken inside the park to "prove" I was there. Forced to show photos of my child to a stranger just to re-enter a park I had paid for is a gross violation of privacy.

* Excessive Formalities: Even after showing the ticket and photos, I was forced to write down my name, phone number, and signature in a manual log before being allowed in.
As a customer, I am appalled. Does VinWonders not have a digital system to verify a ticket's entry/exit status? Why must a customer endure a police-style interrogation due to your technological incompetence and lack of staff training?

I did not travel to Vietnam to be treated as a suspect by theme park employees. This experience has severely damaged my view of Vingroup. I demand a formal apology and an explanation of what measures you will take to ensure no other international guest is subjected to such "primitive" and "hostile" service.

Sincerely, LEE
Very bad experience at the Sea Shell Aquarium. No control entry in discipline. Poor management. Show not as scheduled. Bad bad bad ! Not recommend at all 👎👎👎😡 …

Its very clear that the staff prefers foreigners, they will always prioritize foreigners over vietnamese people who speak vietnamese. I tested speaking english and was treated much better than when I speak viet with the staff, they treat locals with attitude and are just very rude

I recently visited VinWonders Phu Quoc and was really disappointed. The only thing worth while was the aquarium. Many of staff came across as uninterested and quite rude, and any simple request seemed to take far longer than it should. Lines moved slowly not because of crowds but because the staff just didn’t seem motivated to help or keep things moving. I wouldn’t recommend

Just spent a whole morning and afternoon here with a group of almost 20 people. From the outside looking in it seemed like Disneyland but in Vietnam, the kids were very excited to see the attractions, we all enjoyed the mermaid show. Half of our party was children and we bought souvenirs from the aquarium for the kids.

Immediately after this is when the severe disappointment and ultimately great frustrations came as we walked through the blazing heat from ride to ride just to see that almost every single ride either was not functional or was 1.4 meters tall to ride. The kids began to cry after a solid hour of walking from ride to ride only to be rejected at every stop. When my son was 4 years old (he's now 6 and a whole lot taller now) he was able to go on virtually every comparable ride at Disneyland. Here only when a staff member saw my son pounding the grass in tears saying he hates this day and he hates his life that they finally mentioned that in a FAR FAR FAR corner of the theme park was a section for kids to go on rides in which half the rides did not function or had some type of mechanical issue. The staff clearly saw our party was full of children and failed to mention anything about a kids area until the park was nearly closed. They should warn families that most of this park wasn't designed for children at all.

Why make it look like Disneyland when kids can't enjoy almost all of the attractions? Why doesn't the park managers and engineers realize that if you have a ride that requires people to be 1.4 meters tall, that next to it should be a ride accessible to children?

Been to Phu Quoc Island many times and will continue to come, but coming back here after this experience, I will definitely reconsider the next visit and save my money for the real Disneyland who actually thinks about the experience for children.

Our recent visit to VinWonders was, unfortunately, far from enjoyable. While the park wasn’t crowded and had minimal queues, the inefficiency of the operations overshadowed everything. Each time an attraction switched groups of visitors, it took an inexplicable 5–7 minutes to seat the next group. This consistent delay pointed to a significant lack of employee training and competence.

The most frustrating moment came at the Ferris wheel. We arrived at 5:50 PM, well before the park’s closing time, only to find that staff were boarding every other capsule. Despite waiting in line, we were ultimately informed that we could not ride because it was now closed. This was an infuriating and poorly managed situation.

To make matters worse, some rides were closed during the day and only opened later, with no clear schedule or communication. This lack of organization and transparency added to our disappointment.

Overall, VinWonders has potential but fails due to its mismanagement and poorly trained staff. Until they address these issues, I cannot recommend it to anyone seeking a smooth and enjoyable park experience.

Worst park I've ever visited. Compared with rest of the prices on the island everything is very expensive here, including thr entry ticket. Even though it was nkt very crowded, the queues for the rides take a very long time. The employees take a very long time to do anything.
The face id didn’t work properly and no tried to solve the problem it took so long. Me and my husband entered but they left my daughter outside for a long time without solving the problem.

I'm writing this review whilst I'm actually still in the park. The majority of the rides I mean 85% are closed. No compensation. The park does need  a lot of maintenance. Hopefully next time I come at things we better
100 to 140cm kids have only 4 to 6 Rides. There is no basic water facility to drink. Only small bottle are available on very high price as compared to market. Overhyped place.
NOT SAFE AT ALL, power outage of the whole theme park, got stuck on the Ferris wheel WITH strong winds right now DONT COME, roof of ferris wheel cabin flew off.

I don't normally leave bad reviews. In fact this is the first time ever I gave 1 star to a place/service.

Everything was great until the moment we needed to catch the bus to leave the place. They should really send more busses to assist people towards closing time. It felt as though they tried to make people pay for taxi and tuk tuk to get out of the frustration.

What's the point of letting people, who all pay good amount of money to enjoy their time, wait for so long just to see the busses get packed and then wait again for the next ones, which every 30 minutes 🙄 Not to mention that it's not even the peak traveling season when we visited this place, and we left an hour before closing time.

I have been a big fan of Vin Group but I was really let down this time!!! What a terrible experience.

I won't go back here ever again, and will make sure to spread the words about my bad experience!!!

*Forgot to take pics of the overcrowded busses, but pics under to prove that we were there.*

Nothing special and management is pathetic with respect to handling the crowd at entrance gate.

Please ensure to get your tickets confirmed if booked from third party, policies are pathetic incase if any issues, they won’t entertain at all. Child height is checked cm by cm basis, and making a scene for all families with child, although no criteria for child age.

Better buy a ticket even 2 year old child as they are adamant and don’t listen, may be issue with English(assuming).

*Not Worth the Hype*
Quite disappointed with the experience. Despite being a clear sunny day, most of the key rides—especially the roller coasters—were not operational. The park didn’t have enough shuttle carts either, making it difficult to move around.

To make matters worse, the restaurant areas were unhygienic and had a strong, unpleasant odor. Definitely not worth the time or money. Needs serious improvements in both maintenance and management.

I'm giving it one star for the security guard waring beige dress who was intimidating and wouldn't allow me to ride my motorbike near the venue where all the cars were parked up. Not coming back here!👎 …

So many rides under maintenance. Everything that’s not under maintenance is run down. Don’t bother coming if you have a child under 120cm, they can’t go on anything! The map says they can but you will get to the ride and get turned away with a devastated child. Nothing is clear. Vouchers can only be used at VERY select places and other venues can’t even point you into the right direction. Staff are unfriendly. No help. No direction. No friendly smiles.
These two people provide terrible service, especially the one in the brown shirt. His speech and behavior towards tourists are awful. Please have the management team look into this.

Comment: The service at ride 23 was disappointing. The staff seemed confused and unprepared, which affected the overall experience. I would recommend additional training to improve customer service and ensure a smoother visit.

The worst amusement park I’ve ever been to.
The staff doesn’t speak any language other than Vietnamese. To any question, they just say “closed”—no explanations, no reasons, no estimated time. Just “closed”, and that’s it. Ten minutes later, you walk by and everything is running again.

All day, I only managed to ride one attraction—and it broke down right before the first drop. At the second ride, I finally got to the front of the line, and then it started raining. They told me goodbye, without explaining whether the ride would reopen later or if my place in line would be saved—nothing. Just leave, that’s all.

Completely disorganized, zero information, and total indifference to visitors. A miserable park. Don’t invite foreigners here if you can’t even explain simple things in English. This place completely ruined my impression of Vietnam.

Don’t come here. Only visit if you speak Vietnamese—maybe you’ll have better luck.
Service personnel showed bad attitude, no matter what service staffs or counter staffs. They seemed don’t welcome people to visit this place. I’ll never go there again and tell my friends about this

I went on vacation to Vietnam with three of my friends – four of us total. Naturally, we were looking forward to a fun, exciting day, so we chose VinWonders Phú Quốc. We bought 4 full-price tickets, each costing around 12,000 HUF (roughly 300,000 VND), which is not a small amount by any standard.

But what awaited us inside the park was absolutely disgusting and outrageous.

All the main roller coasters, thrill rides, and water attractions were closed – and there was no prior notice anywhere. Not on the website, not when buying tickets, not even at the entrance. Only tiny children’s rides and baby slides were open – nothing for us, four 20-year-old adults.

To make things even worse: one of my friends wasn’t allowed to use a slide because they claimed he was “too heavy.” The scale, however, was totally broken and inaccurate, showing 10–15 kg more than his actual weight. He’s of completely normal build, and this humiliating treatment was not only offensive – it was discriminatory, shameful, and completely unacceptable.

The entire park felt empty, boring, and insanely overpriced for what little it offered. We were ready to leave after just 20 minutes.

We will never return, and I wouldn’t recommend this place to anyone – unless you’re a 5-year-old looking for a merry-go-round in a sad, broken-down park.

Visit one time is enough. Staff who ride the buggy cars he told me and my parent to get off the car because ‘the place that I want to go it’s not that far , You can walk’  WHAT???? He not even politely ask me to get off the buggy, he just say “WalkWalk”. If I want to go anywhere in the park by walking why would I buy the ticket that includes taking buggy??? That CRAZY. Never had experience like this anywhere in my entire life. Should improve Staff behavior.
If you have been to the Disneys , not at all a worthy place to visit. Their rides are not continuous they have a break of 30 min -60 min for the next ride.
bus coordinators are not really helpful and friendly. I tried to ask them what bus to go back Vinpearl resort & spa but they told me to call the resort to ask. I felt very disrespectful

Terrible experience! The park was extremely disappointing—most of the decent attractions weren’t even working, and there were barely any to begin with, you could count them on one hand. We paid for a buggy, but there were only two in the entire park! The staff was rude and unfriendly, making the whole experience even worse. I’ve been to many amusement parks around the world, and this was by far the worst one. Definitely not worth the visit!

One of the strangest places I’ve ever been…

Pros:

Aquarium was solid.
Well maintained, with a beautiful cafe/restaurant towards the end of the aquarium.

The Ferris Wheel was a smooth 20 minute ride, with beautiful views of the park and island.

Cheap Beers ( $2 )

Neutral:

They offer you a food voucher which can only be used in certain restaurants.
The food was expensive for Vietnam standards, and tasted very bland.

Some of the staff members were very nice.
Some, mostly in the water park, were rude and childish.

Cons:

Terrible water park.
They have these obscure weight and height restrictions.
I was told I was too heavy to use a slide, then there’s a group of 2 or more men on the same slide on a single inter tube.
They publicly weigh you at the top of the ride, to determine if you are eligible…
The “lifeguards” were utterly useless, childish, and had this fake grin on their faces knowing they were messing with you and you couldn’t do anything about it.

The “wave pool” had no waves.
The “lazy river “ was a foot deep with no current whatsoever.
You need to pay for chairs by the hour…
Locker rooms and showers were nasty.

Some of the rides in the park were not functioning.
Then if you make it to the ride, they make you wait till more guests arrive…
Arcade had broken games…

I’m glad I went with friends for the “experience”, but I do not recommend giving this place any business.

Unfortunately I spend 300$ for nothing

It was raining and they stop the games and they did not refund me

Bad experience! The facilities are not maintained properly, we got on a roller coaster that started going all the way up and then unexpectedly went back, they dropped us off right in the middle of the way claiming there was an electrical problem and that the battery was dead or something like that, what would have happened if we had gotten stuck right in the middle of the loop? How do you get people up like that without checking properly first.
If your children are under a meter tall, they have nothing to do in the park at all, which is sad, they don't let you go up any slide with them like in other parks in the world.
The water slides for adults aren't really exciting, we've had better experiences... without a doubt we came once and won't come again.

Our experience started off on the wrong foot. Bought tickets on their website. Get to the game and asked where do I go if I have tickets. Told I need to line up at ticket counter. Wait in line there to be told I need to go to the front entrance. I go there and was told my ticket for my 10 year old needs to be upgraded to an adult as she’s over a certain height limit. No where online was this stated. Drag my family back to the ticket counter and pay more for my tall child. So stupid. Go back to the front entrance and line up again. Finally we get in. We paid for a buggy. We see one and ask if we can hop on. No was the reply because he didn’t have a scanner or something. He said try at the front area. Back to the front area and still none in sight. Finally we see one and he was as friendly as a statue. Asked to see my tickets. Said we had to wait. So we wait. Another buggy pulls up and now he’s asking to see our tickets. Takes a while and he scans them and gives us bracelets. So far this entire process has killed any excitement we’ve had for Vinwonder. He drives us past a ride and doesn’t stop to see if anyone was interested. We get dropped off at Sea world something. This was entertaining enough. We leave with a huge crowd after the mermaid show. We see a buggy and ask if we can hop on. He says yes but up closer like 10 feet. Super confusing. Then this very aggressive family pushes in front and sits down. The driver was clearly in mid conversation just apologizes and leaves us in the lurch. Probably 100 people left and only 2 buggies showed up! So we walk and see a ride. Ok, maybe an awesome ride will change our experience. It was so so boring and terrible. We cut our losses and left. Paid for a buggy we only rode for a few minutes and paid for ice cream we never even knew how to redeem and could have cared less at this point. We’ve been to Disney many times and Universal studios. Do not expect the same level of caliber as cast members. You’ll be hard pressed to even find anyone working to even ask questions and the buggy drivers are not there to ensure a fun experience.

The rides themselves are good and the theme is also. However, all rides have weight restrictions which are not made aware online when you book tickets. At each ride you are weighed infront of the que and either told no or allowed on. Therefore we spent money on something we were not allowed to take part it, quite deceitful. This meant we could not enjoy most of the attractions.

SCAM ALERT - DO NOT GO
I went there 2 years ago and it was good.
I came back 2 years later and it was TERRIBLE + DANGEROUS. (last 30/02/2025).

I don't even know where to start as so many issues occurred in half of a day.

Rollercoasters are not very safe (they make wait 5 to 7 extra minutes in front on the kart, even if the waiting line is packed. I believe they have 0 confidence in the machine they use.)

We got blocked on top of the waterfall rollercoaster splash for 10 minutes, until someone ask us to get down and take exit stairs.

3 times we've been waiting in the queue for 20 minutes, and when we're about to get started they tell us the machine is broken and they ask everyone to go leave.

We picked a restaurant from the park and it was terrible (sad not to have simple good vietnamese food in such a complex)

END of the day : we go to desk office and asked customer service for a refund or voucher. We got denied. We exposed the following problem -> VinWonders advertise amazing rollercoasters but most of them are not operating, something we didn't know and we havent been informed before purchasing a ticket.

They reply -> No but you can still go to the mermaid show..... LOL

There are many things to do in Phu Quoc, don't waste your day and money here.

Customer service is poor, food is poor, machines and rollercoasters are poor, the only rich thing must be the owners of the park. The park never operated at full capacity and will never because everything is to cheap.

Happy new year 2025 everyone, I hope you will have more luck than me starting this year !

This has to be one of the worst theme parks in the world. The architecture is gorgeous. But the operation is a complete disaster. They are only open during the hottest parts of the day and  closed completely in the evening. To make matters worse each ride has it owns hours. You spend more time walking in the heat to find a ride that is open than you could ever spend on rides. It might take you days to ride all the rides the way they have it. Then you have to go through long mazes of entry line guard tails to get in, making matters worse. We paid over $100 for 3 people. One was over 60 and could not go on any rides and one was under 1.4 m and could not ride on anything. Fortunately it will not take too long before they will go out of business. What a disaster.
Do not use KKday to book ur tickets, the voucher won’t get approved in time, and the whole order will be canceled

We went to Vinwonders for the day with my family. At lunch time we went to one of the restaurants inside the amusement park (Greek restaurant). We ordered some food, and a potion of French fries for our youngest daughter who doesn't eat meat. To our surprise we were told that we couldn't order just French fries, despite them being displayed on the menu at 60.000 VND. Another surprise, all the other meals that we ordered came with French fries, so this is  clearly a cost cutting measure at our expense. Meals come with very few French fries. We're very disappointed that such a happy day for our kids turned out to be horrible for our youngest one. We had to keep ordering meals so that we could take a few of the French fries to make a meal for her.

Never again will my family and I visit this scam of an amusement park.

By the way they had packets of frozen French fries in their open kitchen and we could clearly see the chefs cooking.

Very disappointed parent.

Even though some rides were not working and it was hot and humid, we were having a good time in the pool initially where the staff was very friendly and supportive with the kids. Until we decided to go to the normal rides where this one lady at the Viking river spoiled the day for us. She behaved very rudely with the kid and does not have minimum manners. Such pathetic attitude of the lady. Washed down the entire good work done by some of the other staffs.
much below expectation! plenty of limitations on weight and height. none of my family enjoy it. definitely not recommended.

Disappointed with the safety standard. The giant wheel stuck mid air for 30 mins. No assistance provided and no ventilation, led to suffocation mid air. I am very disappointed with the service and management.
Horrible. Great area but few attractions and very weak. If you have children under 120 cm, it's not even worth coming. There is nothing for them
Only Mermaid show is highlighting....amoung rest adventure park, more than half of the rides are closed or under maintaining.

Very bad experience with kids .. I went with my daughters one is 5 years old and 2nd one is 1 year old. There is no ride for infant. And also water park experience was very bad . You can not enjoy any ride with toddlers, they will not allow parents to ride with their kid even if kid is scared and in infant area they will not allow toddlers/parents to use the rides . I find the management of this attraction is just so vague, went to this place on a weekend with my family, just wanted spending a little time with my 80-plus-year-old-grandma, we honestly tried to have her a good preparation for the trip, packing and all kinds of stuffs as we could, except her ID, that’s personal that we cannot ask her for us to keep on our hands, even still kept reminding her, but unfortunately she’s an elder, couldn’t remember to bring her ID on her. Confronted their staffs at the ticket windows, explained everything to their staffs, their front desk was asked to consult with their manager, instead of willing to help us out. She came out with a solution capturing my grandma’s photo then came back again stating without my grandma’s forms of identification, they wouldnot let us buy tickets with price for elders, and said the situation would bother their accountants. Never get back here at all cost or recommend anyone who would want to discover this place with the attitude and always try to push their responsibilities on customers culture.👎🏼This type of business should be forgotten.

I also bought the child ticket for my 2 years old child and because he is under 100 cm height they informed me I didn’t need a ticket for him. I didn’t t have very good experience. The bus takes too much to arrive and take you to and return. The park was partially not operating and many attractions was not available. The staff didn’t speak any English, the bus drivers especially was very aggressive and this makes it worse and finally the lockers was only available for one time access, much inconvenient. In conclusion this is not a suggested attraction. Compel in Nha Trang was way better experience. Never here again with this behavior.

Had a good time inside but had a terrible time trying to leave an hour before closing.

There is a free shuttle that goes back and forth every 30 minutes,  but when we tried it was fully packed. Waited for the next one, fully packed.
Now the place is closed and even more people trying to leave. Before we can try get on the next one it is also full but this time families rush in front of us before we can try get on. This carried on until the final bus. 2 hours after all this and we can finally catch the final bus.

Doesn't help that the taxi and Tuktuk drivers were always asking if we want a ride, as if it was planned that we were to be so frustrated that we take an overpriced ride that is only minutes away but impossible to walk.

Hampered a good experience inside. Can't imagine how painful and frustrating it is during peak season.

Very low quality the park is not busy but most of the rides are broken or inefficient i don’t recommend to go there. When I complained to the reception there are no refund or voucher available.

The amusement park is not as fun as it looks in the pictures, half of the facilities don't work..
The price is excessive.  But the most shocking part is that they charged us double and asked us to sign twice and when we asked if she charged twice she said no, when we returned to the hotel we saw
2 charges.

water park is old and dirty.

We took two children, both under 80 cm, who don't require tickets, we gave passports to the agent at the ticket booth at first, they still charged us for a ticket for a child over 140 cm. , 1,050,000 vnd/each. Booked phu quoc to bring kids here and honestly don't waste your time. My 5 year old wasnt allowed on almost any ride due to height, even in my home country theme parks they have kids ride section. The park is clean and the scenes are good but the service is meh. I bought the combo tickets for both vinwonder and vinsafari but since I do not stay at vin hotel, I am not eligible for the shuttle bus from vinwonder to vinsafari and vice versa.

I would like to give ZERO star. Completely disappointed and dissatisfied. I bought the combo tickets from Vinpearl group which gave us unlimited entry times as we stayed at Vinpearl resort as well. If Vinpearl informed us when we bought tickets, probably we felt better and prepared for the empty theme park. We didn’t get any compensation or apologies from Vinpearl. This is the weirdest theme park we have ever been.
Staff is very slow in operation of ride.
A nice place but we had an unhappy moment. In waterpark, a staff give us incorrect amount of change during locker loan so we lost 450.000VND
This place is dying park. Everything is old and complete waste of time. Anyone reading this review and still decides to go, will regret. Utter waste of time and money

Not recommeded. Most of the games and stores are closed. Also, this place is just copying the ideas and designs from the other famous theme parks. Totally a waste of time and money, including the food voucher.
But please add a hair dryer and clean all bathroom and toilet. It’s so dirty.
When i paid and bought the ticket they told 5 rides are closed!!! They were the important one , totally disrespectful

The ticket-selling staff provided incorrect information.

They only see us as money.

Amazon volcano is offen out of function and some of items stop operating or waiting long time.
Nobody can speak english. We were stuck on the rollercoaster. Almost every attraction was closed.
I came here to play games but Viking River Rapids Ride and The Wrath of Zeus don’t work, next time can you give us the information before we buy the tickets…so disapointed

1/5 – EXPERIENȚĂ DEZASTRUOASĂ. CAPCANĂ PENTRU TURIȘTI.

Cea mai slabă experiență pe care am avut-o în Vietnam.
Am cumpărat un bilet COMBO Safari + VinWonders, în valoare de 1.500.000 VND, un preț foarte mare, fără să fim informați clar că majoritatea atracțiilor se închid mult mai devreme decât programul afișat oficial.

VinWonders este prezentat ca fiind „deschis” până la 19:30, DAR în realitate:
• acvariul se închide la 17:30 (la 18:00 ești scos afară),
• caruselele și atracțiile se închid între 17:30–18:00,
• roata panoramică era deja închisă la 17.45

Practic, după ora 18:00 nu mai ai ce face, decât să aștepți un show pe care poate nu îți dorești să îl vezi.
NIMENI nu ne-a informat despre aceste limitări la intrare.
Este, din punctul meu de vedere, o capcană turistică creată pentru a vinde bilete combo scumpe.

Am plătit 1.500.000 VND și nu ne-am putut bucura de aproape nimic. Când am cerut explicații și am solicitat să vorbim cu un manager, a venit o persoană prezentată ca manager, cu o atitudine complet neprofesionistă, care nu a oferit nicio soluție reală.
Angajații de la roata panoramică au avut o atitudine batjocoritoare, unii chiar au râs în față când le-am explicat situația.

Această zonă din nordul insulei este, din păcate, extrem de slabă ca experiență turistică, iar VinWonders pare un parc tematic de tip Disney wannabe, slab organizat, fără respect pentru vizitatori.

Există două mari grupuri în Vietnam: Sun World Group și Vingroup. Diferența dintre ele este uriașă.
La Sun World totul este clar, organizat și elegant. Aici, ceea ce este realizat de Vingroup este haos, lipsă de transparență și o dorință evidentă de a stoarce bani de la turiști fără a oferi experiența promisă.

Nu recomand sub nicio formă. Nu merită banii, nu merită timpul și este una dintre cele mai slabe experiențe turistice pe care le-am avut.

И тех немногих атракционом что работают не на всё хочется идти. Во первых кругом грязь и антисанитария . Всё водоёмы заросшие грязью и илом. В общем за пол дня мы смогли посетить только три атракционами... В кафешке океанариума не хватает подносов....то полное дно сервиса. Я бывал во многих странах и там посещал парки развлечений и не встречал такого отстоя. К встати в начанге винперал так же не понравился именно сервисом хотя был чище.

Ngày 13/09, nhóm mình (3 người) đã chơi gần như hết các trò tại VinWonders và hầu hết nhân viên đều rất nhiệt tình, dễ thương. Tuy nhiên trải nghiệm ở phim “Thảm bay Aladdin” suất 16:30 thật sự là một vết gợn khó chấp nhận.
Nhóm mình đến 16:10, được một bạn nhân viên (B) hướng dẫn ngồi chờ và khẳng định sẽ được vào trước vì đến sớm. Trong lúc đó một nhóm khách đến sau lại được một nhân viên khác (A, mặc đồ Aladdin) cho xếp hàng vào line. Khi mình nhắc lại lời bạn B thì bạn A thẳng thừng nói: “Bạn kia mới, không biết gì hết” và bắt nhóm mình xếp cuối hàng dù đã giải thích rất rõ.

Kết quả: nhóm mình bị dồn vào gần cuối, trước toàn khách nước ngoài cao, chắn hết tầm nhìn. Đỉnh điểm là khi phổ biến thông tin, bạn A hỏi có ai bị tiền đình không, không ai trả lời thì tự ý vỗ vào người bạn nam trong nhóm mình để hỏi lại. Đây là hành vi cực kỳ thiếu chuyên nghiệp và khiến bọn mình rất khó chịu.
Trước đó mình rất ấn tượng với sự nhiệt tình của staff VinWonders, nhưng chỉ một nhân viên như bạn A đã phá hỏng cả trải nghiệm. Mong VinWonders kiểm tra và chấn chỉnh để khách đến sau không gặp cảnh tương tự.

Vandaag bij het Vinwonders pretpark geweest. We begonnen bij het grote aquarium. Deze was op zich wel leuk om doorheen te lopen alleen vond ik dat alle verblijven enorm klein waren voor de vissen. Er zwommen hele grote vissen in hele kleine verblijven. Wij hebben ook boven bij het aquarium gegeten. Voor een plekje aan de railing moest je perse een van de 4 geselecteerde duurdere gerechten kiezen anders mocht je daar niet zitten. Dus je moest eigenlijk gewoon betalen voor je tafel. Dit hebben wij niet gedaan en hebben gewoon een tafel aan de andere kant van het restaurant gekozen. Wij hadden spaghetti bolognese en een pizza besteld. Voor de kwaliteit van het eten hoef je ook zeker niet hierheen te gaan. Het was beide niet lekker. De spaghetti was nog wel enigszins weg te krijgen. Maar de pizza was de meest vieze pizza die ik ooit op heb.

Daarna zijn we door het park gelopen om naar wat attracties te gaan. Bijna alle attracties waren nog gesloten (best gek want het was al 12:30). We hebben 2 achtbanen gehad in de hele middag dat we er waren omdat het allemaal maar slecht geregeld was. De medewerkers zijn ook allemaal niet vriendelijk. Daarbij waren alle gasten van het park ook nog eens erg asociaal. Mensen kropen zonder schaamte voor in de rij, etc. Ik heb nog nooit zoiets meegemaakt in een pretpark. Wij hebben het hier echt niet naar onze zin gehad en ik zou het ook niet aanraden. Er zijn genoeg andere leuke dingen te doen in Phu Quoc.

Thật sự Vin Wonders Phú Quốc không có gì để chê, nhóm mình đi chơi rất vui, mọi nhân viên đều thân thiện, cơ sở vật chất tốt, nhưng mình đánh 1 sao do thái độ của 1 nhân viên dẫn dắt mặc trang phục aladin tại show Aladin lúc 4 giờ 30 chiều ngày 13/09/2025, mình không biết bạn là nhân viên hay leader của trò chơi nhưng thái độ của bạn dành cho nhóm mình và một vài du khách khác rất là tiêu cực và xéo xắc.

Nhóm mình đến tham gia trò chơi tầm trước 15-20 phút và được bạn nhân viên mặc đồng phục Vin màu cam hướng dẫn qua ngồi đợi ở phía bên kia vì chưa đến giờ. Khi bắt đầu xếp hàng, nhóm mình được bạn nhân viên đó hỗ trợ vào ưu tiên và có nhờ nhóm mình ngồi kế bên line xếp hàng vì nhóm mình đến đầu tiên và ngồi chờ từ đầu đến cuối. Sau đó thì bạn nhân viên với trang phục Aladin đến và yêu cầu nhóm mình xếp hàng dù cho trước đó nhóm mình được thông báo là ưu tiên vào trước. Khi chúng mình hỏi lại thì bạn chỉ nói với tụi mình một câu là bạn mặc đồng phục Vin kia là nhân viên mới không biết luật và yêu cầu tụi mình xếp hàng với thái độ rất xéo sắc.

Đỉnh điểm là khi phổ biến thông tin về trò chơi, khi bạn hỏi có ai bị tiền đình hay say xe hay không thì giơ tay lên. Tất cả mọi người đều không ai giơ tay, vậy mà bạn đó lại bước xuống nhìn mình và vỗ vào tay mình hỏi duy nhất mỗi mình có tiền đình hay không. Bạn đang có ý gì? Bạn kiếm chuyện vì nhóm mình hỏi lại bạn chuyện ưu tiên và xếp hàng? Nếu thật sự là vậy là thật sự bạn rất thiếu chuyên nghiệp kể cả là mới làm việc hay làm việc lâu năm thì người làm dịch vụ cũng nhận biết được thái độ nào là cần thiết, thái độ nào là không nên. Mình cảm thấy bạn nhân viên mặc đồng phục Vin có thái độ còn tốt hơn là bạn mặc trang phục Aladin này.

Mình mong Vin Wonders Phú Quốc sẽ kiểm tra lại thái độ của bạn nhân viên này, không chỉ mình mà các du khách khác cùng tham gia show diễn lúc đó cũng vô cùng bức xúc với thái độ của bạn nhân viên đó.

Cảm ơn!

Mình đi vào ngày 29/6, với giá vé gốc tuy nhiên các trò chơi lỗi liên tục, xếp hàng thì rõ dài nhưng cứ đang chơi lại lỗi, cả sự an toàn và trải nghiệm của khách hàng đều vô cùng tệ, với mức giá 950k nhưng không hề xứng đáng, các trò chơi cứ hẹn phải sửa 1 tiếng tuy nhiên thời gian chơi chỉ đến 18h, vậy làm sao khách hàng có thể đợi và kịp chơi? Ростомеры не правильные. Мой рост 155см и везде я 145 см, соотвественно по этой причине ребенка ростом 122см не пустили на почти все атракционы, тк на ростомерах парка она меньше 120см . Ребенку 7 лет, из всего парка она смогла покататься на 3 атракционах для самых маленьких. Огромные очереди на атракционы и отстояв очередь в 30-40 минут не факт, что ты покатаешься, потому что атракцион могут просто закрыть или случится поломка. Все достачно уставшее. Если бы почитала отзывы раньше ни за что не пошла. И другим не рекомендую.

MỘT TRẢI NGHIỆM TỆ HẠI TẠI VINWONDERs PHÚ QUỐC 29/6
Không biết công viên bảo hành khu vui chơi ra sao, nhưng các trò chơi lỗi liên tục, lèo tèo có mấy trò mà khách thì đông thì thử hỏi với cái giá 950k với một hệ thống trò chơi lỗi như vậy có xứng đáng hay không? Tôi nghĩ không chỉ tôi mà có rất nhiều người khác đều có cái trải nghiệm vô cùng tệ thế này tại Vinwonders ngày 29/6

одну звезду ставлю за дизорганизацию. в аквапарке мы не были, ходили в океанариум и на аттракционы. в океанариуме все в целом круто, жаль толпы людей, а места на шоу русалок занимают вообще за 40 минут. а вот аттракционы это полнейший хаос. на огромных горках, куда стоит очередь по часу, работает по 1-2 вьетнамца. я такое вижу первый раз в жизни. они просто не могут обработать такое количество гостей, вот и очереди по часу+. неужели так сложно платить эти гроши не двум, а трем работникам? очередь создается даже там, где ее вообще не должно быть. но больше всего испортили настроение на самой популярной красной горке – мы встали в очередь где то в 17:20, стояли 40 минут и в 18:00 аттракцион закрылся))) зачем вы вообще на него тогда пустили. если вы не усппли вовремя закрыть вход, то это ваша оплошность, нужно было покатать всех, кто отстоял эту длинючую очередь (которая тоже возникла из-за того, что на аттракционе работает 1 человек). в итоге остались без катания около 40 человек, которые пришли вовремя. ужасный сервис. еще непонятно, почему бы не продавать фаст пасс на каждый аттракцион. мы бы тогда его просто купили да и все. но нет, его продают очень выборочно и почему-то не продают там, где он больше всего нужен. в ресторане в зоне викингов кончились 5/8 блюд к 14:00... в общем если и ехать, то только очень терпеливым людям, которые любят занимать места за 40 мин

Giá cao hơn nhưng chất lượng và kiểu cách phục vụ kém xa Vinwonder Nam Hội An. Mở cửa tới 19g30 mà 17g30-18g tất cả các khu đóng cửa (ăn gian hết 1 tiếng 30p tiền vé của khách). Nhân viên kém, chậm chạp như cố tình câu giờ để khách mất, hỏi thông tin gì cũng ú ớ không biết. Chất lượng món ăn khu nhà hàng món ăn trung bình. Giá vé trọn gói nhưng khá nhiều thứ dịch vụ, hoạt động được bán thêm bên trong không nêu rõ trước trên website.

Vinwonder tuyệt vời, từ nhân viên cho tới những trò chơi. Đặc biệt, các anh chị tiên cá biểu diễn dưới nước và các anh thợ lặn rất nhiệt tình và dễ thương. Chuyến đi này sẽ là điều tuyệt vời nếu như không có sự thiếu chuyên nghiệp từ một bạn nhân viên làm mất đi niềm vui của mình.

Bạn nhân viên của trò chơi Aladin có thái độ cực kì khó chịu. Khung thời gian mình chơi là 16h30 ngày 13/09, mình và bạn đã vô sớm trước 15' tức 16h15 khi đó vẫn chưa mở dây để xếp hàng. Bạn nhân viên trực khi đó có kêu tụi mình ngồi đợi sau có một đoàn khách vô lúc đó dây xếp hàng được mở và họ đứng trước. Mình có thắc mắc và bạn nhân viên có hỗ trợ mình ngồi đợi và vẫn ưu tiên vì mình tới trước. Khoảng mấy phút sau có bạn nhân viên mặc đồ Aladin tới hỏi tụi mình thì bắt tụi mình xếp hàng ở cuối nhưng mình có nói lại là mình đến đầu tiên và có bạn nhân viên trực xác nhận nhưng lại nhận được câu trả lời “bạn đó mới, không biết” kèm theo thái độ cực kì khó chịu. Sau đó bạn bắt mình xếp hàng tận cuối và khi vô trò chơi các khách đứng trước cao và làm mất trải nghiệm của tụi mình mặc dù đã đến rất sớm để có thể vô đứng trước.

Bạn đem lại cho mình cảm giác bị coi thường trong chính kì nghỉ ngơi. Mong bên mình nhận được phản hồi và góp ý lại bạn để những khách sau không còn tình trạng như vậy nữa.

Công viên giải trí thì ổn nhưng nhà hàng phục vụ không tốt, nhân viên nữ. Không cười. Và sử dụng giọng điệu không tốt với khách hàng. Mọi thứ khác đều ổn, đồ ăn cũng ổn.

Thể hiện vẻ mặt và vẻ ngoài không muốn tiếp nhận khách hàng nữ.
Họ đứng nói chuyện với một nhóm và mỉm cười, nhưng khi nói chuyện với khách hàng, họ không muốn phục vụ.

Mit Kindern unter 120 cm Körpergröße nicht zu empfehlen! Unser fünfjähriger Sohn ist knapp unter 120 cm und durfte nur Attraktionen für Babys nutzen. Alles was Spaß gemacht hätte war verboten. Wir haben es überall versucht und mehrmals mit "dem Manager" gesprochen, auch das hat nur bei einer Attraktion geholfen. Wir waren alle schwer enttäuscht, da wir aufgrund der Bewertung als "kinderfreundlich" hohe Erwartungen hatten.
Die Angestellten im Park scheinen alle Angst um ihren Job zu haben und sind deshalb übervorsichtig und lassen nicht mit sich reden. Überall wird stur die Körpergröße gemessen. Eine Angestellte hat dabei auf die Überwachungskamera gezeigt und uns erklärt, dass sie ihren Job verliert, wenn sie uns durchlässt.
Wir haben aufgrund der Enttäuschung unser Geld zurück gefordert, was abgelehnt wurde.
Zusammenfassung: Es war ein teurer Tag mit viel Frustration und Tränen. Die Shows waren okay.

Village des viking—> attention si vous faite le vikink rivers rapids ride . Ils vous vende des protections contre l’eau pour vous et votre téléphone! Non pas parce que l attraction mouille , non juste car juste avant la fin ils vous lance une jet d’eau directement sur vous pour que vous finissiez trempé sans raison particulière !

Nous sommes deux à avoir besoin de lunettes pour voir à plus de deux mettre et nous avons fait faire à notre vue des lunettes de plongé pour les attractions pu simplement se baigner mais même elles sont  interdite. Du coup la moitié du parc qui nous est interdit de profiter, une honte et quant nous avons fait part à l’entrée du parc de notre déception, ils ont juste dit qu il allait voir avec leurs équipes et que celle ci devait être inquiet pour notre sécurité avec des lunettes de plongées dans les attractions .
Que les lunettes soient interdites dans les attractions de type rollercoster et autre, ca on comprend mais pour le reste, c’est honteux ! Interdire les lunettes de plongées quant elles sont nécessaires pour notre sécurité, incompressible!
Nous ne recommandons pas le parc tant que cette politique discriminatoire envers ceux qui ont des problèmes de vue ne sera pas changé .

Nhà mua vé từ khách sạn Melia vinpearl sáng ngày 11/6/20223, đến 10h20 vào vinwonders Phú Quốc thì không cho vào, có vé nhưng vẫn bắt chờ đã đời 25 phút nữa. Rất ít khi đánh giá nhưng thái độ quá tệ. Bỏ tiền ra để đi chơi ở đây nhưng nhận lại toàn chuyện bực mình.
Cảnh đẹp không thể bàn cãi, chỉ có thái độ nhân viên soát vé là không thể chịu được, khó ưa, hỗ trợ vé học sinh được mức giá rẻ hơn nhưng thái độ khó chịu không hỗ trợ

Đọc rất nhiều bài đánh giá xuất sắc về Vinwonder nên mình rất kì vọng hôm nay sẽ được trãi nghiệm lý thú. Tuy nhiên, do hôm nay mưa tầm tã nên mình mới nhận thấy được lỗ hổng trong quá trình vận hành của Vinwd. Trời mưa, nguyên cái khu to đùng chỉ có 2 cái xe điện hỗ trợ khách ra cổng. Điều phối viên thì quá yếu kém, nói xe chỉ hỗ trợ ng già, trẻ nhỏ nhưng để khách ào lên xe vô tội vạ. Tới lúc k điễu phối đc nữa thì lại bảo xe hết điện, khách tự mua áo mưa mà ra, làm biết bao em bé phải đi bộ ra. Cuối cùng vẫn có xe vào rước. Vwd nên đầu tư thêm nhiều xe điện, đồng thời train lại cho các nhân viên điều phối. Tks.

Spent a couple of hours here in Feb/26 after doing some rides with my partner and my 12-year-old at VinWonders Phu Quoc, including the aquarium. I left feeling insanely depressed and still bothered 2 weeks later by the conditions for many of the animals.  When you first walk in, the main tank looks massive and impressive, giving the impression that the aquatic life has tons of swimming space. But as you continue the self-guided tour to the right, it quickly becomes clear that this isn’t the reality.  Some of the large, ancient fish are confined to shockingly small tanks, left to drift back and forth with barely any room to move despite their size and lifespan.  It’s easy for people to feel detached when it comes to fish — we tend to assume they’re unaware or incapable of suffering simply because we don’t connect with them the way we do with mammals. But then there are the penguins. They did not choose to be relocated to Vietnam to live in a cage where they are constantly surrounded by people and with children knocking on the glass throughout the day, straining their necks through the metal trying to get food from the workers. So. Freaking. Sad.  I’m embarrassed to admit that I paid to support this.  This review may fall on deaf ears, but at least I feel like I’m doing my small part by speaking up. The only consolation is that we chose not to visit the safari park - I cant even imagine how worse I'd feel.
